clean_body: WATCH the 30 Minute VCDL debate here | | | | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE March 23, 2023 Contact: Chris Farmer 804 912 6007 | Senator Chase Was the REAL WINNER of Tuesday Night's Virginia Citizens Defense League Second Amendment Debate | Congratulations to Senator Amanda Chase! | | | == | Colonial Heights, VA \- Immediately after last week's debate, every candidate running in Senate District 12 announced they were the winner of last week's VCDL Debate, BUT there was only one real winner. Senator Amanda Chase was the ONLY clear winner at the VDCL Senate District 12 Debate that took place Thursday evening at the Colonial Heights American Legion Post 284. == (see the truth for yourself.) "Senator Chase was the only candidate on the stage with a solid 8 year 100% uncompromising VCDL voting record that we can trust. Her knowledge of the questions was spot on. She nailed the answers. It is clear her opponents are both moderates and have no command or knowledge of most 2A questions that were asked. Senator Chase was also the only candidate that was carrying on stage. She has my vote," owner of TAC Solutions Dee Dee Van Buren. "Senator Chase was the only candidate who answered the questions and was on point with her answers. She clearly showed her knowledge and expertise with every question that was asked, while her opponents could only answer questions generally," said owner of TAC Solutions Dave Van Buren. Her opponent former State Senator Glen Sturtevant apologized for his bad 2A votes during his one term in the Senate to include voting for red flag laws. He apologized profusely and asked 2A supporters to give him a second chance. During the debate, Sturtevant replied that he would give localities the ability to decide which schools could allow armed law enforcement. Senator Chase said she disagreed with Sturtevant and that she would allow any law abiding citizen to conceal carry under any circumstance and that the Constitution, not a locality should determine where individuals were allowed to carry for personal protection. Her second opponent Tina Ramirez, who has no voting record on gun rights and has not been involved with the NRA or VCDL nor has she attended any of their rallies or gun shows, could only speculate that she would support gun rights. She also mentioned she was leaving for Iraq tomorrow. Some attendees asked how would she serve in the Senate if she is constantly out of the country for months. Senator Chase was the clear winner of this debate. | "Voting records matter. Senator Amanda Chase is the only candidate and incumbent senator running in Senate District 12, which includes Chesterfield and Colonial Heights to receive a perfect lifetime score of 100% for all 8 years she's served in the Virginia Senate. Senator Chase has a proven track record of not only defending the 2nd Amendment, but actively working to repeal harmful gun control legislation passed between 2020 and 2022. We strongly encourage the 2A community to join us in supporting Senator Amanda Chase," Dave and Dee Dee VanBuren. | Senator Chase responded, "I am humbled to receive the endorsement of Dave and DeeDee VanBuren, owners of TAC Solutions who train thousands of 2A supporters, not only in Senate District 12 but across Virginia. | In case you missed the VCDL Virginia Citizens Defense League Senate District 12 Debate last night, Senator Chase won the debate hands down. Senator Amanda Chase, voting record, lifetime 8 year 100% VCDL rating Glen Sturtevant, voting record, 96%, 93%, 80%, 88% ratings Tina Ramirez, no voting record | Senator Amanda Chase 8 Year "Perfect" Pro-2A VOTING RECORD | | | | | | | | | | Most Proven 2A Choice for Senate District 12 | Re-elect Senator Amanda Chase to SD12 (Chesterfield and Colonial Heights) | | | ---|--- | Lifetime "A" Rating with the NRA Lifetime 100% Rating with VCDL Always carries for self-defense Always votes NO on Red Flag laws Always votes for Constitutional Carry Sponsored bills to restore 2A rights | www.chaseforsenate.com | Former one-term Senator Glen Sturtevant wants to challenge Virginia State Senator Amanda Chase for re-election to the Virginia Senate in District 12. Voting records matter. Any candidate can SAY they will support 2A. But there's ONLY ONE that has done it. We can trust Senator Amanda Chase. 100 % lifetime rating with VCDL (Virginia Citizen's Defense League) That's an 8 year voting record you can trust. With every year that Glen Sturtevant was in office his voting record got worse. | | | | | | | | 2016 2A RECORD Amanda Chase 100 Glen Sturtevant 96 | | | 2017 2A RECORD Amanda Chase 100 Glen Sturtevant 93 | | | 2018 2A RECORD Amanda Chase 100 Glen Sturtevant 80 | | | 2019 2A RECORD Amanda Chase 100 Glen Sturtevant 88 | VOTING RECORDS MATTER | The longer he was in office, the worse his 2A votes became. See for yourself. Why would any Republican support Glen Sturtevant again? | | | | | ---|--- | FORMER Senator Glen Sturtevant's 2nd Amendment Voting Record ... 2016 96% 2017 93% 2018 80% 2019 88% 2019 FAILED TO BE RE-ELECTED "Are you willing to take a chance that Glen will protect your gun rights?" == | Watch Senator Chase as she hits every target | Or trust Senator Amanda Chase? 2016 100% 2017 100% 2018 100% 2019 100% 2020 100% 2021 100% 2022 100% The choice is OBVIOUS if you value the 2nd Amendment. You want a fighter not a compromiser to stand up for your 2A rights. Re-elect Senator Amanda Chase | Since 2016, Senator Chase has also introduced 18 bills in support of law abiding gun owners and to reverse the Gun Grab of 2020 | Senator Chase passed 2 pro-2A Bills even under a Democrat controlled Senate & Governor | 2023 2A Legislation introduced by Senator Chase: SB806 Repeal gun free zones by localities Control of firearms by localities. Removes the authority for a locality by ordinance to prohibit the possession or carrying of firearms, ammunition, or components or any combination thereof in (i) any building, or part thereof, owned or used by such locality for governmental purposes; (ii) any public park owned or operated by the locality; (iii) any recreation or community center facility; or (iv) any public street, road, alley, or sidewalk or public right-of-way or any other place of whatever nature that is open to the public and is being used by or is adjacent to a permitted event or an event that would otherwise require a permit. The bill provides that any firearm received by the locality pursuant to a buy-back program shall be offered for sale by public auction or sealed bids to a person licensed as a dealer. Current law provides that any such firearm shall be destroyed by the locality unless the person surrendering the firearm requests in writing that the firearm be offered for sale. The bill also limits the authority of localities to bring lawsuits against certain firearms manufacturers and others and further provides that the right to bring any such action is reserved exclusively to the Commonwealth and shall be brought by the Attorney General. == SB1488 Repeal of red flag laws Firearms; removal from persons posing substantial risk; penalties. Repeals the procedure by which any attorney for the Commonwealth or law-enforcement officer may apply to a general district court, circuit court, or juvenile and domestic relations district court judge or magistrate for an emergency substantial risk order to prohibit a person who poses a substantial risk of injury to himself or others from purchasing, possessing, or transporting a firearm. The bill also removes the substantial risk order registry for the entry of orders issued. == 2022 2A Legislation introduced by Senator Chase: SB74 Repeal of Gun Free Zones by Localities Control of firearms by localities. Removes the authority for a locality by ordinance to prohibit the possession or carrying of firearms, ammunition, or components or any combination thereof in (i) any building, or part thereof, owned or used by such locality for governmental purposes; (ii) any public park owned or operated by the locality; (iii) any recreation or community center facility; or (iv) any public street, road, alley, or sidewalk or public right-of-way or any other place of whatever nature that is open to the public and is being used by or is adjacent to a permitted event or an event that would otherwise require a permit. The bill provides that any firearm received by the locality pursuant to a buy-back program shall be offered for sale by public auction or sealed bids to a person licensed as a dealer. Current law provides that any such firearm shall be destroyed by the locality unless the person surrendering the firearm requests in writing that the firearm be offered for sale. The bill also limits the authority of localities and state governmental entities to bring lawsuits against certain firearms manufacturers and others. == SB75 Repeal of Gun Free Zones at the State Capitol and State Buildings Carrying a firearm or explosive material within Capitol Square and the surrounding area, into building owned or leased by the Commonwealth, etc.; penalty. Repeals the prohibition on carrying a firearm or explosive material within (i) the Capitol of Virginia; (ii) Capitol Square and the surrounding area; (iii) any building owned or leased by the Commonwealth or any agency thereof; or (iv) any office where employees of the Commonwealth or any agency thereof are regularly present for the purpose of performing their official duties. Current law makes it a Class 1 misdemeanor for any person to carry a firearm or explosive material within these areas, subject to certain exceptions, including the following individuals while acting in the conduct of such person's official duties: any law-enforcement officer, any authorized security personnel, any active military personnel, any fire marshal when such fire marshal has been granted police powers, or any member of a cadet corps while such member is participating in an official ceremonial event for the Commonwealth. == 2021 2A Legislation Introduced by Senator Chase: SB1238 Allows US Armed Forces Veterans to Serve as School Security Officers School security officers; carrying of firearms; United States Armed Forces veterans; employees of local school boards. Permits local school boards to authorize the carrying of a firearm by an individual hired as a school security officer who is (i) an honorably discharged veteran of the United States Armed Forces or (ii) an employee of a local school board who has completed an approved auxiliary training academy. == 2020 2A Legislation Introduced by Senator Chase: SB825 Repeals Prohibition to Carry loaded firearms in public areas prohibited and in government buildings Carrying loaded firearms. Prohibits carrying loaded firearms in government buildings. == SB901 Allows residents to carry concealed handguns without acquiring a concealed carry permit. Concealed handgun permits. Allows residents to carry concealed handguns without acquiring a concealed carry permit. == SB958 Repeals the prohibition and allows a law abiding citizen to carry for protection while at church Carrying dangerous weapon to place of religious worship. Repeals the statutory prohibition on carrying a gun, pistol, bowie knife, dagger, or other dangerous weapon, without good and sufficient reason, to a place of worship while a meeting for religious purposes is being held at such place. == SB1009 If a state or locality creates a gun free zone they lose their sovereign immunity. Firearm-free zones designated by the Commonwealth or a locality; regulation of weapons; waiver of sovereign immunity. Provides that (i) if the Commonwealth designates any property owned by it as a firearm-free zone or (ii) if any locality designates such locality or any part of such locality as a firearm-free zone, the Commonwealth or such locality waives its sovereign immunity as it relates to any injuries sustained by persons lawfully present in such firearm-free zone. The bill further provides that if the Commonwealth or a locality adopts any ordinance, rule, policy, or regulation regulating weapons, the Commonwealth or locality assumes an affirmative duty to protect invitees lawfully on the premises of the Commonwealth or locality and establishes a waiver of sovereign immunity for any governmental entity or official responsible for such regulation. 2019 2A Legislation Introduced by Senator Chase: SB1012 Allows Firefighters and EMS to Conceal Carry when they're on duty Carrying a concealed handgun; firefighters and emergency medical services providers. Provides that any firefighter or person employed as emergency medical services personnel may carry a concealed handgun while engaged in the performance of his official duties, provided that such firefighter or person employed as emergency medical services personnel has been approved to carry a concealed handgun by his fire chief or emergency medical services chief. The bill requires the Department of Criminal Justice Services, in consultation with the Office of Emergency Medical Services of the Department of Health and the Department of Fire Programs, to develop a model policy regarding carrying a concealed handgun for firefighters and emergency medical services personnel. == 2018 2A Legislation Introduced by Senator Chase: SB715 Allows Firefighters and EMS to Conceal Carry even when they're on duty Carrying a concealed handgun; firefighters and emergency medical services providers. Provides that any firefighter or person employed as emergency medical services personnel may carry a concealed handgun while engaged in the performance of his official duties, provided that such firefighter or person employed as emergency medical services personnel has been approved to carry a concealed handgun by his fire chief or emergency medical services chief. The bill requires the Department of Criminal Justice Services, in consultation with the Office of Emergency Medical Services of the Department of Health and the Department of Fire Programs, to develop a model policy regarding carrying a concealed handgun for firefighters and emergency medical services personnel. == SB912 Retired law-enforcement officers; carrying a concealed handgun; return to work Retired law-enforcement officers; carrying a concealed handgun; return to work. Clarifies that a retired law-enforcement officer shall surrender his proof of consultation to carry a concealed handgun when he returns to work as a law-enforcement officer. Current law does not specify that his return to work be as a law-enforcement officer. == PASSED & SIGNED INTO LAW 2017 2A Legislation Introduced by Senator Chase: SB791 Reduces fee for getting a conceal handgun permit Fees for concealed handgun permits. Makes the $10 fee that the clerk of court is now required to charge for processing a concealed handgun permit application or issuing a concealed handgun permit discretionary with the clerk. == SB1422 Reduces fee for getting a conceal handgun permit Local law enforcement; fees for concealed handgun permits; courthouse and courtroom security; assessment. Eliminates (i) the fee, under current law up to $35, that a local law-enforcement agency is permitted to charge for conducting the background investigation for a concealed handgun permit and (ii) the requirement that the local law-enforcement agency forward to the State Police any amount assessed by the FBI for providing criminal history record information in the background investigation. The bill makes discretionary the current mandatory fee of up to $10 charged by the clerk for processing a concealed handgun permit application or issuing a permit. The bill increases from $10 to $20 the maximum amount, designated solely to fund courthouse and courtroom security, that a local governing body may assess against a convicted defendant as part of the costs in a criminal or traffic case in district or circuit court. == SB1450 Conceal Carry Holders can carry on colleges and university campuses Possession of concealed handguns; concealed handgun permit holders at public institutions of higher education. Allows any firefighter, person employed as search and rescue personnel, person employed as emergency medical services personnel, certified campus security officer, or student, employee, contractor, vendor, or faculty member of a public institution of higher education that participates in a Reserve Officers' Training Corps (ROTC) program who possesses a valid Virginia concealed handgun permit or a concealed handgun permit from another state that is recognized by Virginia to carry a concealed handgun on the property of, in buildings owned by, or at events hosted at public institutions of higher education. == 2016 2A Legislation Introduced by Senator Chase: SB615 Allows retired law enforcement to purchase their firearm at fair market value; PASSED Purchase of weapons other than handguns by certain officers. Allows officers of certain agencies to purchase, at a fair market price and with approval of the agency head, weapons other than handguns that are issued for personal use of an officer so long as the weapon is a type and configuration that can be purchased at a regular hardware or sporting goods store by a private citizen without restrictions other than the instant background check. Current law allows this type of purchase only for the Department of State Police. This bill is identical to == == SB616 Reciprocity with other states Out-of-state concealed handgun permits; photo identification. Removes certain requirements for an out-of-state concealed handgun permit or license to be recognized and accepted in Virginia and instead requires an out-of-state permit or license holder to carry a government-issued photo identification and present his permit or license and such identification upon demand by a law-enforcement officer in order for his out-of-state permit or license to be recognized and accepted in Virginia. This bill was incorporated into == == PASSED & SIGNED INTO LAW SB677 Reduce fees to get a conceal carry permit Fees for concealed handgun permits. Makes the $10 fee that the clerk of court is now required to charge for processing a concealed handgun permit application or issuing a concealed handgun permit discretionary with the clerk. == | Senator Chase is the only TRUSTED 2A Candidate in Senate District 12 | Senator Chase spoke at the largest VCDL in Virginia's history | | | | | | | | | | | | | Senator Chase has also been endorsed by Dick Heller | | Senator Chase has also been Endorsed by Dick Heller, D.C. vs. Heller, Supreme Court Gun Freedom Case | "I know of no harder working person in Virginia so capable and willing to fight for freedom and our foundational God-given natural rights through self-preservation through our United States Constitutional Second Amendment than Senator Amanda Chase," Dick Heller. == == | For God and country, | | | | | | | | == | | == | | == | | | | | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | | | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. Box 5811, Midlothian, VA 23112 | | Sent by mailto:amanda@chaseforva.com powered by

They'll overturn the cruel abortion ban that made millions of women state property and block Trump or DeSantis henchmen from stealing Wisconsin's electoral votes in 2024, as Trump attempted to do in 2020._ [**_Will you join Blue Amp in making the maximum effort to ensure we never know how dangerous Dan Kelly could be, by electing progressive champion Janet Protasiewicz April 4th by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T434d2b48-4a86-4b2e-9721-ea02765662fe/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Yet, we don't have to, as it's made crystal clear in this explosive expose (see image below) by the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel on Kelly's moral sickness:_** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T11fc3d45-65eb-4d8f-b904-c382e7f10a53/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **This degenerate, Kelly, is unfit to be local dog catcher, much less a man who decides whether Donald or DeSantis can steal an election. ** [**_Will you join Blue Amp in making the maximum effort to ensure we never know, by electing progressive champion Janet Protasiewicz April 4th by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta56cc283-eb6f-4733-82e5-fd2a9ef30d98/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for stopping this evil in its tracks and saving our democracy._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: Senator Amanda Chase
subject: The RINO politicians are lining up behind Sturtevant just as I've been telling you they would...for months
disclaimer_text: paid for by the political ruling class by the time they are sworn into office
body:
The Lobbyists, PACS and RINO politicians want to take me out. Will you let them?
---
| | | | | |
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| Friend could you please make one last donation before 31 March midnight?
---
| THE RINOS ARE LINING UP behind Sturtevant...he's their guy. (and we're sure there will be more)
---
| | |
---
Senator Jill Vogel who voted for Medicaid Expansion in the budget, scored the lowest of any Senate Republican on the 2019 Family Foundation scorecard with 56% (I had 100%) and she had the lowest Republican score that year on the Tea Party scorecard with 53% (I was the highest scoring Senate Republican). I'm the true conservative Republican running in [#VA12](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VwrLec3JgBVm0f_daoPDmesb1oGMEDtRtGqbgrYdj2TpuxT-a4EW6ljnyFT2A1Xarti2Rs4lzBfFLVnKqxReMgbPQGa5PBPSoVNYJ0zMN1ikUtU7jYFrYFRqg7AjFyw8u-_uqRwy0iBSFi-8cXUqIQDMLMumGmM8mm73zwXNtgHPyZiZJN5LxDJY2FVmhxpxhJXZLYB4cLaaEtKjdA5wDpLyBKD1UIJhFGw6PLzIOVVO7nifVKGJyBftZv5MpxkDrocUpg-ZJPPUUj_qkIYZyJrAa83jvprbPR6mPjQj_oNJP9X1Cc3Fnc0BuwRqJWfv1AZPeuu2alPcuzXvbM6lH89NyWhtJxQ1a1avDbp6LxO2trV1HHScRrvOyIkUTvcid6NC7nL5lCxCRY87ZxMOWw6txlAot-Adn_xx2JoBYMDZ0J674HXe3w3HXoine0JA_iqOUfggO1qqT7EsPTqSNeW99VnIkGOgzfzSxLPtwXGoWzgmCFgC37zxWWAaLtRpJIf-F1dHf2Y=&c=vPjDCySzb5DRL2nb2lJcFw2uTl3GdEKIruzi49x0IFAM8C1GdvEeKQ==&ch=WbB-CbsXtMRkjpxgk9U4Xrwep7zcsWJqnjU_qX4HIvf6JVm_pL7tgA==), so you bet she endorsed Sturtevant. [#Election2023](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VwrLec3JgBVm0f_daoPDmesb1oGMEDtRtGqbgrYdj2TpuxT-a4EW6ljnyFT2A1XaCcuLlfgTY87lIsnh3o2MvWdufqolKcLUgNgjRtVq6GwPQaPeqBySjV3OQkMDD5eoms3qBsHAgZoGmrOs8f0_T3HhQ-nz5HyAOWRv3stXFTslpERstgKJtx0Dys3igxTQyOdJv0hH1LmHQNjAnzWf-PI8jkJElulNEg1eUohC6cvr6O0Py1f1vBqt0_c3xrrFBD052Y2DZQ-mzPvoqMPBOMGTqRFGqP2gB-9-IyzxpCpRXtzszBlla2zGpGI1aI3YAKIpV2nf5kbRW6jXAsKVA10ly3suIro9z3MTTakumVY9d3TBRg6AbrTimJpj2U2mDGiyKPPHWW9lWO9oJahlrKH1vLxmYc1tzRvBB0P0HH-MSUUCwbpZtFFwqI9HUqwQXJH87fU8IRuYdOa7nWUnINedn2EgprHK-Yw_REw8aL5_TcCN_VQTODjVz9c68xQCttIuLIKFTE71JJv_n_M3kg==&c=vPjDCySzb5DRL2nb2lJcFw2uTl3GdEKIruzi49x0IFAM8C1GdvEeKQ==&ch=WbB-CbsXtMRkjpxgk9U4Xrwep7zcsWJqnjU_qX4HIvf6JVm_pL7tgA==)

---
| | |
---
Senator John Watkins received a 56 out of 100 on his last[ 2014-2015 Family Foundation scorecard](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VwrLec3JgBVm0f_daoPDmesb1oGMEDtRtGqbgrYdj2TpuxT-a4EW6ljnyFT2A1XaLDCNwXEbomhynZwjK39POUzpWKywi_A_WaHHoXCpm3xG7jpd4nazTBZGLc1i2RtIxU80jU7yqfJZPG_B9y31Y0huyC1uUstzkHW42RyxBWxoEDGmJcA_CnI3nq8YqRtCNkmTZbnZuJKKy0547B9Fa0oTqibv-eBW6Fdwlgj_Okh7pqst_du9lGcQW8sn-b1smFAvyztKkbHRx1Qm4mqrTUzuoVZWpLxrqF2gI5lCXCcWD_8W3T10dPURykpOcngk&c=vPjDCySzb5DRL2nb2lJcFw2uTl3GdEKIruzi49x0IFAM8C1GdvEeKQ==&ch=WbB-CbsXtMRkjpxgk9U4Xrwep7zcsWJqnjU_qX4HIvf6JVm_pL7tgA==) his last year in office. There was not a tax increase he didn't support.
---
| | |
---

Friend What did I tell you? The RINO politicians don't want me back in the Virginia Senate representing you. They want a puppet they can control.
Why? Because I introduced legislation calling for term limits, introduced legislation calling for no out of state dark money influencing our elections and then I cofounded the Transparency Caucus so that now all of our committee meetings are available and online for you to watch.
They prefer "smoke and mirrors" to transparency. They like the "pay to play" system. I've been a disrupter to politics as usual.
I won't go along to get along with raising taxes. I also won't support gun control or abortion. Nor will I go along with the woke education agenda. So they're all coming after me.
It's very telling and almost comical to see the RINOS line up behind their guy Sturtevant. Keep paying attention and you'll see with every future endorsement another RINO. I have to say I told you so, but I know you're discerning and not surprised.
The RINOS and establishment politicians are backing their Liz Cheney, Mitt Romey RINO, former state Senator Glen Sturtevant. They reject the will of the people who voted him out just 4 years ago when he voted against guns and protecting innocent life.
They no doubt will announce a RINO a day from now until Election Day on June 20, 2023. There are plenty. I'm delighted actually that they are stepping forward so that you know who they are.
I represent you. And I have pushed back against the political uniparty for 8 years. Once again, they are trying to take me out. They won't be able to. You're not impressed by endorsements of politicians who are NOT CONSERVATIVE.
As a freshman legislator these are the same people who told me I needed to sit down, shut up and do what I was told to do.
I can't wait to see their faces on Tuesday, June 20 when I win again.
They opposed me in 2015 and yet I won. They opposed me in 2019 and yet I won. Why? Because the people don't trust politicians
During Covid, they wanted me to be quiet. When they were forcing us to wear masks and mandate vaccines I spoke out against the Marxist-style Northam government that treated us like subjects instead of citizens. They rolled their eyes at me on the floor and said, "Why can't you just wear a mask?"
When the thugs in Richmond destroyed our history, our statues, and our businesses, I stood up to them. They wanted me to be quiet because they wanted to avoid controversial issues. I chose to stand up for our history.
When they rioted and looted the streets of Richmond, I was on the front lines fighting for what was important to you.
Meanwhile, most politicians said nothing. They were too afraid to speak up for you because they were afraid they would be attacked by the left. I don't care if the left attacks me. Someone needs to hold them accountable and push back against their agenda to destroy our state and our country. What I won't miss are those who are supposed to be on our side attacking me for standing up for what's important to you. I'm not peer dependent; I'm driven by our shared principals.
I wouldn't stop talking about pushing back against mask and vaccine mandates.
I wouldn't stop talking about life and how it begins at conception not 15 months.
I wouldn't stop talking about the 2020 Presidential Election and how we need to conduct a full forensic audit in Virginia to get to the bottom of what happened in Virginia and to hold people accountable.
---
BUT THEY ARE STILL COMING AFTER ME AND I NEED YOU TO GIVE YOUR BIGGEST DONATION BEFORE MIDNIGHT 31 MARCH.
---
| |

MARCH 31 is our next CRITICAL FUNDRAISING DEADLINE and I need for you to GIVE BIG ONE MORE TIME.

THEY ARE TRYING TO TAKE ME OUT BECAUSE I STAND UP FOR YOU.

ARE YOU GOING TO STAND STRONG WITH ME LIKE I STOOD STRONG FOR YOU?

My two opponents have had 2 months to fundraise while I could not because I was in session doing the work of the people and legally could not raise money for my
re-electon campaign.
Please don't wait or it will be too late.

THE ELECTION IS TUESDAY 20 JUNE
LESS THAN 3 MONTHS AWAY

The political elite don't like me because I fight hard for you and refuse to just fall in line. The people love me but the RINO politicians don't. If they speak against me, know they are a RINO.

We must have the money now to pay staff, purchase mailers and hold events. Running a campaign is like running a business. We have to raise our own funds to run for public office.

And while many are giving, some of you have not given yet, and I'm asking you to please give what you can today. It all adds up.

WE HAVE LESS THAN 2 WEEKS TO FULLY FUND MY CAMPAIGN

I really need you now.

Please donate today before it's too late. They want to replace me with a Liz Cheney Republican.
Are you going to let them?

If you've already donated $100 to my re-election campaign to the Virginia Senate; thank you. Please consider giving another $100 as we are running out of time and have less than 2 weeks to fully fund my campaign. If you have not already donated $100, would you please do so today?

The Establishment is coming after me. They don't like that I can think for myself and chose to put the interests of the people above party politics. They don't like that I speak the truth to power- like when I said the 2020 Presidential Election was stolen and that people shouldn't be forced to wear masks or get a vaccine that's been around for less than a year.

I even had the audacity to introduce legislation that would give patients and their doctors the ability to have access to ivermectin and hydroxychloroquine. Apparently, this is unpopular to say and will earn you scorning looks from "the approved healthcare experts."

Instead, I say what is true instead of what is expedient or politically correct. And THEY HATE it.

And now they are circling the wagons.

I currently have 2 primary opponents. One, is a failed one term Senator, Glen Sturtevant, who compromised on both the 2nd Amendment when he voted for red flag laws and sponsored the so-called Equal Rights Amendment which had nothing to do with Equal Rights and everything to do with enshrining abortion into our Constitution and creating gender fluidity. He lost both 2nd Amendment supporters and conservatives with just those 2 votes alone, but most importantly.... he lost.

You can't win a Republican leaning seat without the support of both conservatives and 2A supporters. Glen Sturtevant proved this in 2019 when he lost. Now he wants you to forget his voting record.

The other candidate is Tina Ramirez, a twice failed #NeverTrump Congressional candidate who has been running for Congress for years, only to finish in last place. She says speaking the truth is "divisive." Many question how she runs a non-profit in which she pockets over $100,000 annually from her donors, and her family members not only sit on the board of her non-profit, but many get paid from it.

The political elite and the lobbyists have convinced themselves that they can beat me, and they are doing everything they can to fund my opponents in an effort to win this race; but it won't happen.

While I was working hard for the people during our 46 day 2023 General Assembly session, they were busy trying to raise money and collect endorsements from politicians. I on the other hand, since 2019, I have not taken money from special interest groups or lobbyists.

The people are tired of politicians who are already bought and paid for by the political ruling class by the time they are sworn into office. In fact, they are sick of it. They want term limits and caps on campaign donations, both of which I have introduced year after year in the Senate.

Many tell me that they love that "I'm a fighter." They love that I can't be bought by special interest groups or lobbyists and that I introduce legislation that people care about.

When my Republican Caucus leader sponsored tax increases and gun control, I left the caucus; not because I didn't like the Senators, but because what they were doing was wrong and I stood up to them. They wanted to teach me a lesson.

Now that same Republican Senate Minority Leader has hosted at least one fundraiser for my RINO opponent Glen Sturtevant who will go along to get along with the political elite who are not for you.

Because I stood up to them, they changed the Senate rules and took away all of my committee assignments, striped me of my seniority and stuck my desk in the corner. Nobody puts baby in the corner. So, I ran for Governor.

I was the front runner, until the State GOP implemented a Rigged Rank Choice Convention, which creates many hurdles that disenfranchise most registered voters from participating in choosing their Republican nominee, because they do not understand how to vote. So only those who faithfully participate in their local GOP Committee and their friends choose our Republican nominees. That's wrong! And not only did I call foul play. I sued the Republican Party of Virginia over it. We should include those who vote Republican, not just those who are able to volunteer for a GOP Committee.

Now some of the party elite hope I will simply leave and not fight for my seat, but that won't happen either!

Knowing how much support I have with the people, my opponents who are puppets for the political ruling class knew they had to start early. Well my question is, "Where have their candidates been?"

Neither one of my opponents stood up to the gun control groups when they were coming for your guns. They were no where to be found in 2020 when HB961 was presented to the Democrat controlled Senate Judiciary Committee. I was on the front row when the Democrat Senate Chair called me up to his chair to let me know the anti-gun bill, that would turn law abiding gun owners into felons overnight, would pass by for the year because of my efforts to lead our grassroots in calls, emails and visits to legislators. The Democrat controlled Senate Judiciary committee understand that Virginians support gun rights and we won.

I proudly led the effort to ensure law abiding citizens would not be turned into felons and was one of the only elected officials to speak at the annual VCDL Rally in Richmond, which turned out to be the largest 2A Rally in Virginia history.

I have consistently fought publicly and unapologetically to preserve and restore your gun rights as a law abiding citizen. The entire almost 8 years I've served in the Virginia Senate,

I'm the only candidate who can say I have a perfect lifetime score of 100 percent with the Virginia Citizen's Defense League and A rating with the NRA. I understand the importance of eliminating gun free zones which only turn participants into sitting ducks in a barrel. I get it because I live it. As it stands, I am the only candidate who also carries for personal protection and will do everything I can to restore gun rights lost in 2020 with the Democrat Trifecta.

Neither one of my opponents participated in any effort to push back against covid mandates. Delegate John McGuire was the only legislator to join me for the "Reopen Virginia" Rally that I led. We drove our cars ar0und capital grounds and beeped our horns while Governor Ralph Northam was giving his weekly Covid update. You could hear our beeping horns during his live weekly presentation.

Neither one of my opponents has done anything to call for an investigation into the 2020 Presidential Election or called for a FULL forensic audit.

Actions speak louder than words.

This session I was the ONLY legislator to introduce legislation to call for a FULL forensic audit.

I'm the only elected official from Virginia to witness in person the full forensic audit in Arizona and the release of the Executive Summary from the gallery of the Arizona Senate gallery. I used the knowledge I gained from the Arizona full forensic audit to draft and introduce 10 bills to put the guardrails back on our elections using the knowledge I gained in Arizona and also my role as National Election Integrity Chair.

I introduced legislation requiring photo identification to vote, requirement of a notary signature and required excuse to vote mail-in or absentee, elimination of voter ballot boxes that have no chain or custody, elimination of the permanent absentee voter list which allows live ballots to be mailed automatically to voters and the list goes on. I stood on my feet for 4 hours straight presenting 10 election integrity bills to the Democrat controlled Senate Privileges and Elections Committee which was controlled by Democrats. Even though I knew they would kill all 10 bills to put the guardrails back on our elections, I introduced and presented them anyway. I put these Democrat Senators on the official record as voting against fair, free and transparent elections in which every legal vote should count. And we will use this video when they run for re-election.

During the pandemic, I was the ONLY legislator who refused to wear a mask. In fact, they built a plexiglass wall around my desk on the Senate floor. Later it was discovered that masks are actually hazardous to your health and make you more likely to contract Covid. Later, I cosponsored and passed legislation that allowed parents to determine whether or not their child would wear a mask to school.

I was the ONLY legislator to introduce legislation to make it illegal to discriminate against people who choose not to wear a mask or get the vaccine.

I was the ONLY legislator to be illegitimately censured for attending the January 6 rally to exercise my First Amendment right to participate in a "Stop the Steal" Rally with President Trump.

I was the ONLY legislator to be canceled on Facebook.

WHY?

Because I'm one of the ONLY legislators who has the fortitude to stand up for you.

Please give your most generous donation before it's too late. Time is ticking.

Friday, March 31 at midnight is our next big fundraising deadline I will need to fully fund my re-election campaign. We are a long way from our goal and we really need your help now.

Will you allow the Establishment to get rid of one of the only voices in the Senate who stands up for you?

Please donate today. If they silence me, they know they don't have to address the issues that are most important to you.

I need your help to make it to the finish line. We need at least 5,000 people who love their country and want a fighter, to donate $100 or more so that we can fully fund my re-election campaign and win.

Can I count on you? You know you can count on me.

In Service,

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Big tech: Your opinion needed
body:
Over the past few months, the extremism of the political Left's agenda has become clear through the actions of the mainstream media and Big Tech companies like Twitter and Amazon.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=27a44ea73ebf465d84f6c360b861b6ec&_e=_o_AM6R68k7oe7PpFB6dFzHfJ15_ylyXNS8h9Xkta93lYMSctJEzV0l_lNO4B-uVEn3xtMRUvGSHUYSxLZYOJzl3qruFDHSImkFvSdryHL3s-ellgIqxH9Pb0HNUhOQxa2D6hbHZiYbTEbEw9GhQWjU3nZNrIvRR1gzqyiAEYer-6vWvAgNMkmOprFLzDqg9Jz_ZCGzxLkUoEJPPFpGs-J6xSn2N93cT91KP4iJDYrQztUE3uenbHWh8oZHcU-Hj0bWevvMLEVmYYMCWO-gp-zJLkMDoqolmrd_QzeyarKik29XZn6DC_71EMrel1XKqiFOKfjpNsmzoZb6S8mo2d8nmbVBNqUC23OmT6-VQtBJbKa5lkFKpRByrHAeqr5mA) Dear Fellow American, Over the past few months, the extremism of the political Left's agenda has become clear through the actions of the mainstream media and Big Tech companies like Twitter and Amazon. Together, these forces are working to**suppress conservative speech and political activity** , denying First Amendment rights to their political opponents--and denying access to conservative opinion and important news stories to the American people. Conservatives (including the former President of the United States) are increasingly being "de-platformed" by companies like Twitter. Amazon is refusing to sell books questioning the transgender revolution--it even took down an award-winning documentary video on the life of Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas! A major publishing company, Simon and Schuster, bowed to pressure and canceled plans to publish a book on the danger of Big Tech by U.S. Senator Josh Hawley. **We have never seen anything like what we are seeing today in America.** **That's why I am asking you to take a Hillsdale College NATIONAL SURVEY ON THE THREAT OF BIG TECH.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans on this critical issue--information that will strengthen Hillsdale's nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty...efforts we will continue to expand despite the opposition of Big Tech. Fellow American, you can complete the NATIONAL SURVEY ON THE THREAT OF BIG TECH by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/big-tech-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=27a44ea73ebf465d84f6c360b861b6ec&_e=_o_AM6R68k7oe7PpFB6dFzHfJ15_ylyXNS8h9Xkta93lYMSctJEzV0l_lNO4B-uVEn3xtMRUvGSHUYSxLZYOJzl3qruFDHSImkFvSdryHL3s-ellgIqxH9Pb0HNUhOQxa2D6hbHZiYbTEbEw9GhQWjU3nZNrIvRR1gzqyiAEYer-6vWvAgNMkmOprFLzDqg9Jz_ZCGzxLkUoEJPPFpGs-DUPYf7aXvT649bB5scz-qwEGKZAmjtObbrO7AiXCqv_4d_wTDnv9Yj9zvXSpXSHPqP83dbOoiVSgF8SmbM1GWTjDKX_vXVOT9TqFr7Tobt2crmOHLR6JGHb6owhS1tTq7yoG_oegDkX3UXWEZRIPC9dGzgWae-Danb6pAPcPcuD)** In the late 1960s, radicals who scorned America and its founding principles began moving into our colleges and universities. It took them several decades to cement their dominance, but we see the fruits of their labors today: we see it in the media, and we see it in Silicon Valley. We also see it in professional sports, in corporate America--much of which is now capitulating to far-Left demands--and increasingly, we see it in K-12 education. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I always tell people there is a way to fight this threat, despite how uphill the fight may seem.** A vital part of the fight--and one in which Hillsdale College is uniquely able to lead--is to **reach** and **teach** additional millions of citizens with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty.** ** As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulation. But it also means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **NATIONAL SURVEY ON THE THREAT OF BIG TECH** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/big-tech-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=27a44ea73ebf465d84f6c360b861b6ec&_e=_o_AM6R68k7oe7PpFB6dFzHfJ15_ylyXNS8h9Xkta93lYMSctJEzV0l_lNO4B-uVEn3xtMRUvGSHUYSxLZYOJzl3qruFDHSImkFvSdryHL3s-ellgIqxH9Pb0HNUhOQxa2D6hbHZiYbTEbEw9GhQWjU3nZNrIvRR1gzqyiAEYer-6vWvAgNMkmOprFLzDqg9Jz_ZCGzxLkUoEJPPFpGs-Ir7WQs-bDVgiTSXnReaw9L7Wp_Pv5zvF0V791QCM-7-thy3GRBqZiv7vhQHjVLB6A-QBMIB6TeAyEKSeqsVlYXK1uS0qdLrEk_RXNe5crCdcApGAZDAT491AyFmzfyeYDgsbhN-zCYYjw_Blkn8i657lDMNza7J7dL76m-1-i_z)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I deeply appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. America is at a point where the far-Left, with the help of its media and Big Tech allies, is **openly suppressing** conservative speech and political activity, **denying** First Amendment rights to their political opponents--and **denying access** to conservative opinion and important news stories to the American people. Please help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans on this issue by completing the **NATIONAL SURVEY ON THE THREAT OF BIG TECH **using the secure link I've provided for you below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/big-tech-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=27a44ea73ebf465d84f6c360b861b6ec&_e=_o_AM6R68k7oe7PpFB6dFzHfJ15_ylyXNS8h9Xkta93lYMSctJEzV0l_lNO4B-uVEn3xtMRUvGSHUYSxLZYOJzl3qruFDHSImkFvSdryHL3s-ellgIqxH9Pb0HNUhOQxa2D6hbHZiYbTEbEw9GhQWjU3nZNrIvRR1gzqyiAEYer-6vWvAgNMkmOprFLzDqg9Jz_ZCGzxLkUoEJPPFpGs-DS9An0KSiyGQt9pzVhD1uKdAX-qmncuUO9tpylk56i1KSZuV-6qHSHlCsMLI1esX_N_EOR7EJWwxR3ypu3V-130Vt0HvokCsbw44c5GENGMNYNdjdZh_MFtNdwNfKl3Rk-PSZR_NYWsszjKgGrYg6Fb811VmkhK6B3UopZx61Pu)** Your answers will help strengthen our educational outreach efforts that **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about our nation's great heritage of liberty--and about the duty of each generation to defend liberty and pass it on to their children and grandchildren. |

| Reclaiming American Freedom
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Sen. Jacky Rosen
subject: Please, friend: Add your name to stand up for background checks >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
We must take immediate action
| | |
---
Friend – the surge in mass shootings we've seen nationwide has made one thing painfully clear: We must take immediate action toward ending our gun violence epidemic.
**That’s why I am fighting in the Senate to close loopholes and require background checks on unlicensed firearm sales, including those made online or at gun shows, keeping guns out of dangerous hands and saving lives. This is just common sense.**
Although more than 90% of Americans support comprehensive background checks, current federal law _does not_ require unlicensed sellers to conduct them before transferring a firearm. But I know we can change that.
Expanding background checks would be a critical step forward in combating the senseless gun violence that has devastated families and communities across Nevada and the country. This campaign is about fighting for what matters to Nevadans and I want your input. **I believe we need meaningful progress on gun safety reform, but I want to know that you're with me, friend.**

**I'm looking for 10,000 supporters to stand up for universal background checks by midnight tonight – but time is running out, and I'm still missing your signature. This campaign is about listening to what you have to say. Your input is critical to our strategy. So please:**
**[Will you add your name right now to confirm your support for expanding background checks and saving lives from gun violence?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60612033/397668354/465636819?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk2385-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGNlMjdhMy04OGM5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YLDYRp8ChFTUpOeJW-uBWfDrluZ5Wb-79PUaPZZBHHw=&emci=71367a07-4fbf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=48ce27a3-88c9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=3800590)**

subject: The Sneaky IRS Tax Law to "Opt Out" of Bank Failures
body:
The recent string of bank failures has millions of Americans second guessing

| **_The Sneaky IRS Tax Law to "Opt Out" of Bank Failures_** **Big Banks Don't Want You to Know About the Opportunity this IRS "Cheat Code" Unlocks... That Isn't Stopping It From Sweeping the U.S...** Big banks and the IRS want you to think, the only way to secure your savings and retirement is to keep your cash in an FDIC insured account or load up on stocks. The recent string of bank failures has millions of Americans second guessing this approach, especially for their hard-earned nest egg in an IRA or 401(k). But, **_you have options_**. Did you know that you can move your retirement savings out of cash or stocks, and KEEP your tax-advantaged status? **Have you heard about Section 408(m)(3)?** It's a little-known cousin of Section 401(k) of IRS code. I like to call it the "cheat code" that **unlocks investments** you simply can't find on Wall Street. Here's what I mean... Section 408(m)(3) lets you open a Precious Metals "Self Directed" IRA and put REAL gold and silver into a tax-advantaged account. Here are three good reasons to consider this IRS "cheat code"... **#1:** Gold protects against stock crashes. **#2:** Unlike savings in a bank account, gold is not susceptible to bank failures. **#3:** If something catastrophic happens to the dollar, gold can be used as currency around the world. **While you still can:** Get a no-cost info kit on gold, and the IRS "Cheat Code" to legally move your IRA or 401(k) to precious metals - with NO tax consequences. disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
This is NOT a threat to be taken lightly.

This is NOT a threat to be taken lightly. DC is a FAR LEFT stronghold. Should it become a state, it would PERMANENTLY give Democrats two more far left Senators that they could use to transform America BEYOND RECOGNITION.

name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: Stop Spending - Reduce Government
body:
|
---
| | |
---
| [**Email the Governor, Speaker and Lt. Governor tell them to Stop Spending - Reduce Government**](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/3qMfCODiW2AMUR8HeTUDxA) Your Mississippi legislature is quickly approaching the end of the 2023 session. Over the past three months, we've witnessed just how dysfunctional government can be. We have seen politicians break promises and we witnessed firsthand the lack of principle and character that plagues our state government. But the Mississippi Freedom Caucus has also witnessed the resilience and power of the hard-working conservative people of our state. You have raised your voice several times and demanded your representatives stick to the principles and values you elected them to uphold, and they have listened. Next week I plan to outline for you the wins and losses of the 2023 session, but today we must focus on how the state budget is set for the next fiscal year. Appropriation bills lay out how your money is spent by your government. These are the bills that determine the budget for the Department of Education, Department of Transportation, or any of the government agencies that live off your money. Until this week, most appropriation bills were passed with “dummy” numbers. These are numbers that are simply placeholders, because the system that has been developed is a system designed to circumvent the constitutional deadlines that are meant to protect you from the politicians' desire to hide how they are spending your money. These “dummy” bills were passed by the House and the Senate and are now “in conference.” This means that the only elected officials who have any direct input into how much money each agency gets are Senate and House leadership. These “leaders” must derive a final budget number. Most of this work is completed by real people, not politicians, who are hired to project how much money or revenue the state will have for the next year. Once they come up with that number, they look at last year's budget and then equally distribute any increase or decrease among the various state agencies. Now it’s time for the politicians to get involved. At this point in the process, the leadership must make decisions. Will they stay with the numbers provided by the Legislative Budget Office, LBO, or will they increase or decrease those numbers? For the next fiscal year 2024, LBO has recommended that agencies receive an increase of approximately 3% based on their projections of how much money the state can take from you. [**Email the Governor, Speaker and Lt. Governor - Stop Spending - Reduce Government**](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/3qMfCODiW2AMUR8HeTUDxA) The House position, led by Speaker Philip Gunn, is that we should follow LBO's recommendations and only increase spending by approximately 3%. This will produce a final budget of approximately $7.2 billion. While I would prefer we reduce the size of government and actually cut many of these agencies, this position is significantly better than that of the Senate. The Senate's position, led by Lt. Gov. Delbert Hosemann, is that we should increase spending by almost half a billion dollars over the increases suggested by the Legislative Budget Office. This means Mississippi will be spending your money like a drunken sailor on shore leave and will put the nail in the coffin for any future elimination of the state income tax on working Mississippians. Hosemann is doing nothing more than using your money in an attempt to buy votes for his next election. It is time for you to speak up one more time. We need to let Philip Gunn know that we support his position to limit the growth of the government and tell Lt. Gov. Hosemann that we do not appreciate his careless and reckless liberal spending. [Email the Governor, Speaker and Lt. Governor tell them to Stop Spending - Reduce Government](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/3qMfCODiW2AMUR8HeTUDxA)
---
| |
---
The Mississippi Freedom Caucus is the only group of legislators who fight every day for your rights and freedom. Please join us in this fight by making a donation.
Your support is vital to our success.
| | [Donate Today! We need your support. ](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/i_WC-dG4TMfgtpFuj1czmQ)
---

Click [here](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/PH-9IFNj7y3jwhxC_wtwmA) to unsubscribe from this mailing list.

---

name: Stephen Miller (America First Legal)
subject: NEW Explosive Revelations on Biden Corruption
body:
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62471733:67kAeBGBN:m:1:3365131770:FC5861C723374139D8AC02FD8BBEC213:r)
---
Fellow Patriot, I have breaking news to share with you... My team at America First Legal just released our second batch of **Biden Documents** that the federal government attempted to keep hidden until we forced their release with our aggressive litigation and investigatory tactics. [**_Support us now to help expose Biden corruption_ >>>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62471733:67kAeBGBN:m:1:3365131770:FC5861C723374139D8AC02FD8BBEC213:r) This **second trove of shocking documents** confirms there was effectively no daylight between Joe Biden and Hunter Biden regarding the Biden family's business dealings in Ukraine. But there is more. **These never-before-seen records and emails contain more explosive revelations** , _including:_ **#1 -** Then Vice President Biden personally signed off on the statement given in response to reporters about whether Hunter's appointment to **Burisma** undermines the Vice President's credibility in pushing anti-corruption measures in the Ukraine; **#2 -** The Office of the Vice President connected reporters writing about Hunter's appointment to**Burisma** to Amos Hochstein, a trusted Biden advisor who was then the "point person" for International Energy Affairs at the U.S. Department of State, to provide a "unique and valuable perspective" on the relationships in Ukraine; **#3 -** The Office of the Vice President coordinated closely with Hunter Biden's notorious firm **Rosemont Seneca Advisors** (the firm has been prominently involved in Hunter Biden's various international business dealings, which Joe Biden has claimed to know nothing about) in response to press inquiries; **#4 -** U.S. Ambassador to Ukraine, Marie L. Yovanovitch, reported _- to the Department of State's Victoria Nuland, Anna Makanju in Vice President Biden's Office, and the National Security Counsel's Eric Ciaramella-_**that "this time there are accusations that Burisma allegedly had a subsidiary dump natural gas as a way to pay bribes" and "mentions that Hunter Biden and former Polish President Kwasniewski are on the Burisma board."** Taken together with the Oversight Committee's revelations about the Biden Family finances, **it is now _indisputable_ that there is a need for a full criminal investigation** into the Bidens' foreign influence peddling and exotic foreign financial payoffs. We now have the evidence in plain sight. _This can be ignored no longer!_
| [**HELP EXPOSE BIDEN >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62471733:67kAeBGBN:m:1:3365131770:FC5861C723374139D8AC02FD8BBEC213:r)
---
This is yet another example of how our hard work at America First Legal is paying off and getting results for _YOU_ , the American People. [**Please make a generous and urgently needed donation now to help my team continue the fight and expose Biden 's corruption in a court of law. ****_Please help us continue the investigation right now >> _****_ _**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62471733:67kAeBGBN:m:1:3365131770:FC5861C723374139D8AC02FD8BBEC213:r) _With deep gratitude for your continuously brave support,_ Stephen Miller President, America First Legal
|
---
Note: This hard evidence which shows the intertwinement of Hunter Biden's foreign dealings with then Vice President Joe Biden, _including proof that people inside Biden's Vice Presidential Office knew about and were worried about Biden's Burisma_ _dealings_ would not have been discovered without our lawsuits.**
| [**DONATE HERE**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62471733:67kAeBGBN:m:1:3365131770:FC5861C723374139D8AC02FD8BBEC213:r)
---

Can I count on you to join the fight for the truth? Click below to donate. Thank you, Brent Bozell Founder and President of MRC The mission of the Media Research Center is to create a media culture in America where truth and liberty flourish. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Impulsive decisions are out of character for me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18915?t=1001&akid=3083%2E346206%2E1iqm58 ][IMG]
Peter,

Impulsive, emotional decisions are out of character for me.

I am the guy who had a four-year plan to get into Harvard even though my
family was dirt poor.

So I thought long and hard about the decision to run for the United States
Senate.

I prepared for it long before the possibility of Senator Sinema’s party
switch.

I came to the conclusion that as a Marine, a Latino, and someone with a
record of standing up for working people, we can build a coalition that
can win a 2-way race, 3-way race, 27-way race... doesn’t matter.

The only open question was whether the grassroots support would be there.
And I thought it would be. So far, I’ve been right.

So I am asking:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18915?t=1002&akid=3083%2E346206%2E1iqm58 ]Can you please use this link to split $5, $10 or whatever you can
afford between Charles Booker and my campaign? The amount isn’t as
important as the donation, because it all adds up when we’re all chipping
in. So please.

CHIP IN →

Thank you, and adiós,

Ruben

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230323-3083-footer&t=1003&refcode2=3083_346206_1iqm58&akid=3083%2E346206%2E1iqm58

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3083%2E346206%2E1iqm58

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Government regulations are, in fact, a good thing.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Let me explain why I’m comparing banks to toasters. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60619064/397694783/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ12H_FIN_E_20230323_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTI1MGFjMS05YWM5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7GkxSTX72c5-cOIonWPOMOal2q3rIPdhDESsW-6VbbA=&emci=91ddd3a0-96c9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=4a250ac1-9ac9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=9027908)
---
Have you ever thought about how you don’t need to be an appliance expert to know which toasters are safe to buy? That’s thanks to government regulations. And in the same vein, you shouldn’t need to be a banking expert to know which banks are safe to put your money in. Let me back up a bit and explain why I’m comparing banks to toasters. When I was a young mom, toaster ovens had an on-off switch, and that was it. They could too easily start fires and burn down families’ houses. Then along came a federal agency, the Consumer Product Safety Commission, which stepped in and said manufacturers had to add features like a timer and automatic shut-off. This simple change made toasters a whole lot safer. Thirty years later, while working on an article about how the government could protect consumers from predatory financial companies, I thought about those old toaster ovens. By then, it was all but impossible to buy a toaster that had a one-in-five chance of exploding. A government agency monitored toasters for basic safety, just like the government kept lead paint out of children’s toys and rat poison out of medicine. But it was possible to refinance a home with a mortgage that had a one-in-five chance of costing a family their home and putting them out on the street. In fact, it wasn’t just possible: Those mortgages were wreaking havoc all over the country. I had a plan for how we could change the rules with a structural fix: A new government agency whose sole mission was to look out for consumers. They could serve as the watchdog to make sure that financial companies followed some clear, commonsense rules. No tricks hidden in the fine print, no traps buried in complex legalese. Then the crash of 2008 happened. Millions of people lost their jobs, their homes, and their savings. And maybe one of the most galling parts was that the Wall Street megabanks whose recklessness helped crash the economy weren't ashamed. Nope. Just the opposite. The plan didn’t seem so pie-in-the-sky anymore. So we got organized and started fighting for the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau. Of course, the giant financial institutions were dead set against an agency whose job was to get the tricks and traps out of the fine print of financial products. They spent millions lobbying against financial reform and the new consumer agency. It was David-versus-Goliath all the way. But we won. The CFPB transformed the market for financial services by placing new rules on mortgages, credit cards, checking accounts, prepaid cards, and payday loans to clean up some of the most predatory practices and knock bad actors out of the industry altogether. And since it’s been created, this little agency has returned about $16 billion to American consumers who’ve been cheated. The CFPB is just one example of how government regulations are — in fact — a good thing. For toasters, and for financial institutions like Silicon Valley Bank handling over $50 billion in assets. Now, of course special interests keep trying to roll back regulations and strangle the CFPB. Of course they don’t want anyone looking over their shoulder as they cheat people. Of course they’d rather have free rein to boost their profits by putting our whole economy at risk. But they don’t get the last word. I’m fighting back for the protections that Americans need — and I’m grateful you’re in this fight by my side. clean_body: Let me explain why I’m comparing banks to toasters. | | | Have you ever thought about how you don’t need to be an appliance expert to know which toasters are safe to buy? That’s thanks to government regulations. And in the same vein, you shouldn’t need to be a banking expert to know which banks are safe to put your money in. Let me back up a bit and explain why I’m comparing banks to toasters. When I was a young mom, toaster ovens had an on-off switch, and that was it. They could too easily start fires and burn down families’ houses. Then along came a federal agency, the Consumer Product Safety Commission, which stepped in and said manufacturers had to add features like a timer and automatic shut-off. This simple change made toasters a whole lot safer. Thirty years later, while working on an article about how the government could protect consumers from predatory financial companies, I thought about those old toaster ovens. By then, it was all but impossible to buy a toaster that had a one-in-five chance of exploding. A government agency monitored toasters for basic safety, just like the government kept lead paint out of children’s toys and rat poison out of medicine. But it was possible to refinance a home with a mortgage that had a one-in-five chance of costing a family their home and putting them out on the street. In fact, it wasn’t just possible: Those mortgages were wreaking havoc all over the country. I had a plan for how we could change the rules with a structural fix: A new government agency whose sole mission was to look out for consumers. They could serve as the watchdog to make sure that financial companies followed some clear, commonsense rules. No tricks hidden in the fine print, no traps buried in complex legalese. Then the crash of 2008 happened. Millions of people lost their jobs, their homes, and their savings. And maybe one of the most galling parts was that the Wall Street megabanks whose recklessness helped crash the economy weren't ashamed. Nope. Just the opposite. The plan didn’t seem so pie-in-the-sky anymore. So we got organized and started fighting for the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau. The CFPB transformed the market for financial services by placing new rules on mortgages, credit cards, checking accounts, prepaid cards, and payday loans to clean up some of the most predatory practices and knock bad actors out of the industry altogether. And since it’s been created, this little agency has returned about $16 billion to American consumers who’ve been cheated. The CFPB is just one example of how government regulations are — in fact — a good thing. For toasters, and for financial institutions like Silicon Valley Bank handling over $50 billion in assets. Now, of course special interests keep trying to roll back regulations and strangle the CFPB. Of course they don’t want anyone looking over their shoulder as they cheat people. Of course they’d rather have free rein to boost their profits by putting our whole economy at risk. But they don’t get the last word. subject: BREAKING — Democrats are politicizing justice (again)

This isn't only an attack on President Trump. It's an assault on American Justice.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znq3f47cvga3kh7cpr8us2ipumnenqgn1j7is8oo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4slie0o76clh2bs)

Friend,

BREAKING -- Democrats are politicizing justice as they plan to arrest Trump.

_But what the media won 't tell you is that Hillary Clinton and Barack Obama simply paid fines when they committed campaign violations. _

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsv1476bv01kgf0d6k9k1un5heejc77t5qed8g2o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4slie0o76clh2bs)

This isn't only an attack on President Trump. It's an assault on American Justice. If they can do this to President Trump, then they will do it to you next, Friend.

That's why the Media Research Center (MRC) set a goal to raise $30,000 in the next 24 hours to DEFEAT the radical, corrupt left-wing media.

**Defeat the Media**

Goal: $30,000
Supporter Status: PENDING

[_**Send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaf0ceose66ajv486hn176lsilcdvusfhbet5q5o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4slie0o76clh2bs)

The media seems to have forgotten that Hillary funded the Steel Dossier, **a political attack on Trump that made unsubstantiated claims that he colluded with Russia to win the presidency** , and only received a slap on the wrist for paying for it with campaign funds.

But the Media Research Center won't let them ignore the facts.

MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing agenda in the media and holding them accountable for their corruption and lies.

**When I founded the MRC in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the left-wing media. Since then, MRC has successfully SHATTERED America 's trust in the left-wing media -- over 90% of Americans state they DO NOT trust the media anymore. **

With your help, Friend, we can make sure the media doesn't get away with their lies.

**Here 's how MRC is exposing the left-wing media and holding them accountable for their rampant corruption: **

**FIRST:** The MRC monitors and clips videos of all content from major networks, social media accounts, and news outlets. They have over 800,000 hours of video stored on secure servers covering every nightly broadcast and more going back to 1987.

**SECOND:** My team and I analyze this content and identify fake news stories, lies, and media bias.

**THIRD:** MRC's team exposes these lies by forcing the media to report the story, sharing their reports on social media, and telling the truth. The Media Research Center also owns some of the largest social media pages in the conservative movement so that they can share these stories with supporters.

But we can't do this alone, Friend. Can I count on you to join the fight for the truth? **Click below to donate. **

Brent Bozell

body:
We need to hear from you!

|

---

Friend,

House Republicans have reached out multiple times, yet we still haven’t heard from you!

We wanted to reach out **ONE LAST TIME** and invite you to renew your 2023 sustaining membership. After today, you will be **REMOVED** from our membership roster.
**You’ve fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.**

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c653976%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3XvlvFWXmLCusmBbogKGWQ&sysid=1)
---

Renewing your membership is of critical importance to the future of the Republican party.

**Here’s why renewing your membership for 2023 is so important:**
1. You will be supporting conservatives across the country as they go on offense and bring the fight to the Radical Democrats.
2. You will be supporting our efforts to hold Joe Biden and the Radical Left accountable for their corruption and failures.
3. You will be an essential part of defending our majority and fighting for conservative values.

**[We can’t do it without you. Renew your membership before it’s too late](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c653977%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=a7AyYxVt3VppEDQOK1ON%2bA&sysid=1 "We can’t do it without

| | | This is getting ridiculous. Trump’s lackeys in Congress are using their (razor-thin) House majority to demand Manhattan District Attorney Alvin Bragg’s testimony and are trying to thwart his investigation into Trump’s hush money payment to Stormy Daniels. Trump is not above the law, no matter what Republicans in Congress may think. It’s past time for him to be held accountable for his (many) crimes and face charges. House Republicans should focus on protecting America – not Trump. [Sign our petition to Republicans in Congress: Stop trying to protect Trump!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2d8a141e-212e-4fb7-8fa1-721ef769abbc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

That's a bold statement I know, but I promise you, it's no exaggeration.
**[And it is because the Left is pushing so hard on so many fronts to corrupt our elections that I ask you to give your support to Judicial Watch with a special gift today.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62638&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)**
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62638&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

Since 2012, we've been filing lawsuits and winning victories in federal courts in states including **California, Florida, Indiana, Kentucky, North Carolina** and **Ohio** to preserve honest elections, which is so important _to preserving our constitutional republic in this time of crisis_.

I am proud of Judicial Watch's unique and essential work keeping our elections clean and honest, and _helping make certain that only eligible American citizens are allowed to vote_.

Looking ahead to a presidential election in 2024, you can be sure we are tightly focused on fighting back against the Left's _radical and reckless measures like_...
* Unsecured mail-in ballots using (often highly) inaccurate voter rolls

* Ballot harvesting

* Abolition of voter ID requirements

Our work is vitally important...and [it is _expensive_](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62638&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580).

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62638&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

Suing state governments, with their deep pockets and big legal budgets, is not only costly...it is time consuming. From start to finish, our election law litigation can take years. We always strive to squeeze the most out of our funds because we know that it is careful spending that keeps our clean election mission intact. _That 's very important_.

But we rely on the financial support of our most loyal and committed members like you to carry forward all our work.

Thanks to the commitment of our supporters, we will always find ways to confront corrupt politicians in both parties and Deep State bureaucrats who have contempt for the rule of law...especially our election laws.

[Your decision to to join with us today](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62638&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580) will make it easier for us to respond with full force to challenges to the rule of law we are facing today... _especially the radical Left 's efforts to subvert honest elections._

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62638&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

We are the national leader in protecting the integrity of our elections. And you have my personal pledge that with your renewed support, we will _continue_ to be the most effective independent and effective government watchdog in Washington.

**Your special gift today will also help us expose public corruption, fight for the people 's right to know and hold lawless politicians and unscrupulous public officials of both political parties accountable.**

You can be assured that your tax-deductible gift at this time will help advance all our investigative, educational and legal activities. _[So please donate today](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62638&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)_.

On behalf of all of us at Judicial Watch, I thank you in advance for joining our team in fighting for the rule of law!

Sincerely,

Thomas Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62638&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
