name: Aurora Regino
subject: I never thought in a million years it would happen to my family.
body:
| |
---
| | Peter, I never thought it would be me. I'd seen the news headlines and the crazy videos of activist teachers talking about how they indoctrinated students with ideas about sexuality and gender, against parents' wishes and behind their backs... But I never thought in a million years it would happen to my family. _And then it did._ My 11-year-old daughter went to the guidance counselor, after a death in our family, for help processing that loss. In a meeting that was supposed to help my daughter manage her grief, her guidance counselor convinced her to begin identifying as a boy at school. She went into that office as my daughter and left with a boy's name asking to be called a "he." It took just minutes. All of this was done without my knowledge - and even worse, the school told her to hide all of this from me. [**So, I 'm suing Chico Unified School District with the help of the Center for American Liberty - not for damages, or for emotional distress, but to put an end to its "Parental Secrecy Policy" that directs teachers and staff to hide a child's "social transition" from parents.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62472688:6Cu65BGJN:m:1:3365131770:74156D176DA1266281DFF499E40C3AB3:r) Because when we win this lawsuit, we'll set a precedent nationwide. My daughter might have wanted to tell me about her "new identity" right away - because I'm her mother, she trusts me, and she knows I love her unconditionally. **_But her guidance counselor discouraged her from talking to me about it._** She encouraged her to "come out" to her teachers, her peers - everyone but me. It was two months after the initial meeting by the time I found out what was going on, and it wasn't because the school notified me or because my daughter told me. It was because my daughter told my mother who then told me. And thankfully we were able to put an end to this. My daughter is doing well. She goes by the name I gave her, and knows she is a girl. But I know we were the lucky ones. I know that if the school had its way, my daughter might be on medications and thinking about dangerous surgeries, changing her body forever, putting her own health at risk. And in my state, they could've done all of it behind my back. But I'm not moving; I'm fighting back! Because the truth is, what starts in California never stays here. But I don't stand a chance without you. [**Will you make a generous, tax-deductible donation to my lawsuit today, and take a stand for American children and parental rights?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62472688:6Cu65BGJN:m:1:3365131770:74156D176DA1266281DFF499E40C3AB3:r) We're up against an evil unlike anything I've seen in my life - and it grows more powerful by the day. But the truth is on our side. When patriotic Americans come together, it doesn't matter who stands against us.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
| | Aurora Regino
---
| | [**DONATE**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62472688:6Cu65BGJN:m:1:3365131770:74156D176DA1266281DFF499E40C3AB3:r)
---
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62472688:6Cu65BGJN:m:1:3365131770:74156D176DA1266281DFF499E40C3AB3:r)

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: DOJ to prosecute up to 1,200 more peaceful protesters
body:
Joe Biden’s lawless Department of Justice plans to prosecute up to 1,200 more innocent January 6 patriots.

Joe Biden's lawless Department of Justice plans to prosecute up to 1,200 more innocent January 6 patriots. | | | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8b3chdd1tu94jk132s2qvo76rfgn7k8m9i63640_rp22sh2s8i66pr4slie2ob2cph2bs)
---
| |
---
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zdja3ibhb49s0c5uosbfuv52r4ctfn6j4703n3t0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4slie2ob2cph2bs)Dear Patriot,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, $250, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PEACEFUL PROTESTERS and GET THEM JUSTICE.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zaj7tesjtqo5806i2qmh8mr4cgd67bc0itebqnq0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4slie2ob2cph2bs)

I had to share this breaking news with you right away:

**Joe Biden 's lawless Department of Justice plans to prosecute up to 1,200 more innocent January 6 patriots. **

The Bloomberg news article opens with this headline:

** "DOJ Told Court to Expect a Deluge of New Jan. 6 Prosecutions" **

And it only gets worse from there:

** "The Oct. 28 letter from US Attorney Matthew Graves to Chief Judge Beryl Howell, which came as the department neared its 900th arrest, estimated an additional 700 to 1,200 defendants. That could roughly double the number of cases filed so far - with this month marking the 1,000th arrest, ** [**according to statistics**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zuvcqmnv18lfe2i3r7e9jtj2bhkfnsrjcl2vfj2g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4slie2ob2cph2bs "Click to view webpage.") **from the US attorney 's office."**

Judge Howell also steps down this week.

**His replacement for chief judge will be the total hack, Obama appointee Judge James E. Boasberg ...the judge who just forced retired NYPD officer and peaceful protester Sara Carpenter to go to court without evidence that could've cleared her of all charges. **

As I told you earlier this week, Sara was just found guilty on seven counts, and gets sentenced in July.

These new developments are deeply alarming.

**Because the DOJ is doubling down on railroading innocent Americans even though they KNOW that the "deadly insurrection" narrative is a LIE. **

The DOJ KNOWS:

✓ The protester known as Q Shaman was not only not violent, he was escorted peacefully by U.S. Capitol Police throughout the Capitol building,

✓ US Capitol Police officer Brain Sicknick was alive and on the job after he had been allegedly murdered by protesters with a fire extinguisher,

✓ Someone doctored video footage of the protest, and added in yells and screams to make the event seem scarier.

**Our beautiful country is in deep, deep trouble ...so are each of the January 6 peaceful ** **protesters I 'm fighting for, peacefully and legally.**

I beg you to keep standing with me and Freedom Watch during these critical fights.

[**Patriot, please continue your vital support with your best gift now of $25, $50, $100, $250, or more.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zkgc1319q6pqgmi797t2b1obh6d7ivm5d6869bc0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4slie2ob2cph2bs)

Everything is on the line.

**Please give what you can right away.**

Thank you for your prayers and financial support.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, the DOJ is doubling down on bullying innocent Americans.** And the incoming chief judge just forced a peaceful, retired police officer to go to court without vital evidence that could've cleared her of all charges - so now she's headed to prison.

**Please help me fight tooth and nail, peacefully and legally, for January 6 peaceful protesters with your very best gift of at least $25, $50, $100, $250, or more now.**

* * *
| Freedom Watch
2020 Pennsylvania Ave NW, Ste 345
Washington, DC 20006

---

American Briefing
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: What Kyrsten Sinema is saying will make your blood boil. 😡
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Sinema could remain an independent but caucus with the Republicans
#

Peter -
Please read these excerpts from an article this morning about Kyrsten Sinema “quite literally giving the middle finger to President Biden’s White House” and potential plans to caucus with Republicans.
[**Then contribute $3 to Ruben Gallego’s campaign TODAY — before our FEC deadline — to help replace her with a real Democrat - Ruben Gallego.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-mar23.PJzORo&refcode=em230323-1-30&t=1&akid=495%2E734936%2E3H9W98)
“As she races to stockpile campaign money and post an impressive, statement-making first-quarter fundraising number, **Sinema has used a series of Republican-dominated receptions and retreats this year to belittle her Democratic colleagues,** shower her GOP allies with praise and, in one case, **quite literally give the middle finger to President Biden’s White House.”**
...
“Sinema’s sniping spree has delighted the **Republican lawmakers, lobbyists and donors who’ve taken in the show, giving some of them hope that she can be convinced to caucus with the GOP.”**
...
**“One potential arrangement: Sinema could remain an independent but caucus with the Republicans** in exchange for a ceasefire in spending from the National Republican Senatorial Committee and McConnell’s Super PAC.”
...
[**Please contribute $3, or whatever you can afford today, to Ruben Gallego’s campaign for Senate. Help us file an FEC report with as many donations as we can possibly get.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-mar23.PJzORo&refcode=em230323-1-30&t=2&akid=495%2E734936%2E3H9W98)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1045?c0=ruben-em-mar23.stRXRp&refcode=em230323-1-30&t=21&akid=495%2E734936%2E3H9W98)**

Peter,

The statistics for gun violence in the United States are staggering.

In 2020, more than _**45,000 people were killed**_ by guns.

Guns are the leading cause of death for children under 18.

The US leads high-income nations in gun violence, making this a uniquely American crisis.

_**And yet gun violence prevention legislation is at a standstill.**_

**We are Stop Gun Violence PAC, and together, we can save lives.** Please join us and millions of violence prevention champions in our efforts to stop gun violence in America.

Change can happen at the ballot box. That’s why we’re recruiting and investing over _**$1 million**_ to gun violence prevention champions up and down the ballot in our inaugural cycle.

But this movement needs all of us. [_**Will you sign your name to demand life-saving gun legislation and join our fight to stop gun violence?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60609754/397660130/-1697482863?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGU5OWZjOTMtODRjOS1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2gIOEbat4D_2lrwOh2GNaDdJRg6AbPKZNp4UqQyhe6g=&emci=9310e9d4-64c7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=de99fc93-84c9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=7937656)

clean_body: We are Stop Gun Violence PAC, and together, we can save lives. | Stop Gun Violence PAC recruits and invests in candidates running for state and federal office who will stand up to the NRA and pass life-saving gun violence prevention laws. If you do not wish to receive emails about our critical movement, please . = | Peter, The statistics for gun violence in the United States are staggering. In 2020, more than 45,000 people were killed by guns. Guns are the leading cause of death for children under 18. The US leads high-income nations in gun violence, making this a uniquely American crisis. And yet gun violence prevention legislation is at a standstill. We are Stop Gun Violence PAC, and together, we can save lives. Please join us and millions of violence prevention champions in our efforts to stop gun violence in America. Change can happen at the ballot box. That’s why we’re recruiting and investing over $1 million to gun violence prevention champions up and down the ballot in our inaugural cycle. But this movement needs all of us. | Thanks for joining the fight. Together we can save lives from gun violence. We have less than 2 weeks to stop extremists.

Fellow Democrats,

Far-right extremists are waging an unhinged war against our educational system across the country. We all need to pay attention - because the local extremists are counting on voter apathy and low voter turnout to bring Florida values to Illinois.

**FIRST:** Florida Governor Ron DeSantis implemented chilling, radical, and wide-sweeping book ban laws that required school districts to investigate and decide on what books to ban individually.

**THEN:** **Hundreds of books were banned** from Florida schools, including dozens with LGBTQ+ themes, protagonists of color, or discussions of race and racism, and even classics such as Slaughterhouse-Five and The Handmaid's Tale.

**NOW:** DeSantis is trying to paint rigorous reporting on the book bans as a "hoax," going so far as claiming that the well-documented instances of entire classroom libraries being emptied **_simply did not happen_**.

**[Candidates looking to carry out similar book bans here in Illinois are on the ballot IN LESS THAN TWO WEEKS, and they have support from top Illinois Republicans like Darren Bailey. Can you pitch in $10 today to help us support the local candidates fighting to protect our schools from these radicals?](https://act.myngp.com/el/tDSLH8ZJZPgYLDfIfHvXoeTzD1FyUh7SBwbri1xW7n0=/WEKA4Rl4Iq-eQWp4cNGkVlhB_joKOVZREBHmaspdCxk=?refcode=EM_FR_230323Hoax_TEAM_90DO_7_NG_B_L1&amount=10)**

subject: FOX isn’t happy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
We found a way to get our ad on FOX without FOX even knowing.
#
Hey Derek,
We wanted to read you in on some of the details about our campaign to get lying FOX hosts banned on our Military bases.
We found a way to get our ad on FOX without FOX even knowing.
We bought time on the local cable systems that serve some of the largest Military bases, ensuring that our ad got on Military base TVs, during Tucker, Hannity and Ingraham’s shows.
And we’re not done. Not by a long shot.
We’re building up for our next ad buy now, because next time around we want to go even bigger. These advertisements cost about $140 a piece, every time they’re served.
So, if you can, how about this:
**[We’re asking for $20. $20 will buy 1/7th of a TV ad. If you’ve been waiting for the right time, $20 right now would pack a hell of a punch.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-mar23.Xt_ByJ&refcode=em230323-1-15-NOR&t=1&akid=7965%2E3013755%2EZj-NdP)

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: How the ACA got me into politics
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=71%2E135344%2Eq4UyR_)
Friend —
Today, March 23, is the day that the Affordable Care Act was passed into law 13 years ago. It’s an important day for me because the ACA – and indeed the vote to repeal it in 2017 – played a major role in motivating me to run for office in 2018. And it all goes back to my mom.
My mom passed away in 2011 from ovarian cancer. When she was originally diagnosed, she didn’t have health insurance – she had let it lapse a few months earlier. She had struggled to afford health insurance for years because, before the ACA, it was totally legal for insurance companies to charge more to people who happened to have a pre-existing condition. My mom had had breast cancer 30 years before, so her health insurance bill was her highest bill every single month. Higher than her rent.
My mom is also the reason that May 4, 2017 was an important date for me. That was the day the Republican House repealed the ACA.
I was sitting in my living room watching live CNN coverage of the Rose Garden ceremony President Trump held after the House vote. I caught sight of my then-Congressman, smiling and beaming with pride that he had just voted to repeal protections for people with pre-existing conditions.
That was it. Something inside of me broke. We decided that day we would fire him, and in November 2018, we did just that.
So today, it is particularly meaningful to celebrate the anniversary of the ACA's passage. Elections matter. Legislation matters. Hard work on big problems matters.
I’m running for Senate because no family should have to deal with a loved one’s illness at the same time they run this risk of bankruptcy. No family should have to choose between paying medical bills and covering other basics they need, like food or transportation.
[**So today, in honor of the anniversary of such a pivotal moment in my life, would you consider a donation to my campaign for Senate? I’m ready to get to work on these issues that affect all of our lives so concretely.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-mar23.udOA3N&refcode=em230323-1-30&t=2&akid=71%2E135344%2Eq4UyR_)

****
Thank you,
Elissa

East Lansing, MI 48826

name: Courier Newsroom
subject: Joe Rogan
body:
We must be doing something right.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=753%2E120351%2E-KMfuK)
Peter,
Courier Newsroom is getting attention from an unlikely source...
**Joe Rogan.**
In case you don’t know: Rogan’s podcast is one of the most popular in the country. Boosted by his rumored $200 million dollar deal with Spotify, his show regularly gets tens of millions of listeners per episode.
Rogan’s influence over his audience is powerful. His personal views, his guests, and his politics all have serious, real world implications.
You might remember last year’s firestorm over Rogan spreading misinformation about COVID. The controversy blew up when musician Neil Young took his music off of Spotify to protest Rogan’s questioning of the safety of vaccines and the (completely untrue) virtues of Ivermectin as cure for the virus.
**That’s why when we saw this clip of Rogan making fun of Courier’s mission to stop the spread of misinformation during a recent show, we weren’t the least bit surprised:**
[****](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3555?refcode=em-20230323&t=2&akid=753%2E120351%2E-KMfuK)
**[If Joe Rogan is threatened by us, we must be doing something right. If you believe in our mission to hold bad actors like Rogan accountable and stop the spread of bad information, will you chip in $5 today?](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3555?refcode=em-20230323&t=3&akid=753%2E120351%2E-KMfuK)**
**[Chip in $5 »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3555?refcode=em-20230323&t=4&akid=753%2E120351%2E-KMfuK)**
When it comes to the spread of misinformation, bad actors like Rogan are allergic to accountability. That’s what makes him so dangerous.
**Let’s be clear: Rogan’s attack isn’t an insult, it’s a sign that the momentum behind Courier Newsroom and our mission are gathering steam.**
Our local teams in 8 battleground states use quality, local reporting to combat the spread of disinformation in-real time. With your support, they can keep doing their jobs, growing their audiences, and expand their operations into communities and online spaces where factual, local journalism is non-existent.
[**We can win the fight against misinformation, but it’s going to take all of us pitching in and doing our part whenever we can. That’s why we’re setting a goal to raise $6,500 by midnight so we can hire more journalists, boost our stories, and grow our reach. Will you join us in the fight against bad information by chipping in $5?**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3555?refcode=em-20230323&t=5&akid=753%2E120351%2E-KMfuK)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3555?refcode=em-20230323&t=6&akid=753%2E120351%2E-KMfuK)**
Thank you,
The Courier Newsroom Team

**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=7&refcode2=753_120351_-KMfuK&akid=753%2E120351%2E-KMfuK)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=753%2E120351%2E-KMfuK)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

name: Vikram Mansharamani
subject: New Show - "Navigating Uncertainty"
body:
Podcast, radio show, great conversations...
| | | |
---
# New Show - Launched!
---
Last week, Dr. Vikram Mansharamani launched a radio show and podcast in partnership with The Pulse of New Hampshire. The show is called "Navigating Uncertainty" and weekly episodes will be released every Thursday via Apple Podcast, Spotify and everywhere podcasts are generally available!
(Several links below).
---
Here's a short description of the show:
Navigating Uncertainty is a show in which acclaimed global trend-watcher and futurist Vikram Mansharamani dives into how leaders make decisions. Through long-form conversations that move beyond sound-bites, Dr. Mansharamani explores how some of the most successful people think about tough choices. Serious, irreverent, entertaining, heart-warming, and occasionally tear-jerking, Navigating Uncertainty offers listeners bite-sized authentic biographies of high-impact leaders from all walks of life.

---
EPISODE 1: MIKE ROGERS
In the first episode, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Mike Rogers, former chair of the House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence, and former multi-term Congressman from Michigan. Mike served in the military and also fought organized crime as a member of the Federal Bureau of Investigation. He's a class act, a first-rate thinker, and a patriotic American who cares deeply about the United States and its future.

---
EPISODE 2: GENERAL LORI ROBINSON
In the second episode, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with General Lori Robinson, USAF (Ret), a New Hampshire native who served as the Commander of North American Aerospace Defense Command (NORAD). General Robinson was also America's first female Combatant Commander and served as head of Northern Command. She is an awesome leader, dedicated America who has served the United States for decades, and all around amazing person. She has also faced (and successfully navigated) many forms of uncertainty on her path to becoming a four-star general.
---

---

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5ca20d8d-945e-4f98-80bc-7314f8d08e08/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Katie Porter
subject: BS answers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
CEOs and my teenagers agree: I’m not one for BS answers
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=19859%2E3422442%2Er-MWiK)
We’re eight days out from our end of quarter deadline. And look, CEOs and my teenagers agree: I’m not one for BS answers. [**So here are the quick and honest reasons for why I’m asking for your $5 right now.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230323-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAF23_1_EOQ_20230323_V1_F&refcode2=19859_3422442_r-MWiK&akid=19859%2E3422442%2Er-MWiK)
**This end of quarter deadline will be the first time our Senate campaign is required to publicly report how much money we have raised since launching.**
* A strong number signals that I’m a serious competitor in this race.
* It can prevent super PACs from attacking me (let’s show them it’s not worth it!).
* There’s a saying—early money is like yeast, it helps the dough rise. Reporting a strong number can encourage others to join in.

**I’m running for Senate because we need someone to fight the battles of tomorrow, stand up to special interests, and “do Congress” in a way that connects with Americans—many of whom are disillusioned about whether our government can work for them.**
* But to get this message to voters, we need to build a robust campaign.
* Recent polling has me behind by two points, but I lead the race by 9 points in my home area of Orange County.
* The data shows that when voters of all persuasions hear from us, the message sticks. But we have to reach voters where they’re at, and you can help me do so.

**I’m the only Democrat in this race who has never taken a dime from corporate PACs.**
* I also reject all contributions from federal lobbyists and Big Bank, Big Oil, and Big Pharma CEOs.
* Our average donation is less than $30.
* One of our opponents started with three times the cash on hand we did, so we need to catch up.

Derek, I really need your help before March 31st. **[Can you make a donation of $5 or whatever makes sense for your budget today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230323-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAF23_1_EOQ_20230323_V1_F&refcode2=19859_3422442_r-MWiK&akid=19859%2E3422442%2Er-MWiK)**
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230323-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAF23_1_EOQ_20230323_V1_F&refcode2=19859_3422442_r-MWiK&akid=19859%2E3422442%2Er-MWiK)**
Thanks so much. I can’t do this without you!
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAF23_1_EOQ_20230323_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=19859_3422442_r-MWiK&akid=19859%2E3422442%2Er-MWiK)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=19859%2E3422442%2Er-MWiK)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=19859%2E3422442%2Er-MWiK)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

name: Lauren Underwood
subject: Black History Month and Women’s History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
#
---
Peter, Every day, especially during February’s Black History Month and March’s Women’s History Month, I’m reminded of the spirit, career and legacy of the late Shirley Chisholm, who taught me an invaluable lesson: _If you’re not invited to the table, you bring your own folding chair._ In 1968, Shirley Chisholm became the first African American woman to serve in Congress. And in 1972, she became the first woman and Black person from a major political party to seek nomination for president of the United States. She is remembered as she wished, “...as a woman ... who dared to be a catalyst of change.” When I was first elected in 2018, I became the youngest Black woman ever elected to Congress, almost 50 years to the day that Shirley Chisholm became the first Black woman ever elected to Congress. So during my speech on election night, I made a promise to my community and to myself that like Congresswoman Chisholm, I’d be “unbought and unbossed.” **At the beginning of my third term in Congress, I’m pleased to say that I’ve kept that promise. Since 2019, I’ve had 14 pieces of legislation signed into law — and I’m just getting started. For this term, I’m so proud to be the first Black woman elected to House Democratic leadership in over 30 years.** I don’t take this honor lightly. I’m humbled to have this opportunity to build on the progress we’ve made so far. The work ahead won’t be easy with the House majority in Republicans’ hands, but just like Congresswoman Chisholm, _I won’t give up_._I’ll continue bringing my folding chair to the halls of Congress._ I’ll continue to be unbossed and unbought, focused on helping elevate working families everywhere: for an economy where everyone has access to opportunity; for an end to the gun violence epidemic; and for every person’s right to quality, affordable health care. But none of my work is possible without your support. name: Sen. Chuck Schumer
subject: My friend Letitia James
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | |
---
Hi, Peter, it’s Sen. Schumer – and I need to be blunt for a second.

I’ve seen a lot of things during my time in office – but the GOP’s _constant_ attempts to rip more and more rights from vulnerable Americans are among the most _alarming_ I’ve seen yet.

From the crusade against voting rights to the latest attacks on reproductive freedom, MAGA extremists in Congress have made it clear that they’ll stop at _nothing_ to push forward their agenda. And, while my colleagues and I are working around the clock to defend our fundamental rights in the Senate, we need strong defenders of progress at the state level, as well, to fend off the GOP’s attacks.

**Peter, Letitia James is _exactly_ the kind of fearless fighter we need defending New York. That’s why I told her team that I would help them raise $10,000 before midnight tonight to help power her work, and I’m counting on _you_ ****to chip in.**

She has brought many of the most powerful and well-funded actors in our nation to justice, tackled the housing crisis that has spiraled in New York, and fought to make New York a safe haven for all those seeking reproductive care. And still, she’s not done fighting yet.

Peter, with MAGA extremists working to restrict abortion rights, gut Social Security and Medicare, and more, we _need_ a fearless fighter in office who refuses to bow, break, or be bullied. name: Jane Fonda
subject: Supporting Climate Champions!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Helen Gym
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-em-mar2023 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-em-mar2023]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/split-jfcp-gym [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/split-jfcp-gym]

Hi there, it’s Jane Fonda. I wanted to tell you a little bit about the Jane Fonda Climate PAC and why I’m supporting Helen Gym for Philadelphia Mayor. But first, will you make a split contribution between the Jane Fonda Climate PAC and Helen’s campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/split-jfcp-gym]

SPLIT A CONTRIBUTION [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/split-jfcp-gym]

The Jane Fonda Climate PAC is committed to supporting candidates who are dedicated to fighting climate change by acting on the science and hastening the end of the fossil fuel era before it's too late.

Big Oil continues to make billions in profits while polluting our atmosphere and poisoning our communities. Unfortunately, many elected leaders fail to take action due to the overwhelming influence fossil fuel money has on our political system.

This is why I established the Jane Fonda Climate PAC to help elect candidates like Helen.

Helen has consistently been a strong advocate for significant climate action and a municipal Green New Deal that transitions Philadelphia off fossil fuels. During her time on City Council, Helen always had an open-door policy with Philadelphia’s environmental justice advocacy community. She has a record of challenging Philadelphia Gas Works’ attempts to continue its reliance on fossil fuels and just last year, she went toe-to-toe with their CEO, challenging the utility’s support of a preemption effort that would limit the city’s ability to reach carbon neutrality by 2050. She also was the leading voice in City Council against the construction of a liquefied natural gas facility in Southwest Philadelphia.

So please, consider making a split contribution between the Jane Fonda Climate PAC and Helen today to send a resounding message that we won’t back down and show your support for climate champions! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/split-jfcp-gym]

SPLIT A CONTRIBUTION [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/split-jfcp-gym]

Let’s fight like hell to protect our home,

Jane Fonda
Helen Gym is a Philly mom, a school teacher, a community organizer, and former City Councilmember. She has been fighting for Philly families and communities for decades — winning more resources for our schools, safer communities, and a more affordable Philadelphia. Our efforts are supported by everyday people like you who give what they can, whenever they can, because they want to see a safer, more prosperous, equitable Philadelphia that works for all of us. If you’d like to donate to Helen and help elect her as Philadelphia’s next Mayor, click here:
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-em-feb2023]
Friends of Helen Gym
PO Box 11766
Philadelphia, PA 19101
United States
www.helengym.com [https://www.helengym.com/] | info@helengym.com [info@helengym.com]

clean_body: [] [] Hi there, it’s Jane Fonda. I wanted to tell you a little bit about the Jane Fonda Climate PAC and why I’m supporting Helen Gym for Philadelphia Mayor. But first, will you make a split contribution between the Jane Fonda Climate PAC and Helen’s campaign? [] SPLIT A CONTRIBUTION [] The Jane Fonda Climate PAC is committed to supporting candidates who are dedicated to fighting climate change by acting on the science and hastening the end of the fossil fuel era before it's too late. Big Oil continues to make billions in profits while polluting our atmosphere and poisoning our communities. Unfortunately, many elected leaders fail to take action due to the overwhelming influence fossil fuel money has on our political system. This is why I established the Jane Fonda Climate PAC to help elect candidates like Helen. Helen has consistently been a strong advocate for significant climate action and a municipal Green New Deal that transitions Philadelphia off fossil fuels. During her time on City Council, Helen always had an open-door policy with Philadelphia’s environmental justice advocacy community. She has a record of challenging Philadelphia Gas Works’ attempts to continue its reliance on fossil fuels and just last year, she went toe-to-toe with their CEO, challenging the utility’s support of a preemption effort that would limit the city’s ability to reach carbon neutrality by 2050. She also was the leading voice in City Council against the construction of a liquefied natural gas facility in Southwest Philadelphia. So please, consider making a split contribution between the Jane Fonda Climate PAC and Helen today to send a resounding message that we won’t back down and show your support for climate champions! [] SPLIT A CONTRIBUTION [] Let’s fight like hell to protect our home, Jane Fonda Helen Gym is a Philly mom, a school teacher, a community organizer, and former City Councilmember. She has been fighting for Philly families and communities for decades — winning more resources for our schools, safer communities, and a more affordable Philadelphia. Our efforts are supported by everyday people like you who give what they can, whenever they can, because they want to see a safer, more prosperous, equitable Philadelphia that works for all of us. If you’d like to donate to Helen and help elect her as Philadelphia’s next Mayor, click here: DONATE [] Friends of Helen Gym PO Box 11766 Philadelphia, PA 19101 United States www.helengym.com [] | info@helengym.com [info@helengym.com] Paid for by Friends of Helen Gym

body:
| [ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60615224/397680859/390144955?source=DS_EM_PT_90DO_230323_1_1&refcode2=5819e14b-91c9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&contactdata=oNiYAmoWFZOt2+Assny4YBCEbLzaeqOGoGT3lyGEHVEZTRrDXmLzd2RBHbJGFrm9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwNzg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU4MTllMTRiLTkxYzktZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4ULlb8A04g2p9BCyM-QnudEexpkt1i-ij3Zj0yp0vZg=)
---
**NEWS: House Republicans have introduced the so-called “Parents Bill of Rights” Act, an attack on education and freedom.**

Don’t be fooled by the name: this is a far-right effort to censor the truth and stop our students from learning about our history – and it’s modeled after extreme legislation passed by Ron DeSantis in Florida.

**Republicans want to pass this bill so they can censor American history, block our kids from learning the truth, and stop any efforts to support LGBTQ+ students. We can’t let them.**

[Add your name to denounce this GOP effort to bring censorship to our classrooms!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60615225/397680860/-1980009887?source=DS_EM_PT_90DO_230323_1_1&refcode2=5819e14b-91c9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&contactdata=oNiYAmoWFZOt2+Assny4YBCEbLzaeqOGoGT3lyGEHVEZTRrDXmLzd2RBHbJGFrm9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwNzg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU4MTllMTRiLTkxYzktZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4ULlb8A04g2p9BCyM-QnudEexpkt1i-ij3Zj0yp0vZg=&emci=3218d1b7-e2c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=5819e14b-91c9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=10067282)

---

This bill will have dangerous impacts. It’s meant to scare educators into submission and includes specific language to discriminate against LGBTQ+ students.

That’s why Marjorie Taylor Greene and Lauren Boebert are leading the fight to pass this legislation as part of their shameful agenda.

In total, **over 100 Republicans have signed on to this bill – _including GOP members from key swing districts that Democrats can flip_** to regain control of the House and put a stop to these attacks.

[Let’s send them a message: Any efforts to censor the truth and attack public education will not be tolerated.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60615227/397680862/-1980009887?source=DS_EM_PT_90DO_230323_1_1&refcode2=5819e14b-91c9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&contactdata=oNiYAmoWFZOt2+Assny4YBCEbLzaeqOGoGT3lyGEHVEZTRrDXmLzd2RBHbJGFrm9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwNzg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU4MTllMTRiLTkxYzktZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4ULlb8A04g2p9BCyM-QnudEexpkt1i-ij3Zj0yp0vZg=&emci=3218d1b7-e2c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=5819e14b-91c9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=10067282)

Thanks for making your voice heard,

Brett Broesder
Democrats Serve

Democratic candidates with professional experience serving their communities in government have a pragmatic approach to governing and know how to get things done, making for strong narratives and an ability to connect with voters uniquely.

subject: Together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carlina 2023
body:
I'm a proud progressive, fighting for a better future for the working families of Lower Manhattan. | | | | [ ](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=0747b71271&e=2de202398d)
---
| Peter --

There are some things that are non-negotiable for me. I'll never prioritize developers' needs over our need for more affordable housing. I'll never take money away from working New Yorkers in order to give breaks to billionaires and special interests. And I'll never, ever jeopardize the health of my community, from fighting for environmental justice to defending reproductive rights.

But for many politicians, that makes me an exception -- and it shouldn't be that way.

I'm a proud progressive, fighting for a better future for the working families of Lower Manhattan. And I'm proud to stand with so many other progressives in championing the values that will make New York City a better place to live.

[**_But this movement only works if we all stand together. That's why I'm asking if you can chip in today to keep me fighting for a future we all believe in._**](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=9ad3d9c669&e=2de202398d)

| Progress never comes easy -- but I know that together we can deliver.**_ [Are you with me?](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=e98ec9c89e&e=2de202398d)_**

Best,
Carlina

name: Team Ro
subject: The most important election you’ve never heard about
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
On April 4, Wisconsinites will vote to fill an open seat on the state Supreme Court.
#
Friend,
**On April 4, Wisconsinites will vote to fill an open seat on the state Supreme Court** —in an election that will determine whether that body will have a progressive or far-right majority until 2025. This race could shape decisions on voting rights, election subversion, legislative district lines, and so much more—and could have a larger effect on the 2024 presidential race than any other contest in the country this year.
[**That’s why I’m asking for your help. Will you rush in a donation of any amount to help WisDems win in April?**](https://act.rokhanna.com/go/11313?t=6&akid=2658%2E946728%2EPyzHtb)
Over these last two presidential cycles, the Wisconsin Supreme Court has played an outsized role in shaping the electoral playing field and the powers of government in ways that have usually systematically advantaged Republicans.
Just two years ago, in 2020, Donald Trump asked the Wisconsin Supreme Court to illegally throw out tens of thousands of votes in Wisconsin’s most Democratic-leaning areas. Thankfully, his lawsuit failed, but only by a slim 4-3 margin. If we can rebalance the Court, we are more likely to stop these brazen attacks on our democracy in their tracks.
**With a right-wing justice retiring, April 4th represents a chance to flip an open seat** —which could lead to a majority ready to consider cases on new state legislative maps, voting rights, Wisconsin’s 1849 abortion ban, and otherwise examine cases based on the law rather than ideology.
The Democratic Party of Wisconsin is fully behind Judge Janet Protasiewicz, the progressive candidate in this race. **This is the most consequential state Supreme Court race in Wisconsin history** , so we need to generate all the support we can to flip this seat in April.
[**Will you help the Wisconsin Democrats Get Out The Vote by donating what you can today?**](https://act.rokhanna.com/go/11313?t=7&akid=2658%2E946728%2EPyzHtb)
In solidarity,
Ro

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ro-em-footer?refcode=em20230323-2658-footer&t=8&refcode2=2658_946728_PyzHtb&akid=2658%2E946728%2EPyzHtb)**
---
[](https://facebook.com/RoKhannaUSA) | [](https://twitter.com/RoKhanna)
Email us: [info@rokhanna.com](mailto: info@rokhanna.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Ro for Congress, PO Box 3513, Santa Clara, CA 95051.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.rokhanna.com/signup/fewer_emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.rokhanna.com/signup/update-your-information/?t=9&akid=2658%2E946728%2EPyzHtb)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.rokhanna.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=2658%2E946728%2EPyzHtb)

---
Peter – did you see this? clean_body: Now I’m a target | Friend, I went on Fox & Friends to give an update. I wanted to make sure that you saw it. Reps. NOW: The Left wants me GONE for standing up to their minions. I knew this would happen and still, I’m not backing down. But after last year’s gerrymandering, the district that I represent in Congress is one of America’s most competitive toss-ups and I’m worried we won’t reach our End-of-Quarter goal and have the means to fight back against the barrage of attacks from the Left. Time is short so I’m asking you to please hurry and stand with me as I lead the fight against progressive district attorneys. We need to be ready for anything the Left throws at me as they try to flip this toss-up district Blue. Thank you, Rep. name: =?utf-8?Q?Nathaniel=20Moran?=
subject: The Moran Minuteman: The March Minuteman, 120 Bills, and More
disclaimer_text: paid for by Nathaniel Moran for Congress
body:
I am honored to represent you and our shared conservative values each and every day. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/nathanielmoran/minuteman-march?e=bbce4dd6ad)
---
| | |
---
| | |
# Welcome to the March edition of **The Moran Minuteman**.
This monthly newsletter is our way of recognizing extraordinary efforts in Texas Congressional District 1 and providing an inside look into what happens behind the scenes in the life of a Congressman. Everyday when I enter the Capitol Washington, DC, instead of using the tunnels to get to my office I come straight up the public steps. This is a small reminder that this office doesn’t belong to me but to the people of East Texas. I am honored to represent you and our shared conservative values each and every day.
---
|
## Congratulations to our First Minuteman - The Late Johnny Horne
When I think of East Texans, I think of the [Minutemen of the Revolutionary War](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=e098a805ce&e=bbce4dd6ad). Loyal to country and community, dependable, selfless, and ready at a moment’s notice, the Minutemen were American heroes who helped turn the tide of the Revolutionary War. **Today’s East Texans reflect those traits.** You are patriotic, dependable, and deeply committed to making our communities better.
---
|
---
Photo credit: [Marshall News Messenger](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=12cb45934a&e=bbce4dd6ad).
| Each month, I plan to recognize an East Texan who has gone above and beyond in serving our region - someone who epitomizes the identity of a Minuteman. In addition to recognition in the monthly newsletter, we will send the person a Moran Minuteman t-shirt. **This month’s Minuteman, the Late Johnny Horne, owned and operated Cajun Tex restaurant in Marshall.** According to Elizabeth Cook, who nominated him, **Johnny would stop and help anyone at a moment’s notice. He was known to build wheelchair ramps and donate to local causes and fundraisers anytime there was a need**. I only met Johnny briefly when we stopped at his restaurant, but I can say he was friendly, and, of course, served delicious food. I recently visited Johnny’s wife, Mrs. Donna Horne, to give her the news.

We had a great conversation, and we look forward to returning soon to give her a Minuteman gift in Johnny’s memory.
---
|
---
| _“We want Johnny's life to be remembered by how he lived and how he loved. If there was a need, he met it. If there was a gap, he filled it. He had a huge heart that loved his community, and he wanted to help in all ways that he could. And the impact that he had on his community continues to reveal itself through old friends and new faces. We should all strive to live the Johnny Way," - _Donna Horne Do you know an East Texan who would be a great next recipient? Please submit their name **[here](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=58da9b9f9d&e=bbce4dd6ad). (**Be sure to give us your phone number so we can reach out with any questions we might have.) Our Moran Minuteman team will also be out and about serving at community events and in disaster relief efforts. Look for us, and we’ll toss you a t-shirt!
---
|
---
| [Nominate a Minuteman!](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=0334ba8090&e=bbce4dd6ad "Nominate a Minuteman!")
---
|
---
|
## Delivering on Promises
When I ran for Congress, I promised to take an East Texas work ethic to Washington, DC. Listen to this clip from a KTBB radio interview on March 7 to hear about a typical day as your elected voice for the First Congressional District.
---
| [ ](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=c5c7dc83e5&e=bbce4dd6ad "3/7 KTBB Interview with Congressman Moran")
---
| Please know I’m not complaining. It is the honor of a lifetime to represent East Texas in Congress. Thank you again for your continued support.
---
| Sincerely,
---
|
---
| Nathaniel Moran Congressman, First District of Texas
---
|
---
|
---
|
---

clean_body: We have 12 days to ensure we WIN. | Friend, This past week Judge Protasiewicz FINALLY joined Justice Kelly in the first and only debate between Supreme Court candidates before Election Day. Protasiewicz spent her time launching lies and attacks against Justice Kelly, accusing him of being a “threat to democracy.” But the only true threat to democracy and Wisconsin is Protasiewicz. With her plans to enact her radical liberal agenda and alter the legislative maps to unfairly give Democrats an advantage, we can’t afford to let her win this critical election. We have just 12 days left until Election Day and are counting on your continued support to help us defeat Protasiewicz. For most of the debate, she spent time saying she was dedicated to protecting public safety. Yet she has a history of letting violent criminals roam free, and while Wisconsin has seen a spike in crime, Protasiewicz claims that it’s “common sense” to release criminals back on the street. Considering the “defund the police” rhetoric and initiatives of Democrats over the past few years, it’s no surprise that “No Jail Janet” has a pro-criminal agenda. That’s because Protasiewicz is also bought and paid for by the Democratic Party of Wisconsin. She has openly told voters across the state how she would approach every potential case, allowing her personal politics and connections with the far-Left to outweigh the law. Failing to defend our conservative majority is not an option with a radical, pro-criminal judge ready to destroy our great state. Thank you, Wisconsin Republicans Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. www.wisgop.org 148 E Johnson Street, Madison, WI 53703

name: Grace Jo
subject: Fox News Segment: How I escaped North Korea
body:
The first time I tried to escape the regime, I was only 6 years old

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zts46a7brbonsv0s9u8jca3t74uqjrd5itmm46q8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdg68or6cth2bs)
Hello Friend,

Fox News recently invited me to appear and speak with Rachel Campos-Duffy about how I escaped North Korea.

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9ot4t3okaf0dm5ir41h750526enpum3s9gru5l8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdg68or6cth2bs)

_The first time I tried to escape the regime, I was only 6 years old as we fled over a mountain.**My mother even had to carry me in her backpack as she held my sister 's hand and swum across a river into China.**

But we were caught and sent back. This happened several times...

In North Korea, it is easy for the government to control everyone through starvation. From the moment I woke up to the moment I went to sleep, all I could think about was my next meal. That's all anyone could think about. _

That's only a small part of my story.

Thanks to the Dissident Project, I can share my story with students across the country. The Dissident Project provides high schools with informed, intelligent speakers with firsthand experience with authoritarianism, like me.

We provide this at no cost to the schools or students, which is why I am working to raise $5,000 this month.

[_**Friend, will you help fight authoritarianism with a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to rush your support >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z95eokdf0f4jv7dgng56slo1ubopj14qi7654c88_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdg68or6cth2bs)

**Socialism is the worse government in the world. It kills people.**

High school students need to hear about the horrors of socialism and how it takes away everything and everyone you love. They don't know what it feels like to lay there, starving. Or how the government will punish you for merely doing whatever you can to survive.

Many students today think socialism is fair and equitable. Without hearing about experiences like mine, they will never have the chance to know about the true horrors until it's too late.

**Freedom is very precious in the United States, so we are responsible for protecting it for the future.**

Dissident Project speakers know how to connect our experiences to the principles that have made America prosperous and why we must defend them.

[_**Will you help us turn our experiences into a powerful warning for high school students? Then click here to send $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7l2fmrs85s7v8k0goejcsivk8vg84ovkgojmntg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdg68or6cth2bs)

We've spoken to 27 so far. But we're not even close to done - we have 50 engagements in total this year.

**Your generous gift provides this once-in-a-lifetime experience to schools for no charge.**

Can I count on you to help me share my story?**Click any link below to donate.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ze1h84rdaiqraubneeg6b5ecm79jrd2agrd4lvno_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdg68or6cth2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbcvoj60sk5ao8pc8t56mrkjeu07np128tmqfkf8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdg68or6cth2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdim6bbnhjpdkrbvq796ke466t84fp7u3ulbmt90_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdg68or6cth2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1e35be7h1b522kgsmi2cprd6r437ckilvf08kqg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdg68or6cth2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsv1aficko9cr2l87achrk571dqvja56caen00t0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdg68or6cth2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zf61domvp6hfae9cl65iklal05tsb89otc8u4aco_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdg68or6cth2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2za56odrlqd3lu6qjnbc3g7krmqthfb0udi2jbnf0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdg68or6cth2bs)

This is NOT a threat to be taken lightly. DC is a FAR LEFT stronghold. Should it become a state, it would PERMANENTLY give Democrats two more far left Senators that they could use to transform America BEYOND RECOGNITION. The following Democrats are in FULL SUPPORT: | | | Chuck Schumer (D-N.Y.) Tom Carper (D-Del.) Chris Van Hollen (D-Md.) Tammy Baldwin (D-Wis.) Michael Bennet (D-Colo.) Richard Blumenthal (D-Conn.) body:

| | | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02953%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=26%2fsax1nchBkZ3HLxbw2zA&sysid=1)

| | Dear Reader,
Are you sick and tired of trying to search through so many different news sites to figure out what is going on in the world? Spending too much time trying to figure out what is **ACTUALLY** important? Not sure if you can trust what you are reading? Today is your day to sign up for a **FREE** newsletter called _[The Flyover](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02954%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TaIQSdj1RVQf7%2fXfetYKsg&sysid=1)_ where our talented team of editors will do all that work for you. Get informed on politics, business, world affairs, science, technology and many other topics with a single email directly to your inbox. **_[Click here to sign up now for FREE!](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02965%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BDZV5cQwHFniVfY%2bLYETuQ&sysid=1)_**
Finding quality news online is like sifting an avalanche. We dig through hundreds of sources and pull out the most important news of the day, so you don't have to. One email does truly have every relevant story. Here is your opportunity to **[sign up today for FREE](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02966%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zuAjuqGwWHmkB58E3fGNxw&sysid=1)**. In today’s world, the mainstream media tries to tell people what to think. At _[The Flyover](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02954%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TaIQSdj1RVQf7%2fXfetYKsg&sysid=1)_ , we eliminate the bias and just deliver the facts of today’s news and allowing you to reach your own conclusion. **_[Click here to check out our latest briefing.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02967%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iL9hUtQYd3RJGgTc7S5EXg&sysid=1)_**
Get _[The Flyover](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02954%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TaIQSdj1RVQf7%2fXfetYKsg&sysid=1)_ delivered to your inbox every Monday, Wednesday, and Friday so you do not miss out on anything. clean_body: This deadline will be a telling test. | | | | | Hi, friend! It's Madi again. I just got out of a meeting with the rest of our finance team, and I received some alarming news: 🚨 We’re STILL behind on our Quarterly Fundraising Goal with just a week left before the deadline. 🚨 | | | TEAM KEAN FUNDRAISING GOAL: $7,283 / $10,000 | | | We’re close, friend, but not close enough. This deadline is a test for our team. It’s Tom’s first major goal since becoming a Congressman, and it’ll be how the Left sizes us up in their quest to flip our district blue. Help us keep the Radical Dems OUT of our district. Help us hit our goal before it’s too late: We’re running out of time to hit this goal and YOU could help make the difference. Will you? subject: [GOING LIVE] Fighting against cancel culture
body:

| Peter, **I'll be LIVE SOON at 4:30PM EDT for my Common Ground Podcast, and I have some amazing special guests, Antonio Sabato Jr and Riley Gaines, joining me.** Today's topic revolves around fighting back against cancel and woke culture. Cancel culture is not about holding people accountable for their actions. It is about punishing individuals for expressing opinions that are deemed unacceptable by a vocal minority. This is a dangerous trend that threatens our ability to have open and honest discussions about the issues that matter to us.
---
| | [CLICK HERE TO OPEN THE COMMON GROUND STREAM NOW (I'LL BE LIVE AT 4:30PM EDT)](https://xtz223.keap-link001.com/v2/click/ebff005061404246aacc83363de8af49/eJyNj0ELgkAQhf_LnCVRM8mbiMiieYg6h-lQS7ou6yiZ-N9bKzwVdJ353vd4IxCKXBArwYc7PWzbAQMUFlxyFBQ2gvLi9bXdteVYBlRc3GLVdBL88Wt4AeazZ3sG0CBRE4d9ECYsi08pyxINylzpir807ma7aKJdwFKYpp9erDlFvVa34JPqcN5Tcr2JjqrS_JVItr5pFk1dN-KiO0S5KqrubFa8Ry3IpURRfrYnOLw10xOKbmKI)
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| Antonio Sabato Jr is a model and actor who Hollywood has attempted to blacklist, solely because of his conservative views. While Hollywood preaches diversity, diversity of thought no longer exists in the entertainment industry when it comes to certain political views. Antonio is pushing back against cancel culture through his Conflict Studios, which helps actors continue their careers after getting blacklisted. Riley Gaines is a former University of Kentucky swimmer who stepped into the spotlight last year when she first spoke out against biological male athletes competing in women’s sports. Gaines became a 12-time NCAA All-American swimmer and a five-time SEC champion. But last year, the integrity of her sport — and female sports as a whole — was called into question when University of Pennsylvania swimmer Thomas, who had competed on the school’s men’s team her freshman, sophomore and junior years, began shattering records in the women’s category.
Make sure you [**join us now (we'll be live right at 4:30PM EDT),**](https://xtz223.keap-link001.com/v2/click/7ba7833d4e9e526f0f5da157df76f2a3/eJyNj0ELgkAQhf_LnCVxyyJvIiKL5iHqHKZDLem6rKNk4n9vrfBU0HXme9_jDUAoM0m8AA_u9GBsCRZozIUSKCmoJWX568vclbN0LCiFvEW6bhV4w9fwDEznDXMtoF6hIQ57P4h5Gp0SnsYGVJk2FX9p3PV21oQ7nycwjj-9WAkKO6NuwCPd4rSnEGYTHXVp-CuRajzbzuuqquXFdMhikZft2S5Fh0aQKYWy-GyPsX9rxieI2mKG) Bill

name: Mark Warner
subject: Tell the Senate: Pass the DISCLOSE Act now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Dark money has no place in politics

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60618649/397693240/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmFiNTZlYy05OGM5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1H0T63Pc8OqSgQ7ybctYdrzWaeSkFElB4wNX7xElqJU=&emci=63f42557-8ac9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=26ab56ec-98c9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, Ever since the Supreme Court’s 2010 decision in _Citizens United v. FEC_ , outside spending in federal elections has skyrocketed. It’s pretty crazy to think that many of the biggest spenders aren’t required by law to disclose their donors – making it nearly impossible for us to understand how special interest dark money is influencing our democracy. In 2018, When Sen. Kaine was last up for re-election, dark money groups poured $150 million into the midterm elections. In 2020, when I was up for re-election and Joe Biden took on Donald Trump, dark money spending exploded to over $1 billion. That’s billion, with a B. The fact is dark money spending is out of control, so Tim and I are taking action. Our _DISCLOSE Act_ would require organizations spending money to influence our elections to disclose their large donors and certify that they’re not using foreign money for election spending. **[_We need your help to get this passed. Sign on right now to tell the Senate to pass our _DISCLOSE Act_ >>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60618650/397693241/1467834335?refcode=mw_em_230323_1&ms=mw_em_230323_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmFiNTZlYy05OGM5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1H0T63Pc8OqSgQ7ybctYdrzWaeSkFElB4wNX7xElqJU=&emci=63f42557-8ac9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=26ab56ec-98c9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=4568237)** This bill is a long overdue step to improve transparency and accountability in our elections and strengthen our democracy. It’s going to be a tough battle for control of the Senate in 2024, but regardless, we won’t allow the GOP to pour millions of dollars of dark money into their campaigns to capture the majority. Dark money has no place in politics. **[_Add your name to join me in calling on the Senate to pass our bill to improve transparency around political spending and make the government more accountable to the will of voters._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60618651/397693242/1467834335?refcode=mw_em_230323_1&ms=mw_em_230323_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmFiNTZlYy05OGM5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1H0T63Pc8OqSgQ7ybctYdrzWaeSkFElB4wNX7xElqJU=&emci=63f42557-8ac9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=26ab56ec-98c9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=4568237)** Thank you, Mark Warner **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60618652/397693243/1467834335?refcode=mw_em_230323_1&ms=mw_em_230323_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmFiNTZlYy05OGM5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1H0T63Pc8OqSgQ7ybctYdrzWaeSkFElB4wNX7xElqJU=&emci=63f42557-8ac9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=26ab56ec-98c9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=4568237)**

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: bad news from The Washington Post
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
I'll get right to it, team: The Washington Post just named my seat in Nevada one of the most endangered seats heading into 2024.
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-rosen [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-rosen]
I'm vulnerable, and I'm counting on your early grassroots support to help me fight back against the GOP. That's why I'm asking you directly: So please, will you split $20 or more right now between my campaign and Serve America to keep Nevada and the Senate blue? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-rosen]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-rosen]
There's no question that Mitch McConnell and his special interest allies will pour millions of dollars into Nevada to try to buy this seat. He has done it before, and he nearly succeeded. That's why I'm relying on grassroots supporters like you to step up right here, right now – today.
Because it's not just your $20. It's your $20 combined with $20 from your neighbor, your friend, a waitress in Las Vegas, a nurse in Reno, and a small-business owner in Carson City. Together, we're building a powerful grassroots movement to keep this must-win seat blue.
Senate control could all come down to what happens in Nevada – so please, team, we need all hands on deck: Will you split $20 or more now between my campaign and Serve America – every dollar makes a crucial difference in these early days of the election cycle – to fuel our reelection campaign to victory and defend our Democratic Senate majority? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-rosen]
I can't tell you how grateful I am for your support. Thank you.
– Jacky

name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: One of the reasons I decided to run for office:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Thirteen years ago today, President Barack Obama signed the Affordable Care Act into law. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60618908/397694090/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2VjOGMxNi05YWM5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=un9Da60CwbUHaHZBTVlXT8qROUqafehCu22ZfF3gpTQ=&emci=54cff45d-8ac9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=53ec8c16-9ac9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

**Thirteen years ago today, President Barack Obama signed the Affordable Care Act into law.** This was historic legislation that made health care more accessible for millions of Americans.

As a pediatrician and person with Type 1 diabetes, I knew how life-changing this legislation was for my patients and other people like me. Tens of millions of people across this country who weren’t insured before, finally had the sense of security that comes with affordable access to insurance and medical care.

I never imagined I would run for office, but when Congressional Republicans tried to overturn the Affordable Care Act in 2017, I joined with three other doctors from my clinic and met with our representative’s staff to explain all of the ways the ACA protects people in this district, and why it was so critical. Two days later, our congressman voted to overturn the ACA.

**That was the final straw for me, so I packed up my office and left the job I love to run for Congress.** I had a sense that I could do more good for more children and families in Washington's 8th District from a seat in the House of Representatives than I ever could in the 4 walls of my exam room. And since there were exactly zero women doctors in Congress at that time, I also knew we needed my voice to stand up for women’s reproductive rights, which were on the Republican chopping block.

Thanks to the support of this incredible grassroots team, we flipped WA-08 blue for the first time ever in 2018 and kept it blue in 2020 and 2022. Since coming to Congress, one of my top priorities has always been ensuring every person has access to the care they need. That's why I'm fighting to protect the ACA, lower the cost of prescription drugs, and expand access to health care.

Today, a record-breaking 35 million people receive health care coverage through the Affordable Care Act, and in Washington State, we've seen our uninsured rate cut by more than half. But despite the progress we've made, Kevin McCarthy and House Republicans have made repealing the ACA a top priority.

As your congresswoman, I'll always fight back against these attacks and work to ensure that every person has access to the care they need. But I need your support to ensure I can continue this important fight.

**[On the 13th anniversary of the Affordable Care Act becoming law, will you chip in to help protect my seat so I can continue fighting to expand access to affordable health care in Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60618909/397694094/-1430019318?refcode=em23_230323_aca_fnd_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230323_aca_fnd_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=53ec8c16-9ac9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2VjOGMxNi05YWM5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=un9Da60CwbUHaHZBTVlXT8qROUqafehCu22ZfF3gpTQ=)**

Thank you,

Kim

Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat in 2024. | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60618912/397694095/-1430019318?refcode=em23_230323_aca_fnd_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230323_aca_fnd_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=53ec8c16-9ac9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2VjOGMxNi05YWM5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=un9Da60CwbUHaHZBTVlXT8qROUqafehCu22ZfF3gpTQ=)

subject: Our farmers need help.

body:
What do you think matters most?| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=0a899ad0193f48d399298a3556652e7c&_m=9e4343b1d971493d92e76cc054b0a5ed&_e=h8_2MLxFXVjnQ0faVYPoNGsq8oOBc1i7EzNIBzvNet3PaZYJjGDZTcjjeuTa9MzwToBw8PSRI7F3Q1ineWrgP87dSi_1f8aGdx86Suw3dns4sMh4aWL8UWdU_hb0JvSl_TTbUmrre68AlcxXXTcLyUmvEnI8Tv1fpT8hFuKzLH6umSXx3nnIWMamAID-wnvy9hg-NBnN2ynJ9qgelWfgs2fYkjHKUbSs3HSMeOgotJiDwq7xVGQx8Xf-m_uppGwp4X_HCQjPXZE8FBokHP6Itw%3D%3D)
---
I've been traveling across our state to meet with farmers, friend. These hardworking men and women are the backbone of the U.S. agricultural industry, and they're struggling to keep business alive under the insane restrictions being imposed by the federal government. I want to make sure that the 2023 farm bill makes life easier for our hard-working men and women in the fields. As I wrap up my visits with these farmers, I head back to D.C. to stand up for what they need to succeed. **I am curious to see what you think should be addressed.**

clean_body: What do you think matters most?| | | I've been traveling across our state to meet with farmers, friend. These hardworking men and women are the backbone of the U.S. agricultural industry, and they're struggling to keep business alive under the insane restrictions being imposed by the federal government. I want to make sure that the 2023 farm bill makes life easier for our hard-working men and women in the fields. As I wrap up my visits with these farmers, I head back to D.C. to stand up for what they need to succeed. I am curious to see what you think should be addressed. I would really appreciate your opinion as well so I have the whole picture in mind when working on the new farm bill in 2023. Thank you,Brad Finstad | | | | | | | | ---|---|---

name: Giffords.org
subject: The NRA is back at it again with another dangerous tweet
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Extremist views like this are dangerous to public safety
#

Did you see this?
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar23.q3bw9s&refcode=em230323-1-15&t=1&akid=4452%2E3935704%2ESZZNxE)
Once again, the NRA is promoting dangerous rhetoric on social media.
Contrary to what the NRA says, there **_can_** be a balance between the Second Amendment and commonsense laws to prevent gun violence.
The gun lobby uses inflammatory language like this to rile up their base without focusing on the cold, hard facts.
Assault weapons were used in seven of the deadliest mass shootings between the years of 2010 to 2020.
The perpetrators of Las Vegas, Orlando, Sandy Hook Elementary School, Sutherland Springs, El Paso, Robb Elementary School, Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School, all used an assault weapon to kill innocent people.
In fact, the AR-15 was not promoted as the ultimate expression of the Second Amendment until the gun industry politicized it after Sandy Hook... right after it was used to slaughter children.
It’s disgraceful.
[**We must continue to fight back against the NRA’s stranglehold on our nation’s gun laws. So please, will you make a contribution to Giffords PAC today to help us stand up to the gun lobby and their harmful rhetoric?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar23.q3bw9s&refcode=em230323-1-15&t=2&akid=4452%2E3935704%2ESZZNxE)

We're proud to endorse free-thinking and dedicated fiscal conservatives like Rick Scott. When he challenged the Swamp leadership, he was challenging the very status quo of Washington. For his "transgression" against the Swamp, he has been mercilessly attacked by Democrats, the Media, **and even those who claim to support YOUR values.** **But Senator Scott doesn 't regret a minute of it.** He would do it over again because his commitment to the American people trumps party lines and politics. And that's exactly why we _only_ endorse conservatives who are willing to stake everything to fix our broken system, not benefit from it. Friend, Anyone can become a refugee and an asylum seeker. People fleeing persecution deserve support, stability, and dignity—which they can find at Freedom House Detroit in my community. Michigan’s only temporary home and full-service provider for people seeking humanitarian protection, Freedom House Detroit provides safe shelter for up to two years, along with food, clothing, legal aid, access to medical and mental healthcare, and support with finding employment and housing. **And, this year, it is celebrating 40 years of service to Detroit and all those who come here seeking refuge!** **Approximately 85% of Freedom House Detroit's clients exit with jobs and into independent housing.** [**Can you help asylum seekers on their journey to safety, security, and freedom by donating to Freedom House Subject: Celebrate Ramadan by supporting asylum seekers and refugees

Friend,
Ramadan Kareem to all who are celebrating. Ramadan is the holiest month of the year for our Muslim neighbors here at home and around the world.
Muslims are always called to support the most vulnerable among us. But there’s an extra focus during Ramadan on giving charitable donations—known as Zakat—and providing acts of service for our communities.
**So to start off Ramadan, I want to lift up an incredible organization in Detroit that could use our support.**
Freedom House Detroit has provided 5,000 refugees and asylum seekers with safe refuge and a path to independence. Their clients come from every corner of the globe, all fleeing persecution and violence. Many are survivors of torture.
**Freedom House Detroit is Michigan’s only temporary home and full-service provider for people seeking humanitarian protection—providing safe shelter for up to two years, along with food, clothing, legal aid, access to medical and mental healthcare, and support with finding employment and housing. And, this year, it is celebrating 40 years of service to Detroit and all those who come here seeking refuge!**

Most people seeking humanitarian protection are not eligible for employment until six months to one year after they file their claim for protection, and most are not eligible for safety net programs. So, residents of Freedom House Detroit receive all basic needs as well as resources that will help them prepare for independence.
Freedom House Detroit’s FreedomLives program delivers community housing, food, fresh water, clothing, internet access, and, as clients prepare to exit the program, housing literacy which includes linking clients to affordable and safe housing options.
The FreedomAids program delivers legal aid, so clients can successfully navigate the complex and English-only process of applying for humanitarian protection and work authorization.
Freedom House Detroit’s FreedomCares program connects clients to medical and mental health care and health literacy.
The FreedomWorks program delivers employment literacy, including ESL training, job search support, and volunteer experiences to help clients gain experience in the American workplace.
**Approximately 85% of Freedom House Detroit's clients exit with jobs and into independent housing.**
