clean_body: Freedom House Detroit is Michigan’s only temporary home and full-service provider for people seeking humanitarian protection. | | | Friend, Anyone can become a refugee and an asylum seeker. People fleeing persecution deserve support, stability, and dignity—which they can find at Freedom House Detroit in my community. Michigan’s only temporary home and full-service provider for people seeking humanitarian protection, Freedom House Detroit provides safe shelter for up to two years, along with food, clothing, legal aid, access to medical and mental healthcare, and support with finding employment and housing. And, this year, it is celebrating 40 years of service to Detroit and all those who come here seeking refuge! Approximately 85% of Freedom House Detroit's clients exit with jobs and into independent housing. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, with 100% going directly to Freedom House Detroit | | | | | | | | | | Your support comes at a special time. Around the world, Muslims are starting to celebrate the holiest month of the year: Ramadan. We focus our attention on supporting people in need, embodying our faith through acts of service and charitable contributions. Thank you for helping to mark the beginning of Ramadan! In solidarity, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Wed, Mar 22, 2023 Subject: Celebrate Ramadan by supporting asylum seekers and refugees To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Ramadan Kareem to all who are celebrating. Ramadan is the holiest month of the year for our Muslim neighbors here at home and around the world. Muslims are always called to support the most vulnerable among us. But there’s an extra focus during Ramadan on giving charitable donations—known as Zakat—and providing acts of service for our communities. So to start off Ramadan, I want to lift up an incredible organization in Detroit that could use our support. Freedom House Detroit has provided 5,000 refugees and asylum seekers with safe refuge and a path to independence. Their clients come from every corner of the globe, all fleeing persecution and violence. Many are survivors of torture. Freedom House Detroit is Michigan’s only temporary home and full-service provider for people seeking humanitarian protection—providing safe shelter for up to two years, along with food, clothing, legal aid, access to medical and mental healthcare, and support with finding employment and housing. And, this year, it is celebrating 40 years of service to Detroit and all those who come here seeking refuge! Your donation will help families stay safe, like these folks living at Freedom House Detroit: Most people seeking humanitarian protection are not eligible for employment until six months to one year after they file their claim for protection, and most are not eligible for safety net programs. So, residents of Freedom House Detroit receive all basic needs as well as resources that will help them prepare for independence. Freedom House Detroit’s FreedomLives program delivers community housing, food, fresh water, clothing, internet access, and, as clients prepare to exit the program, housing literacy which includes linking clients to affordable and safe housing options. The FreedomAids program delivers legal aid, so clients can successfully navigate the complex and English-only process of applying for humanitarian protection and work authorization. Freedom House Detroit’s FreedomCares program connects clients to medical and mental health care and health literacy. The FreedomWorks program delivers employment literacy, including ESL training, job search support, and volunteer experiences to help clients gain experience in the American workplace. Approximately 85% of Freedom House Detroit's clients exit with jobs and into independent housing. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, with 100% going directly to Freedom House Detroit | | | | | | | | | In solidarity, Rashida P.S. Here are some more photos of people living their lives with dignity at Freedom House—with their faces obscured: * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . body:
I remember my inbox getting flooded with desperate, hair-on-fire emails. | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5gOujJU4G2FQlGZnk4uqAVzEl4LE04H7PxIJv6b2eZuzlgNWGrmM0tisZhEroq5uAvlowRGLmv7ZHfJH6WjxukU-skJDPFPhIiS1TUVT9t4ofU1s_gY9KEyrbZp2doSHwwdXDCOQW6qn4yPwMOuq590kFWmVTcVP_RTDI5KK8CidFam4zFYu89gEYYhVtWwfSVzGvaybjTLEF8MptOB2G3Me-1YwyyjOpjZMAy1q1e91H9PK4-Ym55tpUyzh4DEXzXO9LNsBtRu0DrWINiC2Wm4KYwA0cJsXDSXZYxO_ZFN4Ly5cjq0ZnBpAu4PPcBaY/3uq/AmPwNtNcRP-Vy5b0VusfJA/h0/sjeY9SWO4tdR9-3ySD4louwNXK3Lr23WEzdVWmuviSw)
---
Peter,

Before running for Congress, I remember my inbox getting flooded with desperate, hair-on-fire emails from other Democratic campaigns. **To be honest, I hated them.** The deadlines always seemed arbitrary, and they were often full of obnoxious scare tactics. In my opinion, Democratic donors have plenty of real reasons why they should support the cause. Exaggerating the stakes is counterproductive. That's why I told my team from the start that we would do things differently. Yes, the stakes are high. But we won't feed into the panic you might see on social media or cable news that's caused distrust and dysfunction over the years. So today I want to give it to you straight. We have eight days until the first FEC fundraising deadline of my reelection campaign. Showing strength right now is critical, and the good news is my team tells me we're getting close! **[I'm not going to scare you into supporting us, but I do hope you'll send in a donation of $5 or more to help us meet our goal.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5gOujJU4G2FQlGZnk4uqAQfDazIGQL5RUyCDnnnxJDeYatZP2vB6leOd5JDeqjtWwRm88-dN0Iq9Gx9l0_F1qTgC2ymPFMYE1qWRUMITkE3J_Dfo-zfamXn5qlafUkVG3Wi6iKqfQ8Qz_UTWZpFtI2QEVENK4BoyQRygpQ0epq_4rLBhN7LhX_HyRxpZCLHqGQFWK4ksPqF6hKIKZF_D1AZIfywEWQtcDACFrn5Iz-kpXOrWBkUPVzeecmENHBJ8GCr-ETFo-Wr7yKDrHadVqtyLSFuHBR5EtmWhw4HheY9zxXh9p7Yuw0hoZ91b-PCr8KUJMOIS0pdASPFUGqic4PiYQENYEr1Nv3wbq4AFZgD8fRFvtJQAJTD-TMnzlkaA/3uq/AmPwNtNcRP-Vy5b0VusfJA/h1/kbfJ7PRaMmhpFjuoGqvX04fu-dBb1hAUF36JbkTNXi0)**

Here's a fact about our campaign: The *vast majority* of our contributions come in online and on emails just like this one. We don't have billionaires and big special interests backing us the way our opponents might. So when I say we're counting on your support, I truly mean it! Thanks in advance for your support, Eric

clean_body: I remember my inbox getting flooded with desperate, hair-on-fire emails. | | Peter, Before running for Congress, I remember my inbox getting flooded with desperate, hair-on-fire emails from other Democratic campaigns. To be honest, I hated them. The deadlines always seemed arbitrary, and they were often full of obnoxious scare tactics. In my opinion, Democratic donors have plenty of real reasons why they should support the cause. Exaggerating the stakes is counterproductive. That's why I told my team from the start that we would do things differently. Yes, the stakes are high. But we won't feed into the panic you might see on social media or cable news that's caused distrust and dysfunction over the years. So today I want to give it to you straight. We have eight days until the first FEC fundraising deadline of my reelection campaign. Showing strength right now is critical, and the good news is my team tells me we're getting close! Here's a fact about our campaign: The vast majority of our contributions come in online and on emails just like this one. We don't have billionaires and big special interests backing us the way our opponents might. So when I say we're counting on your support, I truly mean it! Thanks in advance for your support, Eric | | Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. To support Eric, P.O. Box 1172 Moline, IL 61265 United States | | Sent via . name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: The Affordable Care Act
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=76%2E35263%2EnqjMVc)
Peter — 13 years ago today, _the Affordable Care Act_ was signed into law. Since then, **millions** of Americans — all with different health conditions, ages, and backgrounds — have been able to receive essential, affordable medical care. The fight for affordable health care has always been personal for me: **I know what it's like to have the label "pre-existing condition" attached to my care — and before the _Affordable Care Act_ was passed, people like me could be denied health coverage.** When I was a child, I was diagnosed with a serious illness and spent three months in the hospital. When I got better, my grandparents who raised me looked for an insurance policy that would cover me in the future. However, because of my previous illness, they couldn’t find such a policy. Not from any insurer. Not at any price. They had to pay for my health care out of pocket — and they had to make enormous sacrifices to do so — all because I was a child who had been labeled with those words: “pre-existing condition.” Growing up, I saw my grandparents stay up nights, worried sick that I would fall ill again and they wouldn't be able to afford my care. **And I got into public service to make sure no one would ever have to go through that again.** Because of the _Affordable Care Act_ , insurance companies can no longer discriminate against someone based on their pre-existing condition. I championed that health reform and fought to allow young people to stay on their parents’ insurance plans up to age 26. These policy changes have led to millions more Americans getting the health insurance they need. So, you can imagine my frustration whenever Republicans attack our health care or threaten protections for folks with pre-existing conditions. They’ve spent years playing politics with people’s lives. And if they’re successful, countless Americans could find themselves in a place where insurance companies, once again, write all the rules. Peter, the people of Wisconsin did not send me to Washington to take people’s health care away, which is why I fought against Republican repeal efforts and why I will never back down. [**I’ll always fight to protect the _Affordable Care Act_ from the GOP’s attempts to take away our care. If you’re with me, add your name to our petition today, and help me send a message to our leaders back in Washington.**](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/230323_ACA_Petition_Anniversary/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20230323_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=76%2E35263%2EnqjMVc) | [ADD MY NAME](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/230323_ACA_Petition_Anniversary/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20230323_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=76%2E35263%2EnqjMVc)
---
I am not going to let anyone make me forget where I came from or why I got into public service in the first place. My own personal experience has always inspired my work to do everything I can to make sure that every American has quality, affordable health care coverage.
Thank you for standing with me.
— Tammy
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=76%2E35263%2EnqjMVc) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=76%2E35263%2EnqjMVc)**
PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
---
If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please [unsubscribe.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=76%2E35263%2EnqjMVc)

name: Team Andy Kim
subject: This is just the beginning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
This year, Andy stepped into a new congressional leadership role. He is now serving as the top Democrat on the subcommittee for military personnel.

He's been in this role for a few months and already he's leading bipartisan efforts to improve the lives of the brave people who serve and protect our country as well as their families.

We need leaders like Andy in Congress, people who find ways to help, even amidst partisan gridlock. We're building a movement that breaks through partisanship. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?refcode=2023-03-23-accomplishments&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=e2226b7a-9fc9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811]

After learning that affordable child care was a top concern for military service members in his district, he led the way in proposing legislation to increase access to affordable child care in areas with high demand and low availability. Reducing child care worries would immediately improve military families' lives. Military families deserve access to quality, affordable, and accessible child care.

Andy led a bipartisan effort to ensure that National Guard and Reserve service members receive the same financial resources that our active duty military members do. These members of the Guard and Reserve are asked to be ready for the call at a moment's notice, they shouldn't have to worry about their credit or have to unnecessarily overthink their finances. All service members deserve financial security and protection.

Health risks, particularly dental health risks, keep many of our National Guard and Reserve members from serving when they are needed. Andy has proposed legislation to expand access to military health insurance to our Guard and Reserve servicemembers who must be ready at a moment's notice. Adequate health care coverage will ensure they are always ready. We can all agree, if you serve our country, you should have access to the health care you need.

This new leadership responsibility provides Andy with the chance to make a big difference in the lives of military service members and their families. He is committed to improving the lives of our military members– this is just the beginning .

Andy relies on the strength of this grassroots movement to power his work in Congress. Will you join our movement for change with an $3 donation? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?refcode=2023-03-23-accomplishments&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=e2226b7a-9fc9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811]

More updates to come,

Team Andy

name: Alexandra Rojas
subject: This community
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

We’re in a fight for the soul of the Democratic Party — to transform it to
represent regular people, not corporate special interests. We’re working
to pass legislation like Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, a living
wage, and ending our systems of mass incarceration and deportation.

But we’re up against an establishment that doesn’t want to see our
progressive champions take office. When the DCCC needs funds, they call on
special interests and corporate super PACs with seemingly endless pockets.
When Justice Democrats fundraises, we call on people like you.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/132002?refcode=em20230323-28120&t=1001&akid=28120%2E1203867%2E6t6Wrz ]Peter, the
first end-of-quarter deadline of the year is coming up at the end of the
month, and we’re $13,000 behind on the $250,000 we need to raise by
midnight on the 31st. Peter,
can you chip in right now?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/132002?refcode=em20230323-28120&t=1020&akid=28120%2E1203867%2E6t6Wrz ]Contribute $3

I’m so grateful for all of our supporters who believe in our candidates,
this organization, and our movement that we are building to usher in a new
generation of leadership by electing diverse, working-class candidates who
aren’t afraid of fighting for the bold policies we need in order to
address the crises we’re facing.

We operate on a shoe-string budget, and every dollar we get makes a big
impact on the support we’re able to offer our candidates. Your
contribution today would make a real difference for us.

Our fundraising has fallen behind in the past few months, so we’re really
counting on the next week to turn things around before the quarter ends.

name: Team Cori
subject: Will you sign on as a co-sponsor of the Justice For All Act?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
**ICYMI:** Reps. Cori Bush and Summer Lee are joining Rashida Tlaib in reintroducing the Justice For All Act — a transformative bill to expand our civil rights and protect our communities from discrimination.
**For far too long, our civil rights have been weakened** by right wing judges at all levels of government. And we can't rely on today's radical right-wing Supreme Court to defend us. By restoring the original intent of our civil rights laws, we can ensure that **everyone** is treated equally under the law.
This bill would provide people and communities with the tools and resources needed to combat both intentional **AND** unintentional discrimination in housing, education, public accomodations, employment among others.
**[Will you join us in our fight to defend and protect our civil rights by adding your name to become a grassroots co-sponsor of the Justice For All Act? Your support is needed!](https://act.coribush.org/go/1059?t=1&akid=2382%2E1082990%2EUPV9js)**
**[SIGN ON»](https://act.coribush.org/go/1059?t=2&akid=2382%2E1082990%2EUPV9js)**
If passed, the Justice For All Act would end qualified immunity for government personnel, **_including police officers._** The bill would also prohibit racial and gender profiling in police investigations. These acts alone could finally bring some form of standardized accountability to police.
Additionally, this bill would go even further by protecting people in the courts by:
* Supporting victims of discrimination by ensuring they receive the compensation they deserve and the attorney's fees as necessary to allow civil rights lawyers to take on their cases.
* Prohibiting the use of compelled arbitration clauses, which are too often used to eliminate consumer and employee rights.
* Eliminating court-created defenses that allow employers to escape liability for creating hostile work environments.
* Expanding the definition of "sex" for civil rights purposes to include sexual orientation and gender identity.

The Justice For All Act has the ability to change the lives of millions of people of all ages and backgrounds, especially for those from marginalized communities. We are long overdue for an overhaul of the criminal justice system to equalize the playing field for everyone.
**Congress has the ability to defend and expand our civil rights protections to defend our communities from further discrimination. Our collective voice is key to making this a reality.[Will you add your name to become a grassroots co-sponsor of the Justice For All Act?](https://act.coribush.org/go/1059?t=3&akid=2382%2E1082990%2EUPV9js)**
In solidarity,
Team Cori

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230323?refcode=em20230323-2382-footer&t=4&refcode2=2382_1082990_UPV9js&akid=2382%2E1082990%2EUPV9js) **
---
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.
Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress

* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.coribush.org/signup/update-your-information?t=5&akid=2382%2E1082990%2EUPV9js)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Sign on: Pass the People Over The Pentagon Act
body:
Quick note
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T05b83bd2-f79d-41d5-ae0c-13d109e87111/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, The US military budget is currently $858 billion, more than China, Russia, and the next seven countries combined! Yet, we are told there isn’t money for healthcare, ending childhood poverty, or protecting the planet. We know the Pentagon has such a staggering amount of money available that it has led to wasteful military spending. In addition, the Pentagon has never passed an audit and has not been held accountable for waste, fraud, and abuse. [**Tell Congress that we need to prioritize the well-being of Americans. Tell them to pass the People Over Pentagon Act (H.R. 1134)!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6ca3286b-d6f6-40c0-a934-60bd7dc8db66/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Every year Congress and the President add more money to the Pentagon budget for outdated ships, malfunctioning planes, dangerous nuclear weapons, and giveaways to corrupt defense contractors at the expense of communities across the country. Reducing the Pentagon budget by $100 billion would still leave plenty to keep America safe at a level well above our country’s post-World War II average.
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**YOUR NAME NEEDED**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6392e1ba-bffe-408f-8302-33a83d90e0dc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| This legislation would free up more funds to feed the hungry, care for the sick, protect our planet, fund education, and cut childhood poverty. [**Tell Congress that we need to prioritize the well-being of Americans. Tell them to pass the People Over Pentagon Act (H.R. 1134)!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T52447e95-8cff-4d3f-bf23-0ced9a223bf3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Cliff
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4c8a410e-66db-4fce-897f-6d9d9b25f551/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/passthepeopleoverthepentagonact-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T876505df-52da-4afe-ba5a-0ecc19e0cdf8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=8c2c1584-9a9d-41ad-98f4-a532e918166e&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=8c2c1584-9a9d-41ad-98f4-a532e918166e&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

name: Team Swalwell
subject: $13 for 13 years
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-march2023-fr-march?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-march2023-fr-march?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25]
Friend,

Thanks to years of dedicated effort, defense against numerous court challenges, and implementation of the American Rescue Plan in 2021, the Affordable Care Act is thriving.

On this year's 13th anniversary, we celebrate the championing individuals who laid the groundwork for — and continue to support, affordable and accessible healthcare for all Americans — including Eric.

This year's anniversary of the Affordable Care Act should be celebrated, but not without remembering that MAGA Republicans are threatening to repeal and replace the ACA — with no real healthcare plan of their own.

Eric will always stand up for the goals of the Affordable Care Act, while continuing to fight for its expansion. Because he believes healthcare is a right, not a privilege.

Friend, will you chip in $13 to celebrate the anniversary of the Affordable Care Act, and help Eric continue fighting for affordable and accessible healthcare for all Americans? body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60623169/397708660/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDcxZDg5My1hNGM5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L-WzABB96qymClPgEHRh8hyvqA0CnE7cV5qdpyU8oSY=&emci=26355f80-38c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=4471d893-a4c9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=9494239)

| | Our movement is growing every day. But we need more people to join our grassroots movement to take back the House this year. So far, we have seen 324 people contribute to grow our movement in 2023. We set a goal to reach 500 contributors by the end of the month. **[Can you pitch in $4 today and help us reach our goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60623170/397708663/1596212816?refcode=2023-03-23-eoq-goal&recurring=0&amount=4&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=4471d893-a4c9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDcxZDg5My1hNGM5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L-WzABB96qymClPgEHRh8hyvqA0CnE7cV5qdpyU8oSY=)** 2024 is going to be a big election year. name: Team Casey
subject: Don't let Republicans destroy the Affordable Care Act
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Bob's asking you to help ensure even more Americans can access affordable care, before it's too late. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60623122/397708607/-744169294?refcode=Header&ms=Header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTliOGQ4Yy1hNGM5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QfsrXCOzSj-devFlPd8g4cdBS-WGKApPVb7zNbzRl1g=&emci=29cae584-a4c9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=619b8d8c-a4c9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=8943725) Peter,

Today marks 13 years since the Affordable Care Act became law, giving millions of Americans access to the high-quality health care they deserve.

But Republicans in Congress have voted over 70 times to destroy the ACA. They voted to tear health care away from millions of children, families, workers, seniors, and people with life-threatening pre-existing conditions, and if they win back the Senate majority, they're sure to do it again.

That's why Bob's asking you to help ensure even more Americans can access affordable care, before it's too late.

[**It's time to strengthen — not destroy — the Affordable Care Act. If you agree, add your name now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60623124/397708609/726536352?ms=em23_230323_acapet_adv_gq_act___tc_ettx&refcode=em23_230323_acapet_adv_gq_act___tc_ettx&source=em23_230323_acapet_adv_gq_act___tc_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230323_acapet_adv_gq_act___tc_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=emlOU2DdSjlhijn8lCH+zI/zGt7lZ46JXuHIQO8ycJhPa5570/b4kFYVKBmawcRyxAxVSSAgQe1Hxb844xQZa8/0ek6jVg5hRJ4zrQ8yKxTok2Qs/9ZHfdOUTF1x2cvKK2YAzlqRGmaYnkhS6bcz0wBD0QiB9xyPZj++BVkft5hkUW/kskRYeLGv8SBuNyDd&refcode2=619b8d8c-a4c9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&contactdata=emlOU2DdSjlhijn8lCH+zI/zGt7lZ46JXuHIQO8ycJhPa5570/b4kFYVKBmawcRyxAxVSSAgQe1Hxb844xQZa8/0ek6jVg5hRJ4zrQ8yKxTok2Qs/9ZHfdOUTF1x2cvKK2YAzlqRGmaYnkhS6bcz0wBD0QiB9xyPZj++BVkft5hkUW/kskRYeLGv8SBuNyDd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTliOGQ4Yy1hNGM5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QfsrXCOzSj-devFlPd8g4cdBS-WGKApPVb7zNbzRl1g=&emci=29cae584-a4c9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=619b8d8c-a4c9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=8943725) name**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60623126/397708611/726536352?ms=em23_230323_acapet_adv_gq_act___tc_ettx&refcode=em23_230323_acapet_adv_gq_act___tc_ettx&source=em23_230323_acapet_adv_gq_act___tc_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230323_acapet_adv_gq_act___tc_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=emlOU2DdSjlhijn8lCH+zI/zGt7lZ46JXuHIQO8ycJhPa5570/b4kFYVKBmawcRyxAxVSSAgQe1Hxb844xQZa8/0ek6jVg5hRJ4zrQ8yKxTok2Qs/9ZHfdOUTF1x2cvKK2YAzlqRGmaYnkhS6bcz0wBD0QiB9xyPZj++BVkft5hkUW/kskRYeLGv8SBuNyDd&refcode2=619b8d8c-a4c9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&contactdata=emlOU2DdSjlhijn8lCH+zI/zGt7lZ46JXuHIQO8ycJhPa5570/b4kFYVKBmawcRyxAxVSSAgQe1Hxb844xQZa8/0ek6jVg5hRJ4zrQ8yKxTok2Qs/9ZHfdOUTF1x2cvKK2YAzlqRGmaYnkhS6bcz0wBD0QiB9xyPZj++BVkft5hkUW/kskRYeLGv8SBuNyDd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTliOGQ4Yy1hNGM5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QfsrXCOzSj-devFlPd8g4cdBS-WGKApPVb7zNbzRl1g=&emci=29cae584-a4c9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=619b8d8c-a4c9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=8943725)

While Republicans and corporate interests have worked round the clock to destroy the ACA, Bob and his colleagues have worked together with President Biden to cut the price of premiums, insulin, and prescription drug costs, to provide funding for community care, and to ensure care providers receive a fair wage.

We can ensure that millions more of our neighbors receive the life-saving care they need at a price they can afford if we work together right now.

But if our progress is slowed by Republican obstruction, many more will lose their lives.

We need to tell Republican politicians that we want them to work with Democrats like Bob to ensure every American has access to care before it's too late.

**[Help keep the pressure on to strengthen the Affordable Care Act and overcome Republican attacks. Add your name now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60623128/397708613/726536352?ms=em23_230323_acapet_adv_gq_act___tc_ettx&refcode=em23_230323_acapet_adv_gq_act___tc_ettx&source=em23_230323_acapet_adv_gq_act___tc_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230323_acapet_adv_gq_act___tc_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=emlOU2DdSjlhijn8lCH+zI/zGt7lZ46JXuHIQO8ycJhPa5570/b4kFYVKBmawcRyxAxVSSAgQe1Hxb844xQZa8/0ek6jVg5hRJ4zrQ8yKxTok2Qs/9ZHfdOUTF1x2cvKK2YAzlqRGmaYnkhS6bcz0wBD0QiB9xyPZj++BVkft5hkUW/kskRYeLGv8SBuNyDd&refcode2=619b8d8c-a4c9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&contactdata=emlOU2DdSjlhijn8lCH+zI/zGt7lZ46JXuHIQO8ycJhPa5570/b4kFYVKBmawcRyxAxVSSAgQe1Hxb844xQZa8/0ek6jVg5hRJ4zrQ8yKxTok2Qs/9ZHfdOUTF1x2cvKK2YAzlqRGmaYnkhS6bcz0wBD0QiB9xyPZj++BVkft5hkUW/kskRYeLGv8SBuNyDd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTliOGQ4Yy1hNGM5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QfsrXCOzSj-devFlPd8g4cdBS-WGKApPVb7zNbzRl1g=&emci=29cae584-a4c9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=619b8d8c-a4c9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=8943725)**

Thank you for joining us in taking action,

clean_body: Bob's asking you to help ensure even more Americans can access affordable care, before it's too late. Peter, Today marks 13 years since the Affordable Care Act became law, giving millions of Americans access to the high-quality health care they deserve. But Republicans in Congress have voted over 70 times to destroy the ACA. They voted to tear health care away from millions of children, families, workers, seniors, and people with life-threatening pre-existing conditions, and if they win back the Senate majority, they're sure to do it again. That's why Bob's asking you to help ensure even more Americans can access affordable care, before it's too late. | | While Republicans and corporate interests have worked round the clock to destroy the ACA, Bob and his colleagues have worked together with President Biden to cut the price of premiums, insulin, and prescription drug costs, to provide funding for community care, and to ensure care providers receive a fair wage. We can ensure that millions more of our neighbors receive the life-saving care they need at a price they can afford if we work together right now. But if our progress is slowed by Republican obstruction, many more will lose their lives. We need to tell Republican politicians that we want them to work with Democrats like Bob to ensure every American has access to care before it's too late. Thank you for joining us in taking action, Team Casey Help Bob Casey defend the Democratic Senate majority. Chip in. name: Aurora Regino
subject: We’re up against an evil unlike anything I’ve seen in my life – and it grows more powerful by the day.
body:
| |
---
| | Peter, I never thought it would be me. I'd seen the news headlines and the crazy videos of activist teachers talking about how they indoctrinated students with ideas about sexuality and gender, against parents' wishes and behind their backs... But I never thought in a million years it would happen to my family. _And then it did._ My 11-year-old daughter went to the guidance counselor, after a death in our family, for help processing that loss. In a meeting that was supposed to help my daughter manage her grief, her guidance counselor convinced her to begin identifying as a boy at school. She went into that office as my daughter and left with a boy's name asking to be called a "he." It took just minutes. All of this was done without my knowledge - and even worse, the school told her to hide all of this from me. [**So, I 'm suing Chico Unified School District with the help of the Center for American Liberty - not for damages, or for emotional distress, but to put an end to its "Parental Secrecy Policy" that directs teachers and staff to hide a child's "social transition" from parents.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62472685:JACMsZG6N:m:1:3391001263:802A92BB4B5819993DC4B75EE0059D15:r) Because when we win this lawsuit, we'll set a precedent nationwide. My daughter might have wanted to tell me about her "new identity" right away - because I'm her mother, she trusts me, and she knows I love her unconditionally. **_But her guidance counselor discouraged her from talking to me about it._** She encouraged her to "come out" to her teachers, her peers - everyone but me. It was two months after the initial meeting by the time I found out what was going on, and it wasn't because the school notified me or because my daughter told me. It was because my daughter told my mother who then told me. And thankfully we were able to put an end to this. My daughter is doing well. She goes by the name I gave her, and knows she is a girl. But I know we were the lucky ones. I know that if the school had its way, my daughter might be on medications and thinking about dangerous surgeries, changing her body forever, putting her own health at risk. And in my state, they could've done all of it behind my back. But I'm not moving; I'm fighting back! Because the truth is, what starts in California never stays here. But I don't stand a chance without you. [**Will you make a generous, tax-deductible donation to my lawsuit today, and take a stand for American children and parental rights?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62472685:JACMsZG6N:m:1:3391001263:802A92BB4B5819993DC4B75EE0059D15:r) We're up against an evil unlike anything I've seen in my life - and it grows more powerful by the day. But the truth is on our side. When patriotic Americans come together, it doesn't matter who stands against us.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
| | Aurora Regino
---

clean_body: | | | | Peter, I never thought it would be me. I'd seen the news headlines and the crazy videos of activist teachers talking about how they indoctrinated students with ideas about sexuality and gender, against parents' wishes and behind their backs... But I never thought in a million years it would happen to my family. And then it did. My 11-year-old daughter went to the guidance counselor, after a death in our family, for help processing that loss. In a meeting that was supposed to help my daughter manage her grief, her guidance counselor convinced her to begin identifying as a boy at school. She went into that office as my daughter and left with a boy's name asking to be called a "he." It took just minutes. All of this was done without my knowledge - and even worse, the school told her to hide all of this from me. Because when we win this lawsuit, we'll set a precedent nationwide. My daughter might have wanted to tell me about her "new identity" right away - because I'm her mother, she trusts me, and she knows I love her unconditionally. But her guidance counselor discouraged her from talking to me about it. She encouraged her to "come out" to her teachers, her peers - everyone but me. It was two months after the initial meeting by the time I found out what was going on, and it wasn't because the school notified me or because my daughter told me. It was because my daughter told my mother who then told me. And thankfully we were able to put an end to this. My daughter is doing well. She goes by the name I gave her, and knows she is a girl. But I know we were the lucky ones. I know that if the school had its way, my daughter might be on medications and thinking about dangerous surgeries, changing her body forever, putting her own health at risk. And in my state, they could've done all of it behind my back. But I'm not moving; I'm fighting back! Because the truth is, what starts in California never stays here. But I don't stand a chance without you. We're up against an evil unlike anything I've seen in my life - and it grows more powerful by the day. But the truth is on our side. Good Afternoon Derek, In my job as the Press Secretary of the Democratic Party of Virginia, I see a LOT of news. But lately, some of the most disturbing headlines have been about Glenn Youngkin. His work to ban abortion, defund our public schools, restrict voting rights, and deprioritize rural areas – like the one I call home – has been stunning. The only thing preventing Youngkin from succeeding in his mission to rebuild Virginia on a foundation of MAGA values has been the Senate Democrats’ “Brick Wall.” This year, all 40 seats in the Virginia Senate and all 100 seats in the Virginia House are up for election. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: “Catastrophic warming”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Peter, we MUST act swiftly.
#
Peter,
The Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change (IPCC) just released their latest major report on climate change, and the outlook is not pretty. The results are in: if we don’t act with the urgency that the climate crisis demands, we will experience unprecedented warming, disasters, and ecological loss.
But the opposite is also true — we still have time to act, so we must. **That’s where you and I come in, Peter.** It’s on us and our progressive coalition to continue to sound the alarm bells about the climate crisis. The GOP majority will do anything they can to double down on climate denial, but our movement is millions strong.
[**I believe we can build on the success of last term’s historic climate policy, but it’s an uphill battle. I need all the support I can get — will you contribute any amount to power our movement?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41480?refcode=em20230323-2301&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2301%2E420207%2ELm5iJg)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41480?refcode=em20230323-2301&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2301%2E420207%2ELm5iJg)**
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41480?refcode=em20230323-2301&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2301%2E420207%2ELm5iJg) [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41480?refcode=em20230323-2301&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=2301%2E420207%2ELm5iJg) [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41480?refcode=em20230323-2301&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=2301%2E420207%2ELm5iJg) **[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41480?refcode=em20230323-2301&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=2301%2E420207%2ELm5iJg)**
---
We did not get to this point by accident. Big oil, coal, and gas companies have lobbied for billions of dollars in subsidies, consolidated near-monopolies, pushed for deregulation, and influenced elections for decades.
**That’s why we’re fighting the influence of corporate money in politics AND pursuing a bold, just, and equitable climate agenda.** The IRA may be the largest climate policy ever passed, but with your support, I know we can do more. We will not give up — I will fight for our future.
[**If you’re with me, chip in $3 or any amount you can spare to power this fight.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41480?refcode=em20230323-2301&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=7&akid=2301%2E420207%2ELm5iJg)
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230323-2301-footer&t=8&refcode2=2301_420207_Lm5iJg&akid=2301%2E420207%2ELm5iJg)**
---

Fellow Conservative,

We thought the government was pressuring Big Tech to censor stories about Hunter Biden’s foreign business dealings and his laptop days before the 2020 presidential election...**then brave journalists exposed the Twitter Files.**

We thought that it was likely that COVID came from a lab. Then FBI Director Christopher Wray confirmed last week that coronavirus likely stemmed from a lab leak in Wuhan.

We thought the Steele Dossier was fake. Then we found out the **Democrats knew the dossier was false but used it to spy on President Trump’s campaign in 2016.**

**With every new bit of infomation we find that the truth is always worse than we thought.**

Whether it is the CDC or the DOJ, the FBI and social media companies taking down posts and limiting speech, **federal agencies are targeting the American people who they are supposed to serve**. And the Democrats? **They always seem to turn a blind eye and move on.**

**I am in Washington to fight for YOU**. I don’t think the government should be targeting people on the Right OR the Left. But I must admit, **this fight has put a HUGE target on my back** , one that will no doubt grow larger as the election approaches, **[which is why I need your help today](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=ac39163cbc6b4e15bfb1f2175b07a6a8&_e=Zsd-C-ara-FGIgEKaIDQo3sxTz8Wmnw5XhDQ6gA9Gv8s2G6CwqNdSW7GkN4hzW62FNYlD2uPRRwiOTkpiQebuN8CNabYTGD-f3Z_eDePQeT3x3-LlVo2SmpM3sgudvKrsPlJEHFDfQMrUHMubBgy05zBrQtXd9iQS7V2xAtJzhvyONkM7y8b919oEDTfbWCke-yWwycKJ955CoRaO9c_KmHmqoYjSVugn9u6uOq_JpcDEsr4iSLS4UWMmlxEyKox5ITFhCgHake7gxJBFWX_ZbayBPcNrq9JhkyT81BuimJ0ViHRW-ot-aUs-p8xggAFOBFmWVwPsvMPTWqc4hHjS3jie6p-yT1qJfclCLwX_zKfldubGKBto9po0DagSkXhYJ__1-0uAYMlSNaa-ij5rxa_q6OVuIS0PW5TfDKf1Izv6eQ4gf2LyZ9Q1CEPpMgq)**.

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

clean_body: We thought the Steele Dossier was fake. Then we found out the Democrats knew the dossier was false but used it to spy on President Trump’s campaign in 2016. | | Fellow Conservative, We thought the government was pressuring Big Tech to censor stories about Hunter Biden’s foreign business dealings and his laptop days before the 2020 presidential election...then brave journalists exposed the Twitter Files. We thought that it was likely that COVID came from a lab. Then FBI Director Christopher Wray confirmed last week that coronavirus likely stemmed from a lab leak in Wuhan. We thought the Steele Dossier was fake. Then we found out the Democrats knew the dossier was false but used it to spy on President Trump’s campaign in 2016. With every new bit of infomation we find that the truth is always worse than we thought. Whether it is the CDC or the DOJ, the FBI and social media companies taking down posts and limiting speech, federal agencies are targeting the American people who they are supposed to serve. And the Democrats? They always seem to turn a blind eye and move on. I am in Washington to fight for YOU. I don’t think the government should be targeting people on the Right OR the Left. But I must admit, this fight has put a HUGE target on my back , one that will no doubt grow larger as the election approaches, . I’ll never stop standing on the frontlines in defense of our constitutionally enshrined liberties. That said, I need my supporters at the ready – because the Democrats will do whatever they can to take me out of Washington. As a personal favor to me, Make no mistake, Fellow Conservative - our way of life is under attack from the Left, and I need my team of top supporters willing to stand by my side to help push back against the assaults on limited government and individual liberty.I need your help to fight back against those who want to transform our great Republic into a socialist utopia. I’m proud to stand with you in defense of liberty. God Bless, Jim Jordan | About Jim Jordan: Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable. subject: Why we're considered "extreme"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
If this is what makes us "extreme," then we wear that label proudly.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20230323-4033-header&t=1&akid=4033%2E2526796%2EHcN45D)
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230323.LS97SO&refcode=em20230323-4033-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4033%2E2526796%2EHcN45D)
If this is what makes us “extreme,” then we wear that label proudly.
We’ve built a movement fighting for each and every one of these issues — from Medicare for All to democratizing fundraising power in politics.
[Can you please donate $3 or anything you can afford right now to keep our movement strong? Your donation sustains Alexandria’s campaign and keeps our team of dedicated organizers doing their work for a dignified wage.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230323.LS97SO&refcode=em20230323-4033-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4033%2E2526796%2EHcN45D)
We really rely on your support. It makes all the difference.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

name: Peter DeFazio
subject: The antidote to this clown show:
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60630907/397716704/553882890?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWVjYmU3MS1hYWM5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fL4wWkU3QOYDXwWrlv7Ey2vmEQz6Cgmjiby8kx9MyWs=&emci=4d77462f-a5c9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=7eecbe71-aac9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=9636579)
---

| | Peter – Over 35 years in Congress, I always used to say I could tell if I was doing a good job or not by who hated me the most. **I'm thrilled to say Val Hoyle has made all the same enemies as me.** And boy, do the powers-that-be come after you when they feel threatened. But, as I say, that's how you know you're doing the right thing. [**I'm putting everything I've got behind Val – and I'm asking you to do the same. Join me in making a contribution of $14 to support a leader who's taking them to task for us in Washington.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60630908/397716705/-1599294071?refcode=2023-03-23-peter&recurring=0&amount=14&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=7eecbe71-aac9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWVjYmU3MS1hYWM5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fL4wWkU3QOYDXwWrlv7Ey2vmEQz6Cgmjiby8kx9MyWs=) Val's exactly what we need in this time of rising extremism in Oregon and across the country – an unapologetic fighter demanding that the wealthy pay their fair share in taxes, that freight rail executives answer for their toxic train derailments, that women have the right to make decisions about their bodies, and that workers get the dignity of paid sick leave to care for themselves and their families. Congress is filled with deeply unserious people right now – career clowns who hire Goldman Sachs execs to write banking bills and who want to allow middle schoolers to work on factory floors. **Val is the remedy to the clown show. She's steadfast, competent, and isn't taking any flack from anyone. clean_body: | | | | Peter – Over 35 years in Congress, I always used to say I could tell if I was doing a good job or not by who hated me the most. I'm thrilled to say Val Hoyle has made all the same enemies as me. And boy, do the powers-that-be come after you when they feel threatened. But, as I say, that's how you know you're doing the right thing. = Val's exactly what we need in this time of rising extremism in Oregon and across the country – an unapologetic fighter demanding that the wealthy pay their fair share in taxes, that freight rail executives answer for their toxic train derailments, that women have the right to make decisions about their bodies, and that workers get the dignity of paid sick leave to care for themselves and their families. Congress is filled with deeply unserious people right now – career clowns who hire Goldman Sachs execs to write banking bills and who want to allow middle schoolers to work on factory floors. Val is the remedy to the clown show. She's steadfast, competent, and isn't taking any flack from anyone. She's facing the first quarterly deadline of the year, and needs our support.= Oregon is lucky to have her and I'm honored to be represented by her. name: Jon Tester
subject: I owe you an explanation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Derek, in just a moment **[I’ll ask you to make a contribution to my campaign before our first public fundraising deadline](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230323-1?refcode=em20230323-1-8300&refcode2=8300_434096_IMGiW-&akid=8300%2E434096%2EIMGiW-)** , but first I hope you’ll give me a moment to explain why it’s so important to give — especially today.
**I’m the most vulnerable Senator up for reelection in 2024** and Republicans have already named me as a top target. Mitch McConnell and his super PAC allies will throw everything they’ve got at me to try to flip my seat red — they’ve already started spending money on attack ads against me.
On top of that, our first end-of-quarter FEC deadline is in 8 days. This will be the first time our fundraising numbers will go public since announcing my official reelection campaign.
It’s a BIG deal. Mitch McConnell and our potential Republican opponents will get to see just how strong (or vulnerable) our campaign is. If McConnell finds any weaknesses in our report, he’ll think Montana is ripe for the taking. **The GOP only needs to flip TWO seats to retake the Senate majority, and they’re laser focused on Montana.**
Let’s be clear: This election isn’t a sure thing. Experts say this race is a toss-up and rank Montana as one of the seats most likely to flip red. That’s why it’s SO important you make a contribution today — everything is on the line.
**[Will you split a contribution between John Fetterman and my campaign today? We need to raise another $27,402 by March 31st to reach our FEC end-of-quarter goal. Your support couldn’t come at a more critical moment:](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230323-1?refcode=em20230323-1-8300&refcode2=8300_434096_IMGiW-&akid=8300%2E434096%2EIMGiW-)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230323-1?refcode=em20230323-8300&refcode2=8300_434096_IMGiW-&akid=8300%2E434096%2EIMGiW-)**
We’ve won tough battles before, and I’m confident we’ll do it again. Thanks for sticking with me.
— JT

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230323-8300-footer&t=1&refcode2=8300_434096_IMGiW-&akid=8300%2E434096%2EIMGiW-)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8300%2E434096%2EIMGiW-)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8300%2E434096%2EIMGiW-)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Roy Cooper
subject: The NC House just passed Medicaid Expansion.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
An update from my office:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60632895/397717473/823540626?refcode=ea.75f5e413-acc9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.75f5e413-acc9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWY1ZTQxMy1hY2M5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cVYAQ0R8_oXOd0Yf1eS_Zxbv74fuGM3xZR7VEFxCvw8=&emci=55df1558-97c9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=75f5e413-acc9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1049176)
Peter — **Earlier today, after years of hard work by many committed people, the North Carolina legislature in a bipartisan vote passed Medicaid Expansion into law.** I look forward to signing it as soon as possible. Expanding Medicaid will help NC families stay healthy and strengthen our communities and our economy. It’s a once-in-a-generation investment in our state that will move us forward. Delivering this deal for North Carolinians has been a top goal of my administration — and a personal priority for me. **Every one of us deserves quality, affordable health care, and now, around 600,000 more of our North Carolina neighbors can access the coverage and care they need.** **[Peter, I’ll let you know when I sign Medicaid Expansion into law. Until then, please join me in congratulating the legislature on their work today to pass this critical bill. Add your name to my message of gratitude here>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60632897/397717474/-309985936?refcode=ea.75f5e413-acc9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.75f5e413-acc9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWY1ZTQxMy1hY2M5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cVYAQ0R8_oXOd0Yf1eS_Zxbv74fuGM3xZR7VEFxCvw8=&emci=55df1558-97c9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=75f5e413-acc9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1049176)** | ******[SIGN ON »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60632898/397717475/-309985936?refcode=ea.75f5e413-acc9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.75f5e413-acc9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWY1ZTQxMy1hY2M5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cVYAQ0R8_oXOd0Yf1eS_Zxbv74fuGM3xZR7VEFxCvw8=&emci=55df1558-97c9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=75f5e413-acc9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1049176)******

clean_body: An update from my office: | Peter — Earlier today, after years of hard work by many committed people, the North Carolina legislature in a bipartisan vote passed Medicaid Expansion into law. I look forward to signing it as soon as possible. Expanding Medicaid will help NC families stay healthy and strengthen our communities and our economy. It’s a once-in-a-generation investment in our state that will move us forward. Delivering this deal for North Carolinians has been a top goal of my administration — and a personal priority for me. Every one of us deserves quality, affordable health care, and now, around 600,000 more of our North Carolina neighbors can access the coverage and care they need. | ****** \- Roy Cooper **=** **=** Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. name: Lucas Kunce
subject: re: our first end-of-quarter goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Our hard work is paying off, but we need your support to keep it up.
#
Hi Peter, it’s Lucas Kunce with an update on our end-of-quarter goal.
Our very first FEC fundraising deadline is exactly one week from tomorrow — and once we submit our numbers, everyone watching our race will be able to see just how much support is behind our grassroots campaign. **So here’s the situation:**
We need to prove that the movement we’re building is strong and ready to win. **That’s why I’m setting a goal of raising 30,000 grassroots donations before March 31 — [and it’s why I need your help today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29781?refcode=em20230323-2874&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2874%2E614464%2EpaNwAI)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Chip in $5 now](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29782?refcode=em20230323-2874&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=2&akid=2874%2E614464%2EpaNwAI) [Chip in another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29781?refcode=em20230323-2874&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2874%2E614464%2EpaNwAI)
---
Since the moment we got into this race, we’ve made Josh Hawley and the GOP insiders supporting him nervous. From launching our campaign on January 6th to calling out Hawley on cable news for being a fraud and a coward, we’ve made a lot of noise — **and now, our hard work is paying off.**
**Just this week, a new poll came out showing Hawley is facing _“intensely negative sentiment”_ in Missouri.** If we can keep getting our message in front of voters and holding Josh accountable, we have a real shot to take this Senate seat back for working people in 2024.
That’s why your support _right now_ is so critical. The only way we’ll be able to keep it up and prove the strength of our grassroots movement is with early support from real people like you. So Peter:
**Over the next 8 days, my team and I are going to work hard to reach our end-of-quarter goal and stay prepared for the fight ahead— including asking supporters like you to chip in $5, $15, $50, or anything at all before next week’s deadline.[Can I count on you to add a donation of any amount to our campaign today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29781?refcode=em20230323-2874&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=2874%2E614464%2EpaNwAI)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29782?refcode=em20230323-2874&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=5&akid=2874%2E614464%2EpaNwAI) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29782?refcode=em20230323-2874&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=6&akid=2874%2E614464%2EpaNwAI) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29782?refcode=em20230323-2874&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=7&akid=2874%2E614464%2EpaNwAI) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29782?refcode=em20230323-2874&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=8&akid=2874%2E614464%2EpaNwAI) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29782?refcode=em20230323-2874&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=9&akid=2874%2E614464%2EpaNwAI) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29782?refcode=em20230323-2874&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=10&akid=2874%2E614464%2EpaNwAI) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29781?refcode=em20230323-2874&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=2874%2E614464%2EpaNwAI)
---
When we flip this seat, I promise you this: **We’re going to shake things up in the U.S. Senate.**
Together, we can end the filibuster and secure voting rights, ban insider trading for members of Congress, abolish corporate PACs, and stand up to Big-Brother-style attacks on abortion access in Missouri and across the country.
We can stop handing out money for Wall Street and forever wars, and start rebuilding our communities. And we can create the next generation of energy jobs right here at home, getting us off fossil fuels forever.
That’s what this movement is fighting for — and I’m glad you’re a part of it.
Let’s hit this goal!
Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230323-2874-footer&t=12&refcode2=2874_614464_paNwAI&akid=2874%2E614464%2EpaNwAI)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=2874%2E614464%2EpaNwAI). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

body:

Fellow Conservative,

We thought the government was pressuring Big Tech to censor stories about Hunter Biden’s foreign business dealings and his laptop days before the 2020 presidential election...**then brave journalists exposed the Twitter Files.**

We thought that it was likely that COVID came from a lab. Then FBI Director Christopher Wray confirmed last week that coronavirus likely stemmed from a lab leak in Wuhan.

We thought the Steele Dossier was fake. Then we found out the **Democrats knew the dossier was false but used it to spy on President Trump’s campaign in 2016.**

**With every new bit of infomation we find that the truth is always worse than we thought.**

Whether it is the CDC or the DOJ, the FBI and social media companies taking down posts and limiting speech, **federal agencies are targeting the American people who they are supposed to serve**. And the Democrats? **They always seem to turn a blind eye and move on.**

**I am in Washington to fight for YOU**. I don’t think the government should be targeting people on the Right OR the Left. But I must admit, **this fight has put a HUGE target on my back** , one that will no doubt grow larger as the election approaches, **[which is why I need your help today](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=49db790adf984542a3b68a801fc796f5&_e=aY6mM7aAQnqq3k8Dh1ZOSWi6qOtstUwTuIqkzlEaxmDtfuDVz9jIEmAE_J8OmAldhc21Iju_1Z5qDRenjlqBj1DMr8E6NAnyucYTqV4zHtGEVDALmUIEiAgBgFwf8xYKVmoT8IOO6aoNxXaLAqFStPjxQBZHqmElotTnLQbn9zZ86482TxjQJUbISY-FEPsE6cNy0wg8iY9dyC7MNXG8xhCnvBC1d-J_7EWwReTY7LLQa9OjO1LFmhoQ4po90yio81XxAHA6W6-ZeI0PxuIGKuWtk8mVLk5FO9qjUUdKdkqmJYHvZYoOxypuuW-VWaTJKnqq7UlIi-H35OoveMyvTgjeBBS4S_DVGPO7f9G_M8Do3YYv3R_m-mDxTAO_fqbg67Kz8kUDqUwu4AKU72vox_xpw2L1b2ScJcV03Zo3y2vxAScsezhLsVZTks53Vyk3)**.

[**CHIP IN $2
HELP ME HOLD GOVERNMENT ACCOUNTABLE-> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=49db790adf984542a3b68a801fc796f5&_e=aY6mM7aAQnqq3k8Dh1ZOSWi6qOtstUwTuIqkzlEaxmDtfuDVz9jIEmAE_J8OmAldhc21Iju_1Z5qDRenjlqBj1DMr8E6NAnyucYTqV4zHtGEVDALmUIEiAgBgFwf8xYKVmoT8IOO6aoNxXaLAqFStPjxQBZHqmElotTnLQbn9zZ86482TxjQJUbISY-FEPsE6cNy0wg8iY9dyC7MNXG8xhCnvBC1d-J_7EWwReTY7LLQa9OjO1LFmhoQ4po90yio81XxAHA6W6-ZeI0PxuIGKuWtk8mVLk5FO9qjUUdKdkp5AibnsK9l6oUAd26nUFIPpvCZzq_r6Od8U542hA2zeBuQjSkpPHnEEy7l70fBLf7HEl_6vgwgXKJxPQv_Gftg-fgqUIFLCjopype1vH2YontT9zBvNBlhshxq3v0udOoOLLQtv0d-aFcH-SeYAew2)
I’ll never stop standing on the frontlines in defense of our constitutionally enshrined liberties. That said, I need my supporters at the ready – because the Democrats will do whatever they can to take me out of Washington.

As a personal favor to me, **[would you please make an immediate contribution of $10 or more right now?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=49db790adf984542a3b68a801fc796f5&_e=aY6mM7aAQnqq3k8Dh1ZOSWi6qOtstUwTuIqkzlEaxmDtfuDVz9jIEmAE_J8OmAldhc21Iju_1Z5qDRenjlqBj1DMr8E6NAnyucYTqV4zHtGEVDALmUIEiAgBgFwf8xYKVmoT8IOO6aoNxXaLAqFStPjxQBZHqmElotTnLQbn9zZ86482TxjQJUbISY-FEPsE6cNy0wg8iY9dyC7MNXG8xhCnvBC1d-J_7EWwReTY7LLQa9OjO1LFmhoQ4po90yio81XxAHA6W6-ZeI0PxuIGKuWtk8mVLk5FO9qjUUdKdkr7p-2feUAw4LogTkhHhPsR0W_eIkmpqUcoTxzsCbjw6camGh3uQYJZIzNSfHVJxoVDvRxL5QLICecxXC1L8m2Fnp4BcX6PktLSBZdPF3hx6i0l0uiM4eofVuzA2euhLXhOIoQ7ldUa3LPtDAPn5QVb) **

[**IT'S OUR TURN TO FIGHT BACK

Make no mistake, Fellow Conservative - our way of life is under attack from the Left, and I need my team of top supporters willing to stand by my side to help push back against the assaults on limited government and individual liberty.**I need your help to fight back against those who want to transform our great Republic into a socialist utopia.**

**[If you’re with me, please make an immediate contribution of $10, $50, $100, $25, or even just $1 right now.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=49db790adf984542a3b68a801fc796f5&_e=aY6mM7aAQnqq3k8Dh1ZOSWi6qOtstUwTuIqkzlEaxmDtfuDVz9jIEmAE_J8OmAldhc21Iju_1Z5qDRenjlqBj1DMr8E6NAnyucYTqV4zHtGEVDALmUIEiAgBgFwf8xYKVmoT8IOO6aoNxXaLAqFStPjxQBZHqmElotTnLQbn9zZ86482TxjQJUbISY-FEPsE6cNy0wg8iY9dyC7MNXG8xhCnvBC1d-J_7EWwReTY7LLQa9OjO1LFmhoQ4po90yio81XxAHA6W6-ZeI0PxuIGKuWtk8mVLk5FO9qjUUdKdkp72K3N8MWn_DH1NT-LInTMrtfNjr3f6jyuo2ag3FGwBVVRA1ffEa_4KAao7LkyjoRS1bDlnV8gMglHNe0iLlAhG2jIZCHmoxzks0Z6iP2AAoJStIqFwGUxCwqcigVH7hqmsAj9WvR6V9tuOciewilS)**

Jim Jordan

| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=49db790adf984542a3b68a801fc796f5&_e=aY6mM7aAQnqq3k8Dh1ZOSWi6qOtstUwTuIqkzlEaxmDtfuDVz9jIEmAE_J8OmAldhc21Iju_1Z5qDRenjlqBj1DMr8E6NAnyucYTqV4zHtGEVDALmUIEiAgBgFwf8xYKVmoT8IOO6aoNxXaLAqFStPjxQBZHqmElotTnLQbn9zZ86482TxjQJUbISY-FEPsE6cNy0wg8iY9dyC7MNXG8xhCnvBC1d-J_7EWwReTY7LLQa9OjO1LFmhoQ4po90yio81XxAHA6W6-ZeI0PxuIGKuWtk8mVLk5FO9qjUUdKdkoxb4lIio63lqL5SH2_fdQlL7oNRvrm6EnSNiUugWr7XhOhAczBU3fuM8O-wi4dxL00aNKwMRB4auq955UEpNkKiC0r--boe_AAw7eQzDow6n0-pOSfk2pWd0aeIGH_ELdV8_Ui2ytcLYbpuGqsTGu6)

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.
