name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: Alert: Joe Biden rallies in Orland Park?
body:
Back-to-back poorly-attended campaign events would make you think Joe Biden was in Orland Park. Turns out power grabs aren't proving to be popular.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/97768fa21d06/alert-joe-biden-rallies-in-orland-park?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=be171686ce-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_23_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-be171686ce-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
https://www.goldentreewealth.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=be171686ce-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_23_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-be171686ce-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Mayor Keith Pekau Attacks, Insults Constituents Online, Proving He's a Better Fit As a Server at Ed Debevic's Than Mayor of Orland Park (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/mayor-keith-pekau-attacks-insults-constituents-online-proving-hes-a-better-fit-as-a-server-at-ed-debevics-than-mayor-of-orland-park.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=be171686ce-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_23_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-be171686ce-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/mayor-keith-pekau-attacks-insults-constituents-online-proving-hes-a-better-fit-as-a-server-at-ed-debevics-than-mayor-of-orland-park.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=be171686ce-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_23_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-be171686ce-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau, top right, walking to the front to address a nearly-empty room at the Orland Park Public Library on March 22, 2023. (Source: Illinois Review)

In 2021, Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau and his slate of hand-picked candidates campaigned (https://keithpekau.com/pop/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=be171686ce-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_23_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-be171686ce-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) on “putting people over politics” and being a voice for everyone, regardless of political parties and affiliations.

“Because of our leadership, Orland Park is primed for success long into the future. We cannot afford to go back to the failures and political games of the past. Stand with us so we can continue to work cooperatively to move Orland Park forward.

Vote for our People Over Politics team: Keith Pekau for Mayor, Gus Lekas for Clerk, and Sean Kampas, Joni Radaszewski, and Brian Riordan for Trustee.”

But that’s not all.

The People Over Politics slate also promised to run the village with the best interests of the people in mind, and not for their “own benefit.”

However, what the residents have witnessed instead, is a mayor obsessed with control – and it’s why he’s pushing a
referendum (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/keith-pekau-ran-in-2017-on-reducing-part-time-mayoral-salary-from-150k-to-40k-now-he-wants-it-back-after-losing-congressional-race.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=be171686ce-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_23_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-be171686ce-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) that would give him virtually unlimited power in Orland Park – making him the most powerful political figure at Village Hall in over forty years.

Question his motives about his latest attempt at a power grab, and he labels you a liar.

Call out his hypocrisy and he labels you a liar.

Pekau governs by fear, and like a
dictator (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/sources-paranoid-pekau-installs-bulletproof-glass-frosts-windows-in-orland-park-village-board-room-making-case-for-security-detail-if-referendum-passes.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=be171686ce-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_23_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-be171686ce-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , he’s always looking for sympathy – manipulating the narrative and changing the script so that he’s always the victim – in every situation.

He’s also a bully and rude, and he frequently attacks women in public comments online – and then deleting those comments, only after they’ve been read by the intended recipient as a form of intimidation.

In one recent example, when Jill Hodge, a constituent, questions Pekau about his “facts” with regards to the referendum, he replies,

“Another lie. Can you say anything truthful?...Facts are stubborn things.”
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/mayor-keith-pekau-attacks-insults-constituents-online-proving-hes-a-better-fit-as-a-server-at-ed-debevics-than-mayor-of-orland-park.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=be171686ce-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_23_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-be171686ce-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau attacking a female constituent online despite campaigning on a “People Over Politics” platform.

In another example, Pekau responds to an online post by Kari Kinnard, who’s also talking about the referendum, writing,

“At the very least make your vote on real/accurate information”
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/mayor-keith-pekau-attacks-insults-constituents-online-proving-hes-a-better-fit-as-a-server-at-ed-debevics-than-mayor-of-orland-park.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=be171686ce-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_23_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-be171686ce-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau attacking a female constituent online despite campaigning on a “People Over Politics” platform.

The shocking and inappropriate comments coming from a public servant who promised to put “people over politics” inspires Kari to respond to the mayor in another post,

“Wow, yet another example of rude and condescending behavior.”
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/mayor-keith-pekau-attacks-insults-constituents-online-proving-hes-a-better-fit-as-a-server-at-ed-debevics-than-mayor-of-orland-park.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=be171686ce-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_23_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-be171686ce-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau attacking constituents online despite campaigning on a “People Over Politics” platform.

Yet again proving that Pekau is a better fit as a waiter at Ed Debevic’s, where being rude and a bully is part of the charm – then serving as the mayor of Orland Park.

Politics is about addition – and Pekau screams subtraction. And the numbers prove it.

During his Get Out The Vote Rally held a few nights ago featuring Jeanne Ives and Deanne Mazzochi, only 46 people attended.

21 were private citizens and 25 were candidates, elected officials and special guests – making the rally look more like a Joe Biden event, who infamously and frequently speaks to half empty rooms on the campaign trail.

The rally originally featured Jeanne Ives and
Richard Porter (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/keith-pekau-rages-against-progressive-school-board-candidate-forum-despite-honoring-progressive-liberal-rep-marie-newman-who-supports-vaccinating-children.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=be171686ce-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_23_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-be171686ce-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , the Republican national committeeman in Illinois and the architect of the failed Richard Irvin for governor campaign, but Porter dropped out at the last minute, opting to speak to a small group of law students instead.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/mayor-keith-pekau-attacks-insults-constituents-online-proving-hes-a-better-fit-as-a-server-at-ed-debevics-than-mayor-of-orland-park.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=be171686ce-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_23_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-be171686ce-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau was forced to change the graphic highlighting his rally after Porter dropped out, opting to speak to a small group of law students instead.

And last night, Pekau held a town hall meeting on the Referendum where only 12 people showed up.

The room at the Orland Park Public Library had been set up for 100 attendees, but as Pekau got up to speak, there were only 12 in the audience.

Sources in the room confirm that within 15 minutes of the event, 5 got up and walked out.

On March 2nd, the ballot initiative
Vote Yes Orland Park (https://voteyesorland.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=be171686ce-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_23_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-be171686ce-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) held a town hall meeting at the library, and over 100 residents showed up to voice their concerns and opposition to Pekau’s latest power grab.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/mayor-keith-pekau-attacks-insults-constituents-online-proving-hes-a-better-fit-as-a-server-at-ed-debevics-than-mayor-of-orland-park.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=be171686ce-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_23_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-be171686ce-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Over 100 residents attend the Vote Yes Referendum meeting, while less than 12 attend Pekau’s Vote No meeting. Pekau is hoping to expand his mayoral powers and he’s encouraging voters to vote "No" on the referendum: "Shall the Village of Orland Park retain the managerial form of government?" (Source: Illinois Review)

Orland Park, a village of just over 50,000 residents, has been a council-manager form of government since 1983 (https://www.chicagotribune.com/suburbs/daily-southtown/ct-sta-orland-park-form-of-government-referendum-st-0118-20230117-lf5fswuikfb33frb7ejkoma43y-story.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=be171686ce-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_23_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-be171686ce-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) . That managerial style relies on a full-time Village Manager who reports directly to the Village Board of Trustees, of which the mayor is the chair.

Orland Park’s current Village Manager has held that position since 2019, after
Pekau (https://www.chicagotribune.com/suburbs/daily-southtown/ct-sta-orland-park-village-manager-st-0508-story.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=be171686ce-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_23_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-be171686ce-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) pushed out the former Village Manager.

But elevating the mayoral position to that of a full-time, Chicago-style mayor, and by effectively eliminating the need for a full-time Village Manager, Pekau would become the most powerful political figure in Orland Park in over forty years.

In Chicago, which has a mayor-council form of government, Mayor Lori Lightfoot has enormous power and influence over city matters.

During the pandemic, Lightfoot exercised her powers and instructed the Chicago Police Department to quietly create a special unit of over 70 police officers to protect her home and office – in addition to the 20 police officers that were already part of her security detail.

Under a mayor-council form of government, Pekau could do the same, instructing the Orland Park police chief to quietly assemble a
special unit (https://chicago.suntimes.com/city-hall/2022/3/28/22985559/mayor-lightfoot-security-dozens-chicago-cops-guard-mayor-family-below-radar-security-unit?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=be171686ce-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_23_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-be171686ce-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) of officers to provide full-time protection (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/orland-park-mayor-keith-pekaus-power-grab-could-give-him-unlimited-power-like-ricahrd-irvin-and-include-a-security-detail-similar-to-lori-lightfoots.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=be171686ce-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_23_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-be171686ce-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) – including a motorcade of SUVs, officers at his home and office, guarding him around the clock, no matter where he is.

And sources confirm that last year, Pekau fortified the Village Hall Board Room, replacing the windows that overlooked a pond, with bulletproof glass – and adding a film that gives a “frosted” look on the glass, to enhance security measures.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/sources-paranoid-pekau-installs-bulletproof-glass-frosts-windows-in-orland-park-village-board-room-making-case-for-security-detail-if-referendum-passes.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=be171686ce-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_23_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-be171686ce-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
The Orland Park Village Hall Board Room before and after renovations that included the installation of bulletproof glass, a secure door and frosted windows. (Sources: YouTube/Village of Orland Park 2020 (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vpUivl7R3GY&t=234s&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=be171686ce-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_23_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-be171686ce-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) & 2023 (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MyFime2PoLw&t=268s&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=be171686ce-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_23_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-be171686ce-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) ; Suburban Chicagoland)

And judging by the upgrades to the Village Hall Board Room, it appears that Pekau is laying the groundwork and making the case that he will require a full-time security detail as the mayor of a village with just over 50,000 residents.

By comparison, Chicago has over 2.7 million residents.

The election is on April 4, 2023.

https://youtu.be/xclc9X_MrZ0?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=be171686ce-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_23_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-be171686ce-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Editor-in-Chief Mark Vargas joins Newsmax to discuss DA Alvin Bragg's biased prosecution of President Donald Trump.

https://www.goldentreewealth.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=be171686ce-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_23_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-be171686ce-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

clean_body: Back-to-back poorly-attended campaign events would make you think Joe Biden was in Orland Park. Turns out power grabs aren't proving to be popular.

name: Team Emerge
subject: Celebrating our bold leaders!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America This email was sent by Emerge America
body:
| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60633394/397718952/-1657939538?&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1167-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA3YjgyN2Y1LWFjYzktZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dimjcNtBbeNJrAVdE0WLIn8-vGFcfuyttoh9yWrN7FU=)
---
Peter, our team celebrates trailblazing Democratic women all year long. Muslim Women’s Day is just around the corner so, before Women’s History Month ends, we want to highlight some of our Muslim Emerge alums. These incredible women are breaking barriers, inspiring our communities, and winning historic firsts across the country.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60633396/397718953/-1657939538?&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1167-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA3YjgyN2Y1LWFjYzktZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dimjcNtBbeNJrAVdE0WLIn8-vGFcfuyttoh9yWrN7FU=)
**State Senator Aisha Wahab (Emerge California)** is the first Muslim and first Afghan American elected to California’s State Senate. Centered in service to her community, Wahab is a dedicated advocate for all Californians struggling to make ends meet. On the campaign trail, she pledged to fight for access to affordable housing, expanding health care coverage, and helping small business owners succeed.
A granddaughter of refugees, **State Representative Ruwa Romman (Emerge Georgia)** made history as the first Muslim woman elected to the Georgia House of Representatives and the first Palestinian American elected to office in the state of Georgia. Before winning her own race, Romman volunteered in every election cycle since 2014 to help flip Georgia blue. Now she’s lifting her voice to protect essential rights, opportunities, and lifesaving health care for all.
**State Representative Sadaf Jaffer (Emerge New Jersey)** broke barriers as the first woman of South Asian descent to serve as mayor in New Jersey. She is also the first Muslim woman ever to serve as mayor in the entire United States! Rising to higher office, Jaffer has continued to serve her community as part of the New Jersey General Assembly – and pave the way for more bold Democratic women!
**Emerge is a champion for women of the New American Majority.** And, we're recruiting and training Muslim women who are at the forefront of every major challenge we face today – from fighting back against hateful policies to securing access to lifesaving health care.
**But none of our crucial work is possible without your support. So please, Peter: ****[Will you donate $10 or more to Emerge now to empower MORE bold Democratic women to run, win, and lead at every level of our government?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60633397/397718955/-1657939538?&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&amount=10&refcode=jtk1167-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA3YjgyN2Y1LWFjYzktZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dimjcNtBbeNJrAVdE0WLIn8-vGFcfuyttoh9yWrN7FU=)**
| | [DONATE NOW ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60633398/397718957/-1657939538?&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&amount=10&refcode=jtk1167-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA3YjgyN2Y1LWFjYzktZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dimjcNtBbeNJrAVdE0WLIn8-vGFcfuyttoh9yWrN7FU=)

The Manhattan grand jury’s decision regarding former President Donald Trump’s hush money case will not be reached this week as previously thought. Fox News has confirmed that the grand jury will not hear any testimony, deliberate, or conduct any votes on the case on Thursday, leading to a postponement of the verdict until next week.

name: Bill Spadea
subject: LIVE in a few minutes (pay less in taxes)
body:
|
---
| Peter, You work hard for your money, and I want you to be able to keep more of it. My good friend and Financial Expert, Rob Gill is going LIVE TONIGHT at 8PM EDT for a Critical Meeting on **“How To Turn Tax Season Into An Opportunity To Pay Less In Taxes, Save Money, And Build Your Wealth".** Remember, Rob has agreed to let our network in on this meeting FOR FREE (spoiler alert: I'll be making an appearance too).
---
| | [CLICK HERE TO ACCESS THE LIVE MEETING NOW](https://xtz223.keap-link007.com/v2/click/608279ca49d6d813094b2a0ad853af1a/eJyNkMEKgkAQht9lzpLlJpE3CRGxOkSdY9Uht3Td1rGy8N1bKzwVdJ35_m_45wGEkkuKMvDgRnfHYWCBxlQogZIWlSSevraOO52wiQWFkKdQV40C7_E1PAD9eMZcC6hVaIjtxl_E0TrcL6N1bEDFtTnxl8adsUETrPxoCV3304uloOBi1DV4pBvs-2TCdKKdLgyfE6nas23smdEVEyG5PvJylFalXVQHIe3b6cza_NKMEyeZ162RcqVQZp9_xNi-1d0TfPBpqQ==)
---
| If the name Rob Gill sounds familiar to you, it's because he is a fellow New Jersey resident and recurring special guest on my live show, Common Ground. Whenever he comes on and reveals financial golden nuggets, the feedback from my audience is incredible.
---
|
---
|
---
# Tonight, Rob is going to teach you proven strategies for building your wealth that have worked for so many people, including me.
# [Click here to access the LIVE meeting now.](https://xtz223.keap-link007.com/v2/click/c7594870706a041b88f38b068862c7ee/eJyNkMEKgkAQht9lzqLlFpI3iQixOkSdY9Uht3Td1rG08N1bK-pS0HXm-7_hnxsQSi4pTMGHhq6uy8ACjYlQAiVNS0k8eWzd8WjIhhbkQh7nuqwV-Lev4TfQjz3GLKBWoSE262Aahav5bhGuIgMqrs2JvzRj76OZLYNwAV3304uFoNnZqCvwSdfY90mF6URbnRs-I1KV7zjYM_YFYyG5PvDCTsrCycu9kE5zPLE2O9eD2I0nVWukXCmU6esfEbZPdXcHezRppw==)

---
|
---
| There are several proven strategies for paying less in taxes, without breaking any laws or putting your financial security at risk... **But the government doesn't want you to know about them.** Our government is constantly looking for ways to keep people trapped in society's broken game plan, and I'm sick of seeing our fellow citizens get taken advantage of by government bureaucrats. For this reason, I've set out on a personal mission to leverage my largest in the state microphone to help spread the word of financial education. If you'd like to learn the most effective ways to reduce your tax bill and keep more of your hard-earned money, **[click here to join the meeting now.](https://xtz223.keap-link007.com/v2/click/6896944e9ae195784eb13abcae13f2f9/eJyNkMEKgkAQht9lzqGpSeQtREI0D1HnWHWoTV23daxMfPfWik4FXWe-_xv-6YFQMEFhDh7c6G7bDkxAYcYlR0F-LYhlz63tzizHmkDJRbFSdSvB67-GP8A4no8R6iRqYrtZ-lGYrPZxmEQalEzpE39p3Lnz0QTrZRjDMPz0YsUpuGh1Ax6pFsc-OdedaKdKzR-JZOOZJo6MccWUC6ZOrDKyujLL-sCFeSvOTne8tNPUThdNp6VMShT5-x8Rdi_18AB5eGml)** This is your opportunity to take advantage of the same tax breaks that millionaires (and billionaires) do. To Your Success, Bill
---
| It’s time for Common Sense ideas and policies to dominate the landscape instead of the vicious and totally counter-productive partisan attacks that only serve to embolden the elite power brokers.You’re a part of the Common Sense Club because you know that we need RESULTS from our government, NOT RHETORIC. Many arrogant, elitist elected officials crushed our way of life during the misguided, unnecessary and deadly lockdowns. Now it’s time to hold them accountable for their actions, ignorance and negligence. The tide is turning, and today is only STEP ONE!

This year’s elections provide a can’t-miss opportunity to support small businesses and families with fiscally responsible policies, restore an education system that puts students and parents over the radical agenda of the NJEA elites, and protect and preserve our civil, economic, and medical liberty.
We believe that our government should serve the people and provide the expected services that we’re paying for! It’s time for government to function as a public service, not a propaganda tool for radicals.
We believe in REDUCING tax burdens on working families AND empowering the skilled trades and small businesses.
We believe our schools should reject Critical Race Theory and the sexualized curricula. It’s time to empower parents and stop the NJEA once and for all.
I hope you’ll join me TODAY as we discuss the results of this year’s critical elections.
If you want to stand with me against the out-of-touch career politicians who are taking New Jersey down the wrong path and help restore Common Sense, you’re in the right place!Please join me during my show tonight, call in to share your thoughts, and watch the results of this year’s elections live as they come in!
Together, we can keep working to restore Common Sense and save New Jersey and America.
Thank you,Bill Spadea
---
|
---
| [Unsubscribe](https://xtz223.infusionsoft.com/app/optOut/0/4fd6eb57577aacb0/5673949/2b4da63a647a26e5) Elect Common Sense 53 South Jefferson Road Suite L Whippany, New Jersey 07981 United States (973) 532-2010
---

subject: 🚨We WON A Massive Victory in Protecting Nebraska's Children
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
We need you in the fight with us now more than ever | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/04be77788ce0/n41kepo7ku?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=3de84b86a8&e=25844e23a8)
---
| | Peter,
---
| We (Senators & the 2nd House) went to battle for our children – **AND WE WON!**

We passed General File today with [LB 574](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=b12c11f5d9&e=25844e23a8), the _“Let Them Grow Act”_ , where gender reassignment surgery for minors will be banned once this becomes law! The filibuster is over and the bill is on to Select File!

_We are grateful to Republican State Senator Kathleen Kauth from Millard, who sponsored this bill, and every legislator who supported and voted in favor of ending the filibuster_. I want to give special acknowledgement to Senator Ray Aguilar from Grand Island for showing up while battling through intense pain to cast his historic vote. I also want to thank Senator Mike Jacobsen from North Platte for his diplomatic efforts on this bill over the weekend. Senator Jacobsen chose Nebraska children over personal financial loss to cast his vote today.

The bill won the vote on cloture despite the nefarious efforts of the new liberal democrat leadership. Now the bill moves on to Select File and Final Reading before it reaches the Governor’s desk.

**The massive support by grandparents, parents, child advocates, and the civically engaged Nebraskans who made their voices heard also helped make this happen! **
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=aa7a590100&e=25844e23a8)
---
| This major hurdle is cause to say **WE ARE WINNING** for the protection of our children _and_ our Conservative values. However, we must also prepare for the continued attacks that **WE KNOW** will come against us from the Radical Left.

To amass more victories, we need you in the fight with us now more than ever, Peter!

We must continue building our momentum, resources, and an army of Nebraska Conservatives so that anti-American billionaires like George Soros have _little_ chance to experience any triumphs over our Patriotic virtues.

If you haven’t signed up to be a part of our **[2nd House Legislative Task Force](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=5acb153889&e=25844e23a8)** , I encourage you to do so today!

**[When you chip in even $5, $10, or $25, you are helping us to fight anti-American adversaries so that we are victorious in preserving our Republican values.](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=f3bd473128&e=25844e23a8)**
---

name: Grace Jo
subject: Fox News Segment: How I escaped North Korea
body:
The first time I tried to escape the regime, I was only 6 years old as we fled over a mountain.

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0fd8098a67944008a3a28151902ed6e6&_e=8BnaFPvIr4KPBuf1vva2EDwnLLVTVT-qJX83GshPk0y7hl_V0Hk-8LmNkRAfwsSBjO7Upk_9X18F1OpFEcmEYmfc3EFn-Rz70-NdPO4zvRNl9zLTSjJFFZiH8AgH60OXqhlGAEQss2JIxTICHmZu-2Jr-p21tEsVecUezFVaBdGCLNknQe5O8GQbZIinH5zJYdqCNI2x9g5JeQ5INl3FxTIR9x-fHcHhHpg-PaJ9wpFrtdYZiPxLwKDs-7ndE6nhZOfbAOUokRZDGpHXo_o2SQ%3D%3D)
Hello Friend,

Fox News recently invited me to appear and speak with Rachel Campos-Duffy about how I escaped North Korea.

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0fd8098a67944008a3a28151902ed6e6&_e=8BnaFPvIr4KPBuf1vva2EDwnLLVTVT-qJX83GshPk0y7hl_V0Hk-8LmNkRAfwsSBjO7Upk_9X18F1OpFEcmEYmfc3EFn-Rz70-NdPO4zvRNl9zLTSjJFFZiH8AgH60OX8ajTWYyII0D9LcbcqokuabTcqThHb2i8K6bnKoodyszPco_3CNvS82b14F1ADcQUsE8C_W__fQDMXuALDqiMs2YWuS7X4L7s3bs9HCPk2bpILnSmNFdZ_7aoAe8MOreKxqfkgSYbhNEA8N4xNB0dSw%3D%3D)

_The first time I tried to escape the regime, I was only 6 years old as we fled over a mountain.**My mother even had to carry me in her backpack as she held my sister 's hand and swum across a river into China.**

But we were caught and sent back. This happened several times...

In North Korea, it is easy for the government to control everyone through starvation. From the moment I woke up to the moment I went to sleep, all I could think about was my next meal. That's all anyone could think about. _

That's only a small part of my story.

Thanks to the Dissident Project, I can share my story with students across the country. The Dissident Project provides high schools with informed, intelligent speakers with firsthand experience with authoritarianism, like me.

We provide this at no cost to the schools or students, which is why I am working to raise $5,000 this month.

[_**Friend, will you help fight authoritarianism with a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to rush your support >>>**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0fd8098a67944008a3a28151902ed6e6&_e=8BnaFPvIr4KPBuf1vva2EDwnLLVTVT-qJX83GshPk0y7hl_V0Hk-8LmNkRAfwsSBjO7Upk_9X18F1OpFEcmEYmfc3EFn-Rz70-NdPO4zvRNl9zLTSjJFFZiH8AgH60OXfPqeXMp197-4S1u1CrVDL44aIFbTnvOHfXLRpyFEU_UGgea9GvkJCbvbwRex8RAd4-jtj4zpkwI2o97m0B5ZoIQ06nabgrUsmNuB-VhIUGDgwXPyg2X5rdrhry1n0BoWWa5JEgRV-oFu1QjuM2Hc1A%3D%3D)

**Socialism is the worse government in the world. It kills people.**

High school students need to hear about the horrors of socialism and how it takes away everything and everyone you love. They don't know what it feels like to lay there, starving. Or how the government will punish you for merely doing whatever you can to survive.

Many students today think socialism is fair and equitable. Without hearing about experiences like mine, they will never have the chance to know about the true horrors until it's too late.

**Freedom is very precious in the United States, so we are responsible for protecting it for the future.**

Dissident Project speakers know how to connect our experiences to the principles that have made America prosperous and why we must defend them.

[_**Will you help us turn our experiences into a powerful warning for high school students? clean_body: The first time I tried to escape the regime, I was only 6 years old as we fled over a mountain. Hello Friend, Fox News recently invited me to appear and speak with Rachel Campos-Duffy about how I escaped North Korea. The first time I tried to escape the regime, I was only 6 years old as we fled over a mountain.My mother even had to carry me in her backpack as she held my sister 's hand and swum across a river into China. But we were caught and sent back. This happened several times... In North Korea, it is easy for the government to control everyone through starvation. From the moment I woke up to the moment I went to sleep, all I could think about was my next meal. That's all anyone could think about. That's only a small part of my story. Thanks to the Dissident Project, I can share my story with students across the country. The Dissident Project provides high schools with informed, intelligent speakers with firsthand experience with authoritarianism, like me. We provide this at no cost to the schools or students, which is why I am working to raise $5,000 this month. Socialism is the worse government in the world. It kills people. High school students need to hear about the horrors of socialism and how it takes away everything and everyone you love. They don't know what it feels like to lay there, starving. Or how the government will punish you for merely doing whatever you can to survive. Many students today think socialism is fair and equitable. Without hearing about experiences like mine, they will never have the chance to know about the true horrors until it's too late. Freedom is very precious in the United States, so we are responsible for protecting it for the future. Dissident Project speakers know how to connect our experiences to the principles that have made America prosperous and why we must defend them. We've spoken to 27 so far. But we're not even close to done - we have 50 engagements in total this year. Your generous gift provides this once-in-a-lifetime experience to schools for no charge. Can I count on you to help me share my story?Click any link below to donate. Thank you, Grace Jo The Dissident Project is a program of Young Voices, a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. All donations are tax-deductible and will be acknowledged via email receipt. Donations made to the Dissident Project will be spent exclusively on that program. name: Wisconsin Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: Wisconsin Republicans are getting desperate
body:
Republicans are resorting to political tricks to restrict abortion in the midst of a pending lawsuit around the state’s outdated 1849 abortion ban | | |
---
| | Wisconsin Republicans are nothing short of extreme. And right now, they’re resorting to political tricks to restrict abortion in the midst of a pending lawsuit around the state’s outdated 1849 abortion ban. **They’re desperate – they know that if progressive candidate Janet Protasiewicz wins next month’s Wisconsin Supreme Court race, the ban could be repealed.** But Republican-backed candidate Dan Kelly is staunchly anti-abortion – he’s been endorsed by multiple extreme anti-abortion groups like Pro-Life Wisconsin, which only endorses candidates that support **abortion bans with no exceptions.** **That’s why it’s vital that we work to build our state Democratic power in Wisconsin and across the country – to defend abortion rights from state Republicans’ ruthless attacks.** [Will you chip in $7 right now to elect Democrats who will stand up to GOP attacks on abortion rights in state legislatures across the country?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zawayJU7NskUpAoU2FWeYrq1lFR55S3_Ci6S1MgB3mGxXecvZOwRWZ7ufIW6Moqt8MM9nbKyZs0eenU98lKk0cBbbUwIscCaZhHYZVabV0SgNbEDRsqLNqcD_rW4-tZ-Me3eekzrnt3G4rRf0SxDAH3Ish4xqTF8UFtWnl9COAG0FmSlm32CMyYEXRsjEBFXcqGZzNUFOg5rLHRjRDw-GZ5ZC68sa8D1cGry2PqpKKcnCP7Gq6yI6HWmpH-55jE7h8lhHHUT4ih9q-OmwPMNTLwCMcqsf0MyWWAZOzEOhJUIShEoieE67ZyXh8GkQbYFPmHcDT-_A6Mgr28gXqyvkvNnhmSWSXZGcWMNu6Cq4cZS_pkOZv6JaWWcv8OugY6e01KdXY2kQ5YCDEAyhJ-IZCOgefuOnhivWcx1D4r5CuQUE-pFTxi6Ons6zNrUcWp0lbkQ_2ezM8uckeMrPePHB8e9Ds5WbIBIJh1TA8hG-GWA32nFb8YJvBktYjuPyUoqGON2ekvFZhog0PimQdxjD1FQlmT7GKInZiK8Kj-FZ8qA/3uq/5DXSD60sSuqMVQTxLG7ZpQ/h0/2G8mIbVVdtSIDF1WlRUr1cLh0RJR_TjHz3ZyNIo49W0) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

When Democratic Gov. Evers called a special session to repeal the obsolete law – written before women could even vote – and create a ballot measure, Republicans immediately _refused._ **Wisconsin Republicans _know_ their anti-abortion agenda is unpopular, but they don’t care.**
The GOP is pouring _millions of dollars_ into Wisconsin ahead of next month’s pivotal election – so we need to mobilize around state Democrats _now_ to give them the support they need to WIN against their anti-abortion opponents in state legislative races nationwide.

clean_body: Republicans are resorting to political tricks to restrict abortion in the midst of a pending lawsuit around the state’s outdated 1849 abortion ban | | | | | Wisconsin Republicans are nothing short of extreme. And right now, they’re resorting to political tricks to restrict abortion in the midst of a pending lawsuit around the state’s outdated 1849 abortion ban. They’re desperate – they know that if progressive candidate Janet Protasiewicz wins next month’s Wisconsin Supreme Court race, the ban could be repealed. But Republican-backed candidate Dan Kelly is staunchly anti-abortion – he’s been endorsed by multiple extreme anti-abortion groups like Pro-Life Wisconsin, which only endorses candidates that support abortion bans with no exceptions. That’s why it’s vital that we work to build our state Democratic power in Wisconsin and across the country – to defend abortion rights from state Republicans’ ruthless attacks. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | When Democratic Gov. Evers called a special session to repeal the obsolete law – written before women could even vote – and create a ballot measure, Republicans immediately refused. Wisconsin Republicans know their anti-abortion agenda is unpopular, but they don’t care. The GOP is pouring millions of dollars into Wisconsin ahead of next month’s pivotal election – so we need to mobilize around state Democrats now to give them the support they need to WIN against their anti-abortion opponents in state legislative races nationwide. | | Friend, **The fight isn’t over. The fight has only just begun. ** As we welcome the Republican controlled house, we undertake an era of divided government. The Democratic rule is officially over, and house Republicans have promised to hold the out-of-touch Democrats accountable by launching major investigations. YET, this won’t stop the Democratic-controlled Senate from taking advantage of their majority and passing restrictive gun bills that harm law-abiding gun owners like **YOU** – as they continue to do nothing to prevent the rising crime rates facing our major cities.

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: I am writing to ask if you can please make a contribution, of any amount today. Link inside the email as well as why this ask matters. Thanks. - Ruben
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
I thought long and hard about the decision to run for the United States Senate.

| Peter,

Impulsive, emotional decisions are out of character for me.

I am the guy who had a four-year plan to get into Harvard even though my family was dirt poor.

So I thought long and hard about the decision to run for the United States Senate.

I prepared for it long before the possibility of Senator Sinema’s party switch.

I came to the conclusion that as a Marine, a Latino, and someone with a record of standing up for working people, we can build a coalition that can win a 2-way race, 3-way race, 27-way race... doesn’t matter.

The only open question was whether the grassroots support would be there. And I thought it would be. So far, I’ve been right.

So I am asking:

[_**Can you please use this link to split $5, $10 or whatever you can afford between Fight for Progress and my campaign? The amount isn’t as important as the donation, because it all adds up when we’re all chipping in. So please.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60635085/397727575/880176479?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230323-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc0MDRmODUzLWI1YzktZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KxpP8P4Re5Bd_5P_G7dlrwFLpVB8C62lhH-DSmedbTc=)

name: Greta Presley
subject: It’s a pleasure to finally meet you, Peter!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign
body:
Let me tell you about my brother. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60635657/397728478/17860314?refcode=ea.6504f853-b5c9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.6504f853-b5c9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjUwNGY4NTMtYjVjOS1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-oR0yvduWaZOkrOIbn1rm3BqWQOCJKyK9ixptC24dCE=)
---
Hey there, Peter!

I’m Greta Presley — Brandon’s big sister (that’s me with him in the picture below!). [Before we get into it, can I ask you for a little help? We're hoping to get some donations, of any amount, before the end of today to support Brandon's vision for a better Mississippi. Would you be willing to chip in? Every little bit counts!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60635664/397728483/-1470085607?refcode=ea.6504f853-b5c9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.6504f853-b5c9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjUwNGY4NTMtYjVjOS1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-oR0yvduWaZOkrOIbn1rm3BqWQOCJKyK9ixptC24dCE=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60635670/397728492/-1470085607?refcode=ea.6504f853-b5c9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.6504f853-b5c9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjUwNGY4NTMtYjVjOS1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-oR0yvduWaZOkrOIbn1rm3BqWQOCJKyK9ixptC24dCE=) _Greta and Brandon together._ I have never seen anyone as dedicated to serving the people as Brandon is, and I say this with great pride. Brandon’s commitment to improving the lives of Mississippians, especially those who are often forgotten or neglected, is truly inspiring.

My brother has many accomplishments through his years of public service, but the one that makes me proudest is how he brought high-speed internet to some of the most rural places in north Mississippi. I remember riding around with him and seeing the excitement in the tiny Carolina community when they started hanging fiber on those poles.

It was emotional for me to see the impact he was having on people's lives.

He understands the struggles of working people and small communities. He understands the challenges they face, and he has been working tirelessly to address them.

Brandon has even reached out across the aisle to get things done. He truly cares about the people of Mississippi, and he has the drive and determination to make a real difference.

Now, he’s ready to fight for the Magnolia State as governor and deliver on the kitchen table issues that matter like Medicaid extension and good-paying jobs.

But he can’t do it without your support. As you know, campaigns are expensive, and we need your help to ensure that Brandon has the resources he needs to spread his message of hope across the state.

I am so proud of Brandon’s campaign, but even more grateful that you believe in my brother as much (or almost as much) as I do.

[And so I hope you’ll join me in supporting Brandon’s journey to be the next Mississippi Governor with a donation (of any amount) before the end of today >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60635683/397728499/-1470085607?refcode=ea.6504f853-b5c9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.6504f853-b5c9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjUwNGY4NTMtYjVjOS1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-oR0yvduWaZOkrOIbn1rm3BqWQOCJKyK9ixptC24dCE=) | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60635698/397728517/-1470085607?refcode=ea.6504f853-b5c9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.6504f853-b5c9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjUwNGY4NTMtYjVjOS1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-oR0yvduWaZOkrOIbn1rm3BqWQOCJKyK9ixptC24dCE=)**

---
Bullhorns don’t cause crime. But Jeff Brown wants to take away the funding for pre-K, community schools, and quality parks and recreation centers and libraries because it takes money out of his pockets. Denying educational opportunities and disinvesting in Black and Brown communities is at the heart of Philadelphia’s violence crisis. As Mayor, I won’t strip our communities of the vital resources they need to thrive.
I’ve won historic investments in communities and led the charge to treat the gun violence crisis like the emergency that it is. I restored nurses and counselors to our public schools, created an eviction prevention program that kept 50,000 families with a roof over their heads, and established new laws like Fair Workweek that ensured stable work schedules for hourly workers.
Meanwhile, Jeff Brown plans to undo Fair Workweek because he doesn’t want to give his employees the basic dignity of a reliable schedule and predictable paycheck.
Philadelphia cannot afford to put more people like Jeff in power. Our city is no stranger to politicians who act solely in the name of self-interest and profit while the rest of our city struggles. We need someone who understands that the work of the next mayor is not about transactional charity, but real change from someone who has delivered it all her life.
[**When people are being hurt and harmed, I’ve never sat on the sidelines. Chip in to our campaign today and help us fight back against Jeff Brown and the millions that he’s spending on deceiving TV ads.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60637072/397734027/1688789995?refcode=AU_HHG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230323_PM1_V3_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjAwNjk2ZC1iOWM5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zsqASDMRb6DMtnjPa_TlFJ2X2_ul80NWbU7Tz0ccRNU=)
I’m the candidate who helped launch our city’s first mental health mobile crisis response units – freeing up officers to focus on solving violent crime. I also worked with the Department of Justice to transform one of the most dangerous high schools in the state, South Philly High, into a safe place to learn in less than two years.
Also, remind me: what has Jeff Brown done to make our communities safer? What does a rich, out-of-touch guy like him know about solving crime? He only moved to the city a few years ago from South Jersey – and he paid for his Rittenhouse Square mansion in cash, by the way. Let’s set the record straight here.
I’ve spent an entire career fighting back against arrogant millionaires who feel entitled to power at the people’s expense. And I have no plans to stop now.
As Mayor, my top priority will be to ensure that every Philadelphian is safe and feels safe. That means getting illegal guns off our streets; reducing 911 response times; providing interventions to stop those in the path of violence; and supporting victims of violence in their path to recovery.
While candidates like Jeff Brown are running self-funded campaigns, my campaign is powered by grassroots support, small donations, and people like us who believe in the future of this city.
Thanks for standing with us. Your support really means the world.
Helen

Helen Gym is a Philly mom, a school teacher, a community organizer, and former City Councilmember. She has been fighting for Philly families and communities for decades — winning more resources for our schools, safer communities, and a more affordable Philadelphia. Our efforts are supported by everyday people like you who give what they can, whenever they can, because they want to see a safer, more prosperous, equitable Philadelphia that works for all of us. name: Shontel Brown
subject: The ACA turns 13!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
A record-breaking 16 million Americans signed up for coverage this year.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60637259/397734651/-520124032?refcode=EM_FR_230323ACAAnni_N_TB_90DO_5_G_TESTA_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTYyZTFiNC1iOWM5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JCrv0FBzfKB9-zhSs5Ws4N5mQBuzxLmobDUBr6BDGTI=) The Affordable Care Act turns 13 today, Peter.

As we celebrate the anniversary of Democrats’ groundbreaking advances in expanding health care access, Congresswoman Shontel Brown wanted to share a special message on why the fight for health care access is still her top priority. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60637260/397734652/-520124032?refcode=EM_FR_230323ACAAnni_N_TB_90DO_5_G_TESTA_p1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTYyZTFiNC1iOWM5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JCrv0FBzfKB9-zhSs5Ws4N5mQBuzxLmobDUBr6BDGTI=) **More than 16 million Americans now have access to health care thanks to the ACA,** but the work expanding affordable health care didn’t stop with its passage. In the last year, Democrats have built on the ACA’s promise of lower health care costs by capping the price of insulin, making most vaccines free, and empowering Medicare to lower prescription drug costs.

But as the last decade has shown, our progress is constantly under attack. The GOP has adamantly fought the ACA for the last decade, voting over 50 times to repeal it with no replacement in sight.

Peter, we have no doubt that if Republicans take control of the Senate, and the Presidency, too, they'll repeal the ACA. And if they succeed, more than **40 million Americans** would lose their health insurance, another **69 million** could lose Medicaid benefits, and **100 million** would lose protections for pre-existing conditions.

[**_That’s why we need your help, Peter. Millions of Americans rely on the health care coverage provided by the ACA. Without it, they’ll lose a critical safety net that every American deserves. So, Peter, will you contribute $1 or whatever you can afford to help further the fight to keep America healthy?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60637261/397734653/-520124032?refcode=EM_FR_230323ACAAnni_N_TB_90DO_5_G_TESTA_l1&amount=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTYyZTFiNC1iOWM5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JCrv0FBzfKB9-zhSs5Ws4N5mQBuzxLmobDUBr6BDGTI=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$1 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60637262/397734654/-849735382?refcode=EM_FR_230323ACAAnni_N_TB_90DO_5_G_TESTA_EL1&express_lane=true&amount=1&refcode2=EL1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTYyZTFiNC1iOWM5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JCrv0FBzfKB9-zhSs5Ws4N5mQBuzxLmobDUBr6BDGTI=)**

clean_body: A record-breaking 16 million Americans signed up for coverage this year. = The Affordable Care Act turns 13 today, Peter. As we celebrate the anniversary of Democrats’ groundbreaking advances in expanding health care access, Congresswoman Shontel Brown wanted to share a special message on why the fight for health care access is still her top priority. = More than 16 million Americans now have access to health care thanks to the ACA, but the work expanding affordable health care didn’t stop with its passage. In the last year, Democrats have built on the ACA’s promise of lower health care costs by capping the price of insulin, making most vaccines free, and empowering Medicare to lower prescription drug costs. But as the last decade has shown, our progress is constantly under attack. The GOP has adamantly fought the ACA for the last decade, voting over 50 times to repeal it with no replacement in sight. Peter, we have no doubt that if Republicans take control of the Senate, and the Presidency, too, they'll repeal the ACA. And if they succeed, more than 40 million Americans would lose their health insurance, another 69 million could lose Medicaid benefits, and 100 million would lose protections for pre-existing conditions. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Onward, Shontel Brown As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. Will you join her and be the change we need? = Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress Shontel Brown for Congress PO Box 221232 Beachwood, OH 44122 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

body:
That’s what Tucker Carlson called them this week.
#
Hey Derek,
“Patriotic Americans.”
That’s what Tucker Carlson called them this week. The insurrectionists who stormed the Capitol on January 6th were “patriotic Americans who dared to question the official story of the 2020 election.”
More lies. And they won’t quit, either. That’s EXACTLY why we need to ban Tucker and the other lying FOX hosts on base.
The Military spends hundreds of millions of dollars every year training our troops to resist disinformation. And for good reason.
Weaponized disinformation from our adversaries can undermine the entire force. We know that. But so far, disinformation from FOX gets a pass. That’s got to stop.
We’re building a critical mass to push the Pentagon to prevent these lies from broadcasting anywhere our troops serve. And we need you with us.

subject: Do you support free speech?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KIGGANS FOR CONGRESS**
body:
Your most fundamental right! | | | | [ ](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=b08039fdf5&e=4955722b3e)
---
| | | [ ](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=4fa62a901f&e=4955722b3e)
---
| Dear Peter,
As your Congresswoman, it is my duty to protect your constitutional rights as well as those of every other citizen in VA-02. I am proud to tell you that I recently had the opportunity to support the Protecting Speech from Government Interference Act.
In recent years, we have seen instances where conservative individuals and organizations have been targeted by government entities for expressing their opinions. **This is a direct violation of your First Amendment rights and cannot be allowed to continue.**
---
| [Do You Support Free Speech? >>>](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=a04a263515&e=4955722b3e "Do You Support Free Speech? >>>")
---
| [Yes >>>](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=338f244f84&e=4955722b3e "Yes >>>")
---
| [No >>>](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=d4daa6348d&e=4955722b3e "No >>>")
---
| The Protecting Speech from Government Interference Act prohibits government officials from using their authority to influence, manipulate or control online speech.
I am proud to support this bill and will continue to fight for the rights of every constituent in VA-02. **Your voices matter, and I am committed to ensuring that they are heard loud and clear.**
_**[Can you contribute today to protect your First Amendment rights?](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=647d003e8d&e=4955722b3e)**_

With Gratitude, Jen Kiggans

name: Phoebe Melchiskey, Run On Climate
subject: Exciting partnership
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
We’re teaming up with the Jane Fonda Climate PAC to elect climate champions to local offices across the country.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60637485/397735701/1301667735?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230323-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZmMDlkMTExLWJjYzktZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JzC1NCNvd7QjV-o0Pcq_lg8f_lS4uul8Y-Tb3xb7aco=)
---
Hi friend,

My name is Phoebe and I’m the Operations Director at Run On Climate, an organization devoted to electing climate champions to local office and helping them pass bold climate policy once elected.

With limited time to avoid the most severe impacts of the climate crisis, and with so much work left to be done, **we need to be making change at ALL levels of government.**

That’s why **we’re teaming up with the Jane Fonda Climate PAC to elect climate champions to local offices across the country.** Once elected, Run On Climate will work with these local leaders to **enact some of the strongest climate policies ever passed in the U.S.** These bold policies will have ripple effects, spreading to other municipalities and eventually up to the state and federal level.

[_**Support Run On Climate and Jane Fonda Climate PAC to ensure bold local climate action in 2023.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60637486/397735702/-1105260267?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230323-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZmMDlkMTExLWJjYzktZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JzC1NCNvd7QjV-o0Pcq_lg8f_lS4uul8Y-Tb3xb7aco=)

We cannot do this work alone, which is why I’m thrilled that the Jane Fonda Climate PAC and my team will be working together to end the era of fossil fuels before it’s too late. Together we will have a far greater impact, and similarly, we will have a far greater impact working with YOU than if you sit this out.

[_**Join Jane Fonda Climate PAC and Run On Climate in electing climate champions to local office.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60637487/397735703/-1105260267?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230323-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZmMDlkMTExLWJjYzktZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JzC1NCNvd7QjV-o0Pcq_lg8f_lS4uul8Y-Tb3xb7aco=)

We’re honored to be doing this work alongside incredible activists and human beings like Jane Fonda. We hope you will join us in this work as well, either with a contribution or by volunteering your time and energy (or running for local office yourself!) to help us advance bold climate action at the local level in communities across the country. Thank you for all you do.

[_**Let’s help climate champions pass bold policy in communities across the U.S.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60637488/397735704/-1105260267?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230323-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZmMDlkMTExLWJjYzktZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JzC1NCNvd7QjV-o0Pcq_lg8f_lS4uul8Y-Tb3xb7aco=)

In Solidarity,
Phoebe Melchiskey
Operations Director
Run On Climate

* * *
| | [ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60637489/397735705/931979156?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230323-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZmMDlkMTExLWJjYzktZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JzC1NCNvd7QjV-o0Pcq_lg8f_lS4uul8Y-Tb3xb7aco=)

clean_body: We’re teaming up with the Jane Fonda Climate PAC to elect climate champions to local offices across the country. | = Hi friend, My name is Phoebe and I’m the Operations Director at Run On Climate, an organization devoted to electing climate champions to local office and helping them pass bold climate policy once elected. With limited time to avoid the most severe impacts of the climate crisis, and with so much work left to be done, we need to be making change at ALL levels of government. That’s why we’re teaming up with the Jane Fonda Climate PAC to elect climate champions to local offices across the country. Once elected, Run On Climate will work with these local leaders to enact some of the strongest climate policies ever passed in the U.S. These bold policies will have ripple effects, spreading to other municipalities and eventually up to the state and federal level. = We cannot do this work alone, which is why I’m thrilled that the Jane Fonda Climate PAC and my team will be working together to end the era of fossil fuels before it’s too late. Together we will have a far greater impact, and similarly, we will have a far greater impact working with YOU than if you sit this out. = We’re honored to be doing this work alongside incredible activists and human beings like Jane Fonda. We hope you will join us in this work as well, either with a contribution or by volunteering your time and energy (or running for local office yourself!) to help us advance bold climate action at the local level in communities across the country. Thank you for all you do. = In Solidarity, Phoebe Melchiskey Operations Director Run On Climate | | = Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. name: Adam Schiff
subject: It’s still a BFD
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| This landmark legislation lowered health care costs, protected those with pre-existing conditions, and increased the number of insured Americans by the tens of millions.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1986%2E5257348%2EWGb-Rs)
Derek — 13 years ago, on this day, President Barack Obama signed into law the _Affordable Care Act._ And it’s still a BFD, as Joe Biden put it.
This landmark legislation lowered health care costs, protected those with pre-existing conditions, and increased the number of insured Americans by the tens of millions.
The legacy of the _Affordable Care Act_ is remarkable. It truly changed the lives of so many hard-working people across the country.
But since the passage of the ACA 13 years ago, what have Republicans done to further improve health care? Worse than nothing.
They voted to repeal the act _dozens_ of times — without success. They petitioned the courts to get the act overturned or ruled unconstitutional, also without success. They’ve run candidate after candidate on the platform of repealing the _Affordable Care Act,_ and well, Derek, we still have the ACA so clearly not successful there either.
Their latest play? **Proposing budget cuts that would gut the _Affordable Care Act_ and Medicaid programs.**
That’s right: they’re willing to let 40 million Americans lose their ACA or Medicaid insurance coverage. They don’t care if seniors and people with disabilities end up with worse home care. They don’t care that 100 million Americans with pre-existing conditions face steeper costs for their care.
That is what today’s GOP sees as a winning strategy. Taking away health care, making it more expensive, and stripping key protections for millions.
The cruelty is astounding.
We are in the richest nation in the world, and we should have a health care system that reflects it:
**That is why we must have truly universal health care. Health care is a right — not a privilege, and it’s high time we expand coverage and lower costs for every American.**
This isn’t just a political talking point. It’s a moral imperative. Navigating our health care system is still a challenge for so many, and too many folks struggle to find the care they need at a price they can afford.
Now is our opportunity, with President Biden in the White House, to expand Medicare coverage.
Look, I understand that this policy change cannot happen overnight. But **[Derek, I’m ready to get to work in the Senate to make this a reality, and I’m hoping you’ll add your name alongside mine in a commitment to fight for Medicare for All.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230323-m4a.bQ_aAv&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230323_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=1986%2E5257348%2EWGb-Rs)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230323-m4a.bQ_aAv&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230323_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=1986%2E5257348%2EWGb-Rs)
---
Thank you for your support of this important work. As I said — health care is a right, and it’s one worth fighting for.
— Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230323-m4a.bQ_aAv&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230323_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=1986%2E5257348%2EWGb-Rs)

---

Dear Patriot,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62473507:6Va8kZGNX:m:1:3331421248:BEBBC9D0937880E977CBDEFD542FEE71:r) [ **If you 're sick of the FBI treating Americans' Constitutional rights like _trash_ , it's absolutely crucial for you to give a critical donation immediately. ** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62473507:6Va8kZGNX:m:1:3331421248:BEBBC9D0937880E977CBDEFD542FEE71:r)

My associate, attorney Roger Roots, has filed a motion to dismiss the government's bogus case against innocent American Dominic Pezzola.

In fact, he's filed for a mistrial.

Not only because Tucker Carlson revealed videos that prove the government suppressed video evidence that can clear January 6 defendants of their alleged crimes.

**But because the government illegally monitored communications between at least one attorney and his January 6 defendant ...and the FBI DESTROYED EVIDENCE AND FABRICATED EVIDENCE to railroad innocent patriots! **

The FBI admitted that in electronic documents they thought had been erased.

Patriot, this is a critically important, breaking story. Very few Americans know what you just read.

Expect to see much more about this on cable news and hear much more about on conservative talk radio.

**What the FBI is doing to innocent January 6 protesters is VICIOUS and ILLEGAL.**

And I'm not going to let them get away with it.

I'm going to fight tooth and nail in court for each of the 30 patriots who desperately depend on you and me to defend them.

As you know, they face years, even decades, in prison for crimes they didn't commit.

They need all the help they can get.

And to be frank, so does NCLU. We need lawyers, paralegals, investigators, and more to help build our cases and to fight for our clients in the courtroom.

**We 're stretched to the breaking point.**

[ **Patriot, please help NCLU fully fund each of these critical cases with your very best gift of at least a vital donation immediately.** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62473507:6Va8kZGNX:m:1:3331421248:BEBBC9D0937880E977CBDEFD542FEE71:r)

These court cases are underway as you read this urgent email.

[**So please don 't delay - give what you can right away.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62473507:6Va8kZGNX:m:1:3331421248:BEBBC9D0937880E977CBDEFD542FEE71:r)

In Vigilance,

John M. Pierce
Founder and General Counsel
National Constitutional Law Union

**P.S. Patriot, the FBI is destroying evidence that can clear January 6 defendants ...and making up fake evidence to railroad them. ** This is a crisis for our country and our Constitution.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Bad news for Republicans:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
| Hey Peter,

In a moment, I’m going to [ask you to split a small donation between Upset the Setup and our campaign ahead of our FEC deadline.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60637900/397737303/-355456225?amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=UTS_20230323_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhkMWZjYWI4LWJkYzktZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=SDHNa7i9r6Bvkl5LpIQkb_XyI-cDKI_KtR0CFn8T-oE=) But first, I wanted to explain why your gift is so important — especially right now.

I announced my campaign for U.S. Senate a little more than a month ago. From the moment I jumped into the race, Republicans piled on.

It actually started the night right before I announced my campaign. In one of Kevin McCarthy’s first acts as Speaker, he unilaterally removed me from serving on the House Intelligence Committee.

Then it was Matt Gaetz. He introduced legislation trying to bar me from accessing classified information.

Then came Tucker Carlson. He recently launched into a desperate rant about me on his primetime Fox News show. At this point, he attacks me about once a week on the air.

Then Donald Trump piled on too. He couldn’t resist. He dedicated part of his CPAC speech to hurl insult after insult against me.

And I’m going to be honest, I don’t even send you the really crazy stuff.

It’s just the beginning. After every one of their attacks, I then receive thousands more like it online from their MAGA loyalists trying to sabotage our work to defend democracy.

**Republicans see me as their boogeyman this election. Why? Because I’ve stood up to these bullies and called out their lies.**

It’s clear they don’t want me in the Senate. They don’t want oversight. They don’t want me to hold them accountable. They don’t want an outspoken defender of democracy on the Senate floor.

Bad news for Republicans: I’ve never been one to give up a fight — especially when it gets tough. I’m not going to let Donald Trump or any one of his lackeys tear our campaign down.

[Peter, I need to know you have my back the entire way. Will you pitch in a donation of $3 or more to Upset the Setup and our campaign before our FEC deadline? The attacks are only going to get nastier from here, so we need to prepare for everything they’re going to launch our way:](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60637901/397737304/-355456225?amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=UTS_20230323_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhkMWZjYWI4LWJkYzktZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=SDHNa7i9r6Bvkl5LpIQkb_XyI-cDKI_KtR0CFn8T-oE=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and Upset the Setup will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60637902/397737305/-355456225?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&refcode=UTS_20230323_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhkMWZjYWI4LWJkYzktZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=SDHNa7i9r6Bvkl5LpIQkb_XyI-cDKI_KtR0CFn8T-oE=)

clean_body: | Hey Peter, In a moment, I’m going to = But first, I wanted to explain why your gift is so important — especially right now. I announced my campaign for U.S. Senate a little more than a month ago. From the moment I jumped into the race, Republicans piled on. It actually started the night right before I announced my campaign. In one of Kevin McCarthy’s first acts as Speaker, he unilaterally removed me from serving on the House Intelligence Committee. Then it was Matt Gaetz. He introduced legislation trying to bar me from accessing classified information. Then came Tucker Carlson. He recently launched into a desperate rant about me on his primetime Fox News show. At this point, he attacks me about once a week on the air. Then Donald Trump piled on too. He couldn’t resist. He dedicated part of his CPAC speech to hurl insult after insult against me. And I’m going to be honest, I don’t even send you the really crazy stuff. It’s just the beginning. After every one of their attacks, I then receive thousands more like it online from their MAGA loyalists trying to sabotage our work to defend democracy. Republicans see me as their boogeyman this election. Why? Because I’ve stood up to these bullies and called out their lies. It’s clear they don’t want me in the Senate. They don’t want oversight. They don’t want me to hold them accountable. They don’t want an outspoken defender of democracy on the Senate floor. Bad news for Republicans: I’ve never been one to give up a fight — especially when it gets tough. name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: This is a massive problem
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marc for US
body:
Our narrow House Majority is in serious danger.

---
| Fellow Conservative, our narrow House Majority is in serious danger.

We’re not even through the first quarter of 2023 and the Democrats are already outraising us and sending paid D.C. activists to targeted seats. [**If we don’t unite now, we’re in serious jeopardy of losing the House.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=44392dcb82fd407aa6259f2eeaf4fcb2&_e=76aP-zNn-Of2UUSMdVaw8oTnEK_Tsl8Mqz_l3smSEyn0PSDy6EB6AE0twz5vACnex06VknfsVrkpzHmBbsrGXa_LSKseu0UFJAHhKPOA6w1zeEgwMp5Qa0XeG0nA_JhQtvUIK2iVyhdTdf_AdIzmJcxeQNbBAhpt6Qnyv7BPPCJ746evnMiEfiM3p1JExi2_abC4knVHSceOFmUv-lVhpTrCd8KHAidS3cR_VD8IatovFJKj21IRbLtDN89MFB_PTjHs9JOoGwP_DlwTQTqCO_3pUp6TH4ds7V71VwewOhtlg6wsL_AU3yHU447ajirMZ4vJ9n8NFVX7hdDxx-0r_CEtiFUrjhSGbXeEDDHLcui9tE5pR_5apha5Hpvgk-Hjs_4r738IADKUZYW5lLA59A%3D%3D)

No one has a bigger target on his back than **Marc Molinaro** from New York’s 19th -- _one of the most competitive seats in the country!_

In 2022, Marc proved he’s one of the toughest fighters we have in Congress. **He was not only outraised but successfully flipped a district that had voted for Biden in 2020.**

Marc enraged Democrats by taking this seat and now they’re out for revenge. They’ve already promised to spend a _**record shattering $45 million**_ to take back this seat and other competitive New York seats.

I don’t mean this lightly when I say, if we’re going to hold the House, I need fighters like Marc by my side. [**That’s why I’m asking you to make a contribution to help Marc hold one of our most competitive seats.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=44392dcb82fd407aa6259f2eeaf4fcb2&_e=76aP-zNn-Of2UUSMdVaw8oTnEK_Tsl8Mqz_l3smSEyn0PSDy6EB6AE0twz5vACnex06VknfsVrkpzHmBbsrGXa_LSKseu0UFJAHhKPOA6w1zeEgwMp5Qa0XeG0nA_JhQtvUIK2iVyhdTdf_AdIzmJcxeQNbBAhpt6Qnyv7BPPCJ746evnMiEfiM3p1JExi2_abC4knVHSceOFmUv-lVhpTrCd8KHAidS3cR_VD8IatoQPR1VGJMt6lm8Q6eeKETZrIdHc6X-qTYfkHZhNWQfv4agiWxZQfoJWTueI8M6sZkwUdMUoWvh0HwkxOlob5nUncZmUswHZWVnUoUCjaPMxAjGSVpm4OgxfR5QeWOqY-uAzqSgaiJ-1IBPI547PMp7fLdOWbTZCrDu5rWDJvOjbA%3D%3D)

[**Protect our Majority**
DONATE](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=44392dcb82fd407aa6259f2eeaf4fcb2&_e=76aP-zNn-Of2UUSMdVaw8oTnEK_Tsl8Mqz_l3smSEyn0PSDy6EB6AE0twz5vACnex06VknfsVrkpzHmBbsrGXa_LSKseu0UFJAHhKPOA6w1zeEgwMp5Qa0XeG0nA_JhQtvUIK2iVyhdTdf_AdIzmJcxeQNbBAhpt6Qnyv7BPPCJ746evnMiEfiM3p1JExi2_abC4knVHSceOFmUv-lVhpTrCd8KHAidS3cR_VD8IatrvolEWYheFoW_kk_oeWWaEXZcAtQwYiIfIEmkPyT17f8smX8txuWrKWG2pmQomK-F53v1HlrRzgXUQCtxk86udg8oto8-3U9TyTQUTBVjpJPC09OaoPK08-YFodUVBhkmSNj_mYJ3m3UyP6KxXSVVnrdV0FDmZN3HxDF02j_EqkQ%3D%3D)
Marc’s on the frontline of our fight to end the Democrats’ catastrophic agenda in Washington, [**and he needs all the support we can send him.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=44392dcb82fd407aa6259f2eeaf4fcb2&_e=76aP-zNn-Of2UUSMdVaw8oTnEK_Tsl8Mqz_l3smSEyn0PSDy6EB6AE0twz5vACnex06VknfsVrkpzHmBbsrGXa_LSKseu0UFJAHhKPOA6w1zeEgwMp5Qa0XeG0nA_JhQtvUIK2iVyhdTdf_AdIzmJcxeQNbBAhpt6Qnyv7BPPCJ746evnMiEfiM3p1JExi2_abC4knVHSceOFmUv-lVhpTrCd8KHAidS3cR_VD8IatpS3SGWGWZHnC2HdFrObM-70auMH6NXkA2h_8Mh7_tulj-xcRs-lngqGLGjVP2kTiSTr1nnTybhcyl6_ZwjrXRkyDA1XPENV7ZD1AiUGAVcrnfymn9sITXxhqtRzvNiNwn-7wCdLms-YzDsXLw3Bqbt9-33Phnq0PqCBkwM1Afs5A%3D%3D)

**Kevin McCarthy**

body:
I asked.
My team told you the stakes.
My parents asked for your help. I don’t know how else to say this, so I’ll be blunt: As I write this, Republicans are raking in MILLIONS of dollars to take back power. \-- Kevin McCarthy just hauled in [**$12.3 MILLION**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60637879/397737259/-1810142053?refcode=20230323_em_fr_b1_raja_30_rs&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTFmY2FiOC1iZGM5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ohHnW-wjArsnmCixAr22761aMne98IY71BQ5JJJzINo=) to keep the House
\-- And Donald Trump has over [**$9 MILLION**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60637881/397737261/-1810142053?refcode=20230323_em_fr_b1_raja_30_rs&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTFmY2FiOC1iZGM5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ohHnW-wjArsnmCixAr22761aMne98IY71BQ5JJJzINo=) in the bank to retake the Presidency he lost. This week hundreds of Texans are protesting at the state capitol as Republican lawmakers propose discriminatory legislation targeting the LGBTQIA+ community. _**This session alone, at least 140 anti-LGBTQ+ bills have been introduced in the Legislature. **_
