name: Dudley Brown
subject: Biden demands gun registration
body:
I have urgent news.

---
| | | | | | |
---
|

Dear Fellow Patriot,

I have urgent news.

_President Biden is using executive action to do what he has failed to do for decades ... Force Universal Gun Registration on Americans_.

We don't have a lot of time to act.

**[So before you read on, would you please make a generous donation to help the National Association for Gun Rights fight back against Biden's gun grab](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=baa4104a36894d6fa15fb24f9a7e3bad&_e=9FuufmEqBh_HIG3ElPW8OWAt7JFmCqyrs0vDKj6MW2j6dLlGqYSPeVq2gi3tIrnW6piY1Hya24491x3tL9FWb2aEAaPGo7nN6Ena9vRfJhreLWuyGR-sEz_zg7A7xEbIZ-4e6z-R4nFOgWLpwXyhKE6Cftkh144tpkD8lCE6QWaYlqf7QA_Gb8PFQl0XcQomQ8PxtkcGxtva1JEFsXEM4uM_p7iURoBu0tYjnDK74LncWCWhvG45BA76ukXki_Y9-YL6svaTqfBtspd9Y7r_apWTA-HUnrpblWy5zNMZ-PrLbJfIeLUXUADYSQ-d1car)?**

Here's the scoop, Fellow Patriot.

Biden is using last year's gun control package as grounds to demand Universal Gun Registration for every gun sale in America.

That's right, President Biden is exploiting the great Republican surrender of 2022 to force a ban on all private firearms sales and register every gun with the NICS database.

It's H.R. 8 and Toomey-Manchin, all wrapped up in one executive order.

And Biden is doing it without any act of Congress.

Of course, this new policy would only affect law-abiding gun owners, but that bit of logic has never stopped the gun grabbers before.

Fellow Patriot, you can rest assured that NAGR will not stand for this assault on YOUR Second Amendment rights.

We have defeated Biden's gun control agenda before, and we will do it again.

_In 2013, when the Obama-Biden administration tried to force Universal Gun Registration through Congress, NAGR was there to rally the pro-gun grassroots in opposition_.

Which is precisely why Biden is resorting to executive action this time around.

He thinks he can sidestep the pro-gun grassroots if he bypasses Congress all together.

Well, Fellow Patriot, Biden is terribly mistaken.

The gloves are off.

But it is only through the generous support of everyday gun owners that we are able to mobilize against the gun grabbers.

**[So please consider making your most generous donation to the National Association for Gun Rights today](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=baa4104a36894d6fa15fb24f9a7e3bad&_e=9FuufmEqBh_HIG3ElPW8OWAt7JFmCqyrs0vDKj6MW2j6dLlGqYSPeVq2gi3tIrnW6piY1Hya24491x3tL9FWb2aEAaPGo7nN6Ena9vRfJhreLWuyGR-sEz_zg7A7xEbIZ-4e6z-R4nFOgWLpwXyhKE6Cftkh144tpkD8lCE6QWYIWfwuxtRLHgs-G8JXrh4nNEGxfJcWjpmj6XaPUoxfmDvlCYt3i6qtnH2guiaa3xTvpcRHCd0zD0_2icQsMks8HRQ_lVm3pOW3CaN1I3ExS_ZVR8RcJbbKVixIGWEpVexgmIG7MJgdf6riHysDHsq8)**.

Let me be clear, Fellow Patriot, any politician who sits idly by while the President tries to rip up our Constitution needs to be held accountable.

That's why it's vital pro-gun supporters like you send the politicians that message.

When we flood the D.C. swamp with hundreds of thousands of petitions, phone calls, and emails from angry voters, the political class will have no choice but to hear our voice.

Of course, taking on the President of the United States isn't cheap.

And while NAGR is prepared to dip into our emergency war chest, we are still going to need a massive influx of funds to make sure no stone goes unturned against Biden's executive orders.

**[So, Fellow Patriot, please consider rushing us your most generous contribution today](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=baa4104a36894d6fa15fb24f9a7e3bad&_e=9FuufmEqBh_HIG3ElPW8OWAt7JFmCqyrs0vDKj6MW2j6dLlGqYSPeVq2gi3tIrnW6piY1Hya24491x3tL9FWb2aEAaPGo7nN6Ena9vRfJhreLWuyGR-sEz_zg7A7xEbIZ-4e6z-R4nFOgWLpwXyhKE6Cftkh144tpkD8lCE6QWbdU9EMoelKlHn-X0F-Nj5d3QZ_xYCF2tT98xg_r6yuy1_sAhWanVLSodCdpFeQ7jhoHNF6S8fr0iHBHAwFEgyUtc_V74wzkthOkuK7irmVh9OSOVGu6YdvnM-aBREHp8xUXG9Ww-t-JFehfukjpTcA)**.

clean_body: I have urgent news. | | | | | | | | Dear Fellow Patriot, I have urgent news. President Biden is using executive action to do what he has failed to do for decades ... Force Universal Gun Registration on Americans. We don't have a lot of time to act. ? Here's the scoop, Fellow Patriot. Biden is using last year's gun control package as grounds to demand Universal Gun Registration for every gun sale in America. That's right, President Biden is exploiting the great Republican surrender of 2022 to force a ban on all private firearms sales and register every gun with the NICS database. It's H.R. 8 and Toomey-Manchin, all wrapped up in one executive order. And Biden is doing it without any act of Congress. Of course, this new policy would only affect law-abiding gun owners, but that bit of logic has never stopped the gun grabbers before. Fellow Patriot, you can rest assured that NAGR will not stand for this assault on YOUR Second Amendment rights. We have defeated Biden's gun control agenda before, and we will do it again. In 2013, when the Obama-Biden administration tried to force Universal Gun Registration through Congress, NAGR was there to rally the pro-gun grassroots in opposition. Which is precisely why Biden is resorting to executive action this time around. He thinks he can sidestep the pro-gun grassroots if he bypasses Congress all together. Well, Fellow Patriot, Biden is terribly mistaken. The gloves are off. But it is only through the generous support of everyday gun owners that we are able to mobilize against the gun grabbers. . Let me be clear, Fellow Patriot, any politician who sits idly by while the President tries to rip up our Constitution needs to be held accountable. That's why it's vital pro-gun supporters like you send the politicians that message. When we flood the D.C. swamp with hundreds of thousands of petitions, phone calls, and emails from angry voters, the political class will have no choice but to hear our voice. Of course, taking on the President of the United States isn't cheap. And while NAGR is prepared to dip into our emergency war chest, we are still going to need a massive influx of funds to make sure no stone goes unturned against Biden's executive orders. . Whether it's a contribution of , or , you can rest assured that your donation will be used to combat the assault on the Constitution. Even chipping in or will help us prepare for what Biden is throwing at us. Thanks in advance for your support, and I'll keep you updated as things progress. body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=77%2E35263%2E_QLe8R ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

This is Ben Wikler, Chair of the Democratic Party of Wisconsin, and I
really need you to read this. MAGA forces are raising millions to spend on
TV with just twelve days to go in our state Supreme Court race that could
shape the fate of abortion access and democracy for millions!

My team is about to make difficult programmatic decisions ahead of our
April election, so we urgently need your help to make up this shortfall.
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-cheddar.CR0fxo&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230323_PM2_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=77%2E35263%2E_QLe8R ]Split any amount to help us elect commonsense progressives like Janet
Protasiewicz and Tammy Baldwin by our deadline midnight tonight >>

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-cheddar.CR0fxo&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230323_PM2_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=77%2E35263%2E_QLe8R ]SUPPORT WISDEMS

Here’s why we need to match MAGA spending as soon as possible:

* In 2019, we lost by just 5,981 votes: Our progressive priorities in
Wisconsin are riding on us winning this race, and
Peter, in Wisconsin, elections
are won by razor-thin margins. We truly need all hands on deck and
every resource at our disposal to meet this moment.

* Ads shape public opinion: TV is one of the most reliable ways to get
in front of voters and lay out the stakes of this race. We can’t let
our message get drowned out by misleading attacks on our candidates
and outright MAGA lies.

* My team is finalizing our Get Out The Vote spend right now: Stacks and
stacks of literature, clipboards, and maps for canvassers. Dozens of
lunches and water bottles for hard-working volunteers knocking doors.
Chargers for the state-of-the-art tech our organizers need to reach
voters in every corner of Wisconsin. These are just a few of the fees
our team needs to budget for — and with your help, we’ll be able to
fully fund our best-in-class operation.

This is a goal we cannot afford to miss. Please,
Peter, can I count on your
immediate grassroots support to close this fundraising gap? [ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-cheddar.CR0fxo&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230323_PM2_V1_S1&t=1006&akid=77%2E35263%2E_QLe8R ]Rush in $10
or more now to help elect progressives just like Janet Protasiewicz and
Tammy Baldwin all across Wisconsin

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split
donation to Tammy Baldwin, WisDems, and Janet Protasiewicz will go through
immediately:

Ben Wikler

name: Yadira Caraveo
subject: Why I’m in this fight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
After becoming the first person in my family to graduate from college, I chose to be a pediatrician in Adams County to give back to my community – to the folks that raised me. But I quickly understood that truly helping children and families would take a lot more than what I was able to do as a doctor.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60638964/397741947/-1389997591?amount=8&refcode=em_fr_2023.03.23_b1_yc_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDgzYTA2Mi1jNWM5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YQ1yykHOOdg6lBNE_n0Uh3vfDximU969zSNvWO2iVA0=)
Hi Peter, it’s Yadira. I wanted to share my story with you, and why I’m fighting for Coloradans in Congress. **[I hope you’ll take a moment to read this message, but if you’re already with me, will you chip in to my campaign to help me protect my competitive seat in Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60638965/397741948/-1389997591?amount=8&refcode=em_fr_2023.03.23_b1_yc_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDgzYTA2Mi1jNWM5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YQ1yykHOOdg6lBNE_n0Uh3vfDximU969zSNvWO2iVA0=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60638966/397741949/-1389997591?amount=8&refcode=em_fr_2023.03.23_b1_yc_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDgzYTA2Mi1jNWM5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YQ1yykHOOdg6lBNE_n0Uh3vfDximU969zSNvWO2iVA0=)
**Family means everything to me.** My parents came to Colorado from a small town in Mexico, looking for a better life. My parents instilled in me that hard work and caring for others are the values that build strong communities and family. They raised me and my siblings with those values — on a construction worker’s pay in the Adams County home they still live in.
[****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60638967/397741950/-1389997591?amount=8&refcode=em_fr_2023.03.23_b1_yc_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDgzYTA2Mi1jNWM5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YQ1yykHOOdg6lBNE_n0Uh3vfDximU969zSNvWO2iVA0=)
After becoming the first person in my family to graduate from college, I chose to be a pediatrician in Adams County to give back to my community – to the folks that raised me. **But I quickly understood that truly helping children and families would take a lot more than what I was able to do as a doctor.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60638968/397741951/-1389997591?amount=8&refcode=em_fr_2023.03.23_b1_yc_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDgzYTA2Mi1jNWM5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YQ1yykHOOdg6lBNE_n0Uh3vfDximU969zSNvWO2iVA0=)
**That’s why I ran for Congress.** I wanted to continue my commitment to Colorado families and build on my work in the state legislature to lower health care costs, address the high cost of living, and protect a woman’s right to choose.

**In 2022, I made history as the first Latina elected to Congress in the state of Colorado. But it wasn’t easy.** _The GOP and their dark money groups put up a fight, spending over $8,000,000 to attack me. But thanks to the support of my incredible grassroots team, we fought back and won._

**[Now, we’re facing an uphill battle to take back the House Majority. Republicans will do everything they can to stop me, and I’m counting on folks like you to help. That's why I’m humbly asking: Will you chip in today to help me stay in Congress and take back the House?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60638969/397741952/-1389997591?amount=8&refcode=em_fr_2023.03.23_b1_yc_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDgzYTA2Mi1jNWM5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YQ1yykHOOdg6lBNE_n0Uh3vfDximU969zSNvWO2iVA0=)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

| | Dear Reader,
Are you sick and tired of trying to search through so many different news sites to figure out what is going on in the world? Spending too much time trying to figure out what is **ACTUALLY** important? Not sure if you can trust what you are reading? Today is your day to sign up for a **FREE** newsletter called _[The Flyover](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=00a9d50de46a4d5aada350428403dee1&_e=cCiyN8ZFS-RBZFmNzPmDowA-p8_Uslr5DNqmcc53C5JApFIaaKbjNIHT0MqlLb6UjkyAqji11Cs1BKKkzHV77NIv-6y5dzpn6At_eTbplFbsqN4d8Cu06dLOz7zy7iRgvq50bln11DFZUmovIt6FVB5HtSmpSUzKwjSlRhOjGPVtViQuKyXHjtL876tKl8k2n8JEs0abpqiOWnmNedsuGg%3D%3D)_ where our talented team of editors will do all that work for you. Get informed on politics, business, world affairs, science, technology and many other topics with a single email directly to your inbox. **_[Click here to sign up now for FREE!](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=00a9d50de46a4d5aada350428403dee1&_e=cCiyN8ZFS-RBZFmNzPmDowA-p8_Uslr5DNqmcc53C5JApFIaaKbjNIHT0MqlLb6U1MyEwSrCu-diyxALTXUNZKpFoBIT7adijfqtDvHh3lDlv51WHnbpxtoCyn4029D2xrZ56rn48KigGsO1zfE0nADBeoWlufb8ph9bf_bkJjDiEzNsXL8CPKSa5DRDhrgcadI5YWlwPZ0VfbBMv4GXBg%3D%3D)_**
Finding quality news online is like sifting an avalanche. We dig through hundreds of sources and pull out the most important news of the day, so you don't have to. One email does truly have every relevant story. Here is your opportunity to **[sign up today for FREE](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=00a9d50de46a4d5aada350428403dee1&_e=cCiyN8ZFS-RBZFmNzPmDowA-p8_Uslr5DNqmcc53C5JApFIaaKbjNIHT0MqlLb6UMGlJ4V2VbcxhUEX8CqisKGXcPmVkf49G_sRhRixbrnpHOTDSX2DML9PSpo5IrrFdl7mjyinW3zTwpdwvQe42OcD2GBuXj3nizvKeTyMKeAZW2-wyvzLzIQusSqJs_Mhb0jCkJJQksTSoBVRaHqiNaw%3D%3D)**. In today's world, the mainstream media tries to tell people what to think. At _[The Flyover](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=00a9d50de46a4d5aada350428403dee1&_e=cCiyN8ZFS-RBZFmNzPmDowA-p8_Uslr5DNqmcc53C5JApFIaaKbjNIHT0MqlLb6Ufnxasx7rlDbNvtVAmKU7SgEBhVUXaiQRP2XFVrGUlt5H_QX6t714fihVkxQV-boDupyc1JMchzye8tQPmqOfk9kQ9Ka3rAB7MUB4YeE0sWrSZHj_hDz7SOw1yYIXRa4la1nB81_6HzbgSKItTwbjKA%3D%3D)_ , we eliminate the bias and just deliver the facts of today's news and allowing you to reach your own conclusion. **_[Click here to check out our latest briefing.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=00a9d50de46a4d5aada350428403dee1&_e=cCiyN8ZFS-RBZFmNzPmDowA-p8_Uslr5DNqmcc53C5JApFIaaKbjNIHT0MqlLb6UfbLMYTqrjznVsYGL_R4W5MC4_q2ZtokCRKyP0c3FplY6q4v6Ux7t8hG1_x2mTU8mfFegThDLt9N6SIbyNM8IidkIG6Dd1ocyvEaU8dzj5T6sVmB9ht0HXfZdhhn_vZTkYFzQ8e-mb6wWnSw8NueiDg%3D%3D)_**
Get _[The Flyover](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=00a9d50de46a4d5aada350428403dee1&_e=cCiyN8ZFS-RBZFmNzPmDowA-p8_Uslr5DNqmcc53C5JApFIaaKbjNIHT0MqlLb6UnMAZ9E7Eu6WY_70xLtkLA8xCCCa0QGRUkCthOxVKGFN_00E9iFth0h4yJ1rcVdobSwfkG89ZTLQC-wghhl8r7eYiACkhRwP0dENE2TGl6ZPgMbM1PGt2uRURC6oQob_0UxHBvCARz1_85mRnD15WRw%3D%3D)_ delivered to your inbox every Monday, Wednesday, and Friday so you do not miss out on anything. name: Katie Porter
subject: The woman with the whiteboard
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18914?t=1001&akid=3081%2E346206%2EHSXzHT ][IMG]

Peter,

Katie Porter here—you may know me as the minivan driving single-mom who
uses a whiteboard to hold corrupt CEOs and incompetent government
officials accountable.

But here’s what you might not know: In January, I announced that I’m
running for the United States Senate. I’m running because Americans
deserve a warrior to fight the battles of tomorrow, stand up to special
interests, and “do Congress” in a way that connects with Americans—many of
whom are disillusioned about whether our government can work for them.

Now we’re 8 days out from our end of quarter fundraising deadline. And
look, CEOs and my teenagers can agree: I’m not one for BS answers. So here
are two quick reasons why I’m asking for your $5 right now.

1. This end of quarter deadline will be the first time our Senate
campaign is required to publicly report how much money we have raised
since launching. A strong number signals that I’m a serious competitor
in this race and can prevent super PACs from attacking me (let’s show
them it’s not worth it!).

2. I’m the only Democrat in this race who has never taken a dime from
corporate PACs, and I reject all contributions from federal lobbyists
and Big Bank, Big Oil, and Big Pharma CEOs. Our average donation is
less than $30, I truly count on supporters like you.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18914?t=1002&akid=3081%2E346206%2EHSXzHT ]Peter, I really need your help before March 31st. Can you
make a donation that will be split between my campaign and Charles Booker
before Friday at midnight?

CHIP IN →

Thanks so much. I can’t do this without you!

Katie Porter

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230323-3081-footer&t=1003&refcode2=3081_346206_HSXzHT&akid=3081%2E346206%2EHSXzHT

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3081%2E346206%2EHSXzHT

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

I am thrilled by this recognition of my work as a pro-choice advocate in Congress.

I am thrilled by this recognition of my work as a pro-choice advocate in Congress. But more than that, this early endorsement is further confirmation that this district will be in the national spotlight. **National organizations are getting involved in this race in the off-year because they know it’s a swing seat that could determine control of the House of Representatives.**
| [KEEP PA-07 BLUE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60639695/397744615/-1109429433?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230323-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzczZGUxNC1jN2M5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FbTZD7XoXze48c4LJNWsOrxVil3FBwmYtXsfLh7mi6s=)
---
A fun fact many folks don’t know is that EMILY’s List isn’t named after a person, but is actually an acronym: it stands for Early Money Is Like Yeast – because it raises the dough! The name is a reference to the incredible impact that early fundraising has on a political campaign.

After defending my seat in some of the closest races in the country in 2020 and 2022, I can confirm that early investments determine what happens on Election Day. [_**That’s why I’m asking you to contribute $10 or whatever you can spare to support my re-election campaign right away.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60639696/397744616/-1109429433?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230323-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzczZGUxNC1jN2M5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FbTZD7XoXze48c4LJNWsOrxVil3FBwmYtXsfLh7mi6s=)

clean_body: I am thrilled by this recognition of my work as a pro-choice advocate in Congress. | = | Peter, I am excited to share that my re-election campaign has been endorsed by EMILY’s List, the nation’s oldest organization dedicated to electing pro-choice women up and down the ballot. = | = I am thrilled by this recognition of my work as a pro-choice advocate in Congress. But more than that, this early endorsement is further confirmation that this district will be in the national spotlight. National organizations are getting involved in this race in the off-year because they know it’s a swing seat that could determine control of the House of Representatives. | = A fun fact many folks don’t know is that EMILY’s List isn’t named after a person, but is actually an acronym: it stands for Early Money Is Like Yeast – because it raises the dough! The name is a reference to the incredible impact that early fundraising has on a political campaign. After defending my seat in some of the closest races in the country in 2020 and 2022, I can confirm that early investments determine what happens on Election Day. = | = | = Always thankful for your support, Susan | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above. name: Julia DeGraw
subject: FWD: Keep the Factory Farm Moratorium Bill Strong!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oregon League of Conservation Voters
body:
| | | Hello Peter, Our fight to keep the Factory Farm Moratorium Bill (SB 85-1) strong continues. On Monday at 8am, the Senate Committee on Natural Resources has a vote scheduled on this bill and its proposed amendments. **[We need to take action now to keep the bill strong. We cannot have any new or expanded factory farms until we have a plan to meaningfully protect our air, water, wildlife, climate, family farmers, and communities.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60639987/397745629/1658385178?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUzOTcwNmZkLWM4YzktZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sGoFWMVjriG181Z4qCbKOyKEf0ABXtADpZV0TPaXMxs=&emci=2ed2b44f-bfc9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=539706fd-c8c9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230)** Since our last email about the Factory Farm Moratorium Bill, we learned that there is no -2 amendment. Instead, there is an awful -3 amendment that has everything we mentioned: limiting the bill to only apply to poultry factory farms and reducing the moratorium to just two years. This last-minute amendment was drafted due to Big Ag industry pressure, behind closed doors, and without much input from advocates and the communities most impacted by this bill. If the new -3 amendment moves forward, megadairies would be allowed to continue their harmful practices, contaminating our air and water systems and affecting the health of our communities. Last year, Morrow County became the first Oregonian county to declare a state of emergency because of water quality issues. We should not have let this happen, and this bill can help prevent similar disasters from occurring to other communities where megadairies are nearby. Only one version of this bill can pass out of the state senate committee, and we need to make sure it is the originally proposed, strong -1 amendment. It’s clear there is widespread public support for SB 85-1 – over 60 people signed up to testify and over 600 people submitted testimonies in support of the full Factory Farm Moratorium. [**We need to tell our lawmakers that they need to support SB 85-1 because we want a full Factory Farm Moratorium. Please write to your state senator today urging them to support the -1 amendment.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60639988/397745654/1658385178?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUzOTcwNmZkLWM4YzktZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sGoFWMVjriG181Z4qCbKOyKEf0ABXtADpZV0TPaXMxs=&emci=2ed2b44f-bfc9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=539706fd-c8c9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) Sincerely,
Julia DeGraw Coalition Director, OLCV [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60639989/397745655/1658385178?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUzOTcwNmZkLWM4YzktZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sGoFWMVjriG181Z4qCbKOyKEf0ABXtADpZV0TPaXMxs=&emci=2ed2b44f-bfc9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=539706fd-c8c9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) Dear Peter, One of our major priorities for the 2023 legislative session, the Factory Farm Moratorium bill (SB 85-1), is at risk of being severely weakened. We support the current bill because it hits the pause button on expanding or adding any new mega dairies and other huge factory farm operations in the state until we can adequately address the water, air, climate, animal welfare, and worker issues that plague the largest of the large factory farm operations. [**We need you to take action today to make sure the bill stays strong!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60639990/397745656/1658385178?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUzOTcwNmZkLWM4YzktZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sGoFWMVjriG181Z4qCbKOyKEf0ABXtADpZV0TPaXMxs=&emci=2ed2b44f-bfc9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=539706fd-c8c9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) This Wednesday at 8:00 AM the Senate Committee on Natural Resources is considering an industry-backed amendment that would cut major protections from the bill. This amendment would limit the bill to just chicken factory farms, excluding any other factory farm operations like mega dairies, and it **would reduce the time of the moratorium to just two years**. We all know that a two year moratorium doesn’t give the state nearly enough time to adequately regulate the factory farm industry. We can’t let Oregon’s lawmakers cave to the pressure from industry by severely weakening this bill. [**Will you ask your state senator to stand strong and support the original bill, SB 85 (with -1 amendment), and reject the industry-proposed -2 amendment that removes mega dairies from the bill?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60639991/397745657/1658385178?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUzOTcwNmZkLWM4YzktZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sGoFWMVjriG181Z4qCbKOyKEf0ABXtADpZV0TPaXMxs=&emci=2ed2b44f-bfc9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=539706fd-c8c9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) One of the largest dairies in the country is located in Eastern Oregon near the Columbia River in Morrow County. Some 70,000 head of dairy cattle are all housed in a small amount of land generating massive manure lagoons, sucking as much water out of the ground as a small Oregon city, and creating unhealthy air pollution that also contributes to climate change. Morrow County is struggling with low groundwater levels, and with dangerous levels of nitrates in the groundwater that people rely on for their drinking water. Not only have the mega-dairies in our state wreaked havoc on communities’ water quality and quantity, and air quality, they have also put dozens of family and midsized farmers out of business. **We cannot allow lawmakers to remove mega-dairies from this crucial piece of legislation. ** There is currently a vacant site ripe for a mega-dairy in the region where existing mega-dairies already operate and this bill is crucial to ensuring that site isn’t developed into an inadequately regulated factory farm––another key reason to not exclude mega dairies from this bill. We also know that Oregon’s communities are at risk of Foster Farms' intention to expand in a big way into Oregon’s Willamette Valley––making it crucial that we hit the pause button on ALL factory farms in the state of Oregon. [**So please join us in urging your senator to keep the Factory Farm Bill strong by rejecting the industry-backed -2 amendments.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60639992/397745658/1658385178?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUzOTcwNmZkLWM4YzktZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sGoFWMVjriG181Z4qCbKOyKEf0ABXtADpZV0TPaXMxs=&emci=2ed2b44f-bfc9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=539706fd-c8c9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) Thank you for all that you do! Julia DeGraw
Coalition Director, OLCV | |
---|---|---

name: Mike Pieciak
subject: Brattleboro roots
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont
body:
Becca has a record of action to back up her words.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60640027/397745780/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmUyMGE2Ni1jOWM5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QvNYzzpp2gAOexgK544_4oFQewErG0xEo5SvNElhB9o=&emci=804df265-bfc9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=e2e20a66-c9c9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=43402272) | Hi Peter, It’s Mike Pieciak – Vermont Treasurer and long-time friend and supporter of Becca! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60640028/397745781/510315814?refcode=E20702-20230323-MikePieciak-graphic-SurrogateLocal-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmUyMGE2Ni1jOWM5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QvNYzzpp2gAOexgK544_4oFQewErG0xEo5SvNElhB9o=) Becca and I have a lot in common! We both have deep roots in our hometown of Brattleboro, became two of Vermont’s first openly LGBTQ statewide elected officials in November, and chose to serve in public office for the same reason: To give Vermonters in communities like ours a voice in Montpelier, DC, and beyond. Whether it’s supporting teachers, expanding voting rights, or tackling climate change, Becca has a record of action to back up her words. In Congress, she’s already become an outspoken voice for trans youth, accountability and transparency in government, and reproductive freedom. But being a strong voice in Washington often brings extra scrutiny and political attacks. **That’s why it is so important for Becca to show strength on next week’s campaign finance deadline — her first as our congresswoman.** [_**Becca is making sure the voices of ALL Vermonters are heard in Washington. clean_body: still haven't heard anything | We're so close to being victorious, Peter. We all heard that President Trump was going to be arrested. Tuesday came around, then Wednesday, and now, still NOTHING. The Left is scared. They know that millions of Americans see through their lies and are fed up with the political persecution. We need to be loud. We need to be angry. We can't sit around and accept this manipulation any longer. We're asking you right now, **can you show the Radical Left that their witch hunt won 't be accepted? | Don't let this set a precedent for conservatives in the future. Without holding the Left accountable for this failure, we'll all be in trouble. Thank you, Justice Alerts via Team Vance Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. Jahana has been a tireless advocate for Connecticut's 5th Congressional District and has been a key ally in the fight for progressive policies that benefit all Americans.
**However, in the current political climate, NO Democratic seat can be taken for granted, and we must do _everything_ we can to ensure that Jahana is re-elected to the House of Representatives.**
Winning re-election puts Jahana at the top of the list of races to watch, making her one of the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC) Frontline Candidates for 2024. Holding her seat will determine whether or not we can regain our House majority and continue delivering wins for the American people.
**Team******,** that’s where we come in**. It's going to take an outpouring of people-power to get our movement the traction we need to secure 2024. With a race this close, we’re going to need more grassroots support, more organizing efforts, and more ad time to ensure that Jahana has the resources she needs to effectively campaign and get her message out to voters in her district. Jahana has long been a champion for issues that matter most to us, such as affordable healthcare, education, and economic opportunity. During her time in Congress, she played a critical role in advancing legislation that supports workers, families, and children.
**Friend****, Jahana stood up for us in ensuring that _everyone_ has access to the tools and resources they need to succeed. And now, it’s time for us to stand up for her. **
Together,
Team Hayes

subject: "Parent’s Bill of Rights in Education is essential"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Hampshire Senate Republicans PAC

| |

| Friends, ICYMI, please take a look at the latest Op-Ed from Senate President Jeb Bradley and Senate Majority Leader Sharon Carson below. If you agree that we need a NH Parent's Bill of Rights, please consider making a [$10 or $25 contribution to the NH Senate Republicans here (secure link)](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0yMTc3MTU5MDA4Nzk4OTA2MDMwJmM9dDF4MSZlPTE5MjgmYj0xMTA3NDAzMjU2JmQ9dTFiOGE0cw==.0yFAiIcO3qgx9rjYGc7e3VbuV5kWkF1MS8tOw9cKWJk). Thank you, NH Senate Republicans
---
---
| |
---
|
---
| | |
---
---
| | | **Sen. Sharon Carson & Jeb Bradley: Parent’s Bill of Rights in Education is essential**
---
| | | March 22, 2023 LET US agree on two things: Parents love their kids. Parents have a right to know what’s going on with their kids in school. New Hampshire Republicans are fighting to ensure that parents are truly and completely informed when they ask schools about their children through the Parents’ Bill of Rights in Education. This bill, SB 272, affirms that moms and dads in the Granite State can know what’s happening with their children in the classroom. One may think this right would go without saying, but unfortunately, parents have found themselves left in the dark following the actions of several school districts around our state. It became clear from listening to concerned parents that the Legislature must protect their right to learn the truth when asking questions about their own children. Our Parents’ Bill of Rights in Education states that “Parents have the fundamental right and responsibility to direct the upbringing, education, and care of their minor children and that in order to meaningfully and effectively exercise this right, no educational institution may withhold information about a child, the child’s health, the child’s school environment, or the child’s in-school behavior from the child’s parent or parents....” If your child is falling behind in math or showing an aptitude for history, you should know. If your child is going out for the football team, you should know. If your child is getting into trouble or being disciplined, you should know. No school should withhold information from parents about a child because the school thinks it knows that child’s interests better than the parents. SB 272 is carefully crafted to protect children, and explicitly protects students from unlawful abuse while preserving the authority of the Division of Children, Youth and Families, and other child welfare agencies to protect children. If school personnel are concerned that disclosure of certain information may result in acts of abuse, they are required by law to report these concerns to the Department of Children Youth and Families. SB 272 strengthens our state’s mandatory reporting law so that in cases where teachers think there is a risk of immediate harm, they are required to document it as well as report it. Absent a good faith fear of harm to a child, we should not withhold information from parents on the presumption that all parents are abusive. An objection to the Parent’s Bill of Rights is that it would require teachers to “out” gay children to their parents. This is not true. In fact, SB 272 does not require educators to report conversations with students to parents. But if a parent asks directly about the child’s gender expression in school, this bill reasserts the parent’s right “to be truthfully and completely informed” if the school is participating in that student’s social transition in school. The other common objection to the Parent’s Bill of Rights in Education is that it “singles out” transgender students. This is also untrue. SB 272 affirms the parents’ right to be informed on all matters relating to their children in school. It contains a specific reference to gender transition because several school boards in New Hampshire have approved or are considering policies that require educators to withhold information from, or even lie to, parents about a child’s in-school gender expression or transition. It is these policies that “single out” transgender students for differential treatment. SB 272 simply restores parents’ rights to know what is happening with their children. Our Parent’s Bill of Rights in Education is essential to ensure that good parents are provided with complete and accurate information affecting their children’s development. This bill helps parents be the best parents they can be by offering their children the kind of love, support, and access to appropriate professional care that only families can provide. SB 272 is about doing right by New Hampshire parents, doing right by New Hampshire students, and making sure parents have the information they need to raise healthy, thriving children. Sen. Jeb Bradley (R-Wolfeboro) is Senate president and represents District 3. Sen. Sharon Carson (R-Londonderry) is Senate majority leader and represents District 14.

| %%FIRST NAME%,

We emailed you a few weeks ago about House Republicans' plans for a massive giveaway to fossil fuel industries. Those plans are now collected in a single bill -- H.R. 1, the most coveted bill number usually reserved for the party's top priority legislation.

We must stop Republicans in Congress from turning back the clock on addressing climate change at the speed and scale that science demands, and a group of donors has put up a triple match fund that is ACTIVE until the end of the month.

[TRIPLE YOUR IMPACT: All gifts made by March 31 in support of our campaign will go three times as far. Can you make a donation to fund our campaigns today? Even $5 helps.](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/pNy7f7NP_)

---

|
Peter -- days ago, oil and gas lobbyists came to Capitol Hill with a wish list: **A massive expansion of fossil fuel production. A steep discount on drilling leases. Severe limits on the public 's right to review environmentally devastating projects.******

House Republicans have already rolled out a bill that would give polluters exactly that -- and hearings on the proposal are underway _now_. _****_

If we don't stop them, the damage to the environment will be irreversible. ____

We can't let this pass without a fight, Peter. That means flooding House and Senate offices with calls, letters, and emails. It means meeting with congressional staff and members of Congress who are being _bombarded_ with misinformation from corporate polluters.

We need your help -- our campaigns are only possible because of grassroots supporters like you. And for a limited time, your support will go three times as far.**** ****

[Please, make a gift right now. For a limited time, your support will make THREE TIMES the impact for our climate and clean energy, thanks to a group of committed environmental donors who are matching all gifts -- meaning a gift of just $5 becomes $15 when you give right now.](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/pNy7f7NP_)

We have to stop Republicans' dirty energy bill that reads like a laundry list of giveaways to the fossil fuel industry:
* **Gut environmental review.** Their bill would severely roll back the National Environmental Policy Act (NEPA), the law that requires environmental impact studies for projects like pipelines, highways, and drilling on public lands -- and allows affected communities to give input on these projects.
* **Massively expand oil and gas drilling.** Republicans' plan would mandate quarterly oil and gas leasing, overriding the long-standing precedent that defers leasing decisions to the Secretary of Interior. From there, it would open up even more public lands and waters for drilling and mining... at a steep discount.
* **Greenlight dirty oil pipelines.** Their plan would encourage new fossil fuel production and infrastructure like natural gas pipelines, further exacerbating the climate crisis, perpetuating environmental injustices, and endangering communities by gutting the laws that are in place to safeguard communities and our resources.

|
---
**[**TRIPLE YOUR IMPACT:
STOP THE GOP'S
DIRTY ENERGY BILL >>**](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/-)**

Peter, we're counting on committed environmentalists like you to step up at this key moment. **If we don 't speak up to protect our climate now, we could lose that right forever.**

[Help us reach our $40,000 fundraising goal. Even $5 helps. Because this is so important, a group of donors has agreed to TRIPLE MATCH all gifts if you give today.](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/pNy7f7NP_)

Thank you for fighting for a better future for our climate, our communities, and our planet. We'll be in touch soon with updates on our campaign.

Onward,

Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters
---
**[**DONATE**](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/-)**

**[**MAKE IT MONTHLY**](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/yAyZM-)**

---

**It’s time to reimagine our relationship with labor.** American workers are some of the most efficient and productive in the world. And yet, our workers are often exploited and overworked, leaving little time for much else.

_Americans deserve to live full lives that aren’t consumed by labor_ – whether that’s more time with family, hobbies, or relaxation.

**Thankfully, momentum for my 4-day workweek legislation is skyrocketing.** Workplaces across the country are testing a 4-day workweek — and not turning back.

[**Peter, this is a critical moment and I need your help. Will you chip in $4 to show your support for a 4-day workweek and help me revolutionize American labor? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60640579/397747743/299171790?amount=4&refcode=MTFC_20230323_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTI2ZmNlOC1jZGM5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7p41_jCBZ_h06JPgTzy3OFLiADiMWZf8bRziHzdIK-w=)

body:
Join our campaign TODAY

| [ ](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=778a319a1e78421d8a4019077a33a9fa&_e=B44e3AgPXOIemxWj5mnCfvne5dCC4CGrIyjSg-YYTKyBvqN8U84ake-7WtPrSm4BbAPpr-1RivqrVlVvCKkCrHtneMIYHo0UWuIFVG6Kd-XkRF81Bxuq8i4GnGC0fCoWtyiuI0e7CcGgu3WycDiNu6lKh1SoSayvCdlPF9CkD-upw0zcXH0uS571G0clsGz9qcWFokVxbtAJb6oZzxf61w02opv2l8gwvOraPSVgEUh8QoNjkndQ94vREfwwgJwKW-UGMTSjScAB-62PjJ0lZhUUdRe2aIl8yv2d3UVL7YCA8zy1vCrFDzyCufUEXGQ3qgwIyZX2T5gQddxzXjy84hogZCJRKH5e1k0UITvi3wi_htBEuT2SK_r03k9o-AyqjHZH55-LhxMrBpJYnWOvMiMZ6YgRyuPoeFecKO9wt7tomr8ufs_NdNWjOXgXtJ9Y493XmlQlMU56BREHen3aMIgejZEKGc8k4v9qDL7hBRzzBvPrvSkzME07xSo64rSQIgKGAoQ8T3XIQLiG97c00FDTxUve-AXH9oEiAV7LL92-C631zOr30yKzsMc8PXKN)
---
Hey friend,

I want to introduce myself.

My name is Amanda Banks, and I have been married to Jim Banks for 18 incredible years. We have three beautiful daughters together, and I could not be more proud of the husband, father, and man he is. We thought the Steele Dossier was fake. Then we found out the **Democrats knew the dossier was false but used it to spy on President Trump’s campaign in 2016.**

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

subject: Sinema’s 🏦 💸
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Kyrsten Sinema bashed Democrats and even “quite literally gave the middle finger to President Biden’s White House”
#

Peter -
This morning’s Politico article where Kyrsten Sinema bashed Democrats and even “quite literally gave the middle finger to President Biden’s White House” made a point about her race to raise as much money as she could before the end of this FEC deadline.
And she will raise a ton of money from Republicans and hedge fund managers.
But here’s the thing:
That big money is NO MATCH for lots and lots and lots of people chipping in even $5 or $10. Because that all adds up. And we’ve seen it time and time again.
Ruben needs you. Today. Before this FEC deadline. To make sure we aren’t outspent and beaten by Sinema’s Republicans. So please:
[**Can you contribute $5, $10 or whatever you can afford today to Ruben Gallego’s campaign for Senate? It all adds up when we’re all chipping in. And that’s how we’ll win this race. body:

From gutting abortion access to infringing on LGBTQ+ rights, state Republicans have become a one-stop shop for advancing the far-right agenda in state after state.** But state Democrats are right on their heels. clean_body: Michelle and Barack Obama know the critical importance of coming together to create change – now they’re calling on you | | | | | The GOP has spent decades building state power, gerrymandering districts, and propelling their anti-American agenda across the country. From gutting abortion access to infringing on LGBTQ+ rights, state Republicans have become a one-stop shop for advancing the far-right agenda in state after state. But state Democrats are right on their heels. They’re doing everything in their power to ensure these extremist policies don’t come to fruition. Even the Obamas have sounded the alarm: Former President Barack Obama and former First Lady Michelle Obama know just how critical coming together right now to rally behind Democrats is. That’s why they’re calling on members of this community – yes, you! – to help fight Republican extremism across the country. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | GOP lawmakers have already started to propose dangerous legislation like: The death penalty for women who have abortions Infringing on LGBTQ+ rights Enacting execution by firing squad And so much more! | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60641814/397751636/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDFkYWMyYi1kNmM5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L8xpK3CH8KdIeKWkTMOt0AcYkgtJ7i8ceCFhokFrWak=&emci=f68f9f74-a3c9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=341dac2b-d6c9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=561582) | Dear friend — it’s hard to believe that the Affordable Care Act was signed into law 13 years ago today. To this day, I still consider the time spent working with colleagues to draft and pass the ACA to be one of the most foundational experiences of my career. Long before joining the Fairness Project team, I got my start on Capitol Hill. It was during my time there that I learned so little of what we do is about politics, and so much more of it is about diplomacy. It was truly a formative experience to work with so many people who used their designated areas of expertise to put together a package _so comprehensive,_ that every single American would benefit from it. The perspective I gained working alongside other Congressional staffers and members of the Ways & Means Committee has helped shape my time with the Fairness Project. We’re living at a time when our politics are the most divided they may have ever been, and too many politicians care more now about what party they represent than making a difference in the lives of their constituents. Our team has won real change 31 times over because when we decide to run a campaign, we do so wholeheartedly — we make sure that no matter your party or your ideals, __you_ benefit from this policy. _ It’s why we’ve won campaigns to raise wages, guarantee paid leave, enact policing reforms, protect abortion, and more in red, purple, and blue states across the country — **because Americans everywhere agree with common-sense reforms that improve our lives. ** _And it’s how we’ve been able to leverage the ACA to expand Medicaid to over 1 million people in America._ [_**If you’re with us as we continue to enact life-saving policies across the country via ballot measure, will you support our work today,
